plumbers.name: ABC Plumbing, Sewer, Heating, Cooling & Electric
plumbers.address: 220 W Campus Dr, Arlington Heights, IL 60004, USA

reviews.author: Misha Pendersen
reviews.text:
Edgar Rodriguez was a phenomenal representative of the company. He was professional, respectful, friendly, and knowledgeable. We also received a free total house inspection for all our plumbing and heating.

Greg Skalski and Pedro Olascoaga installed my new toilet and upgraded the main valve in my powder room. They, too, were professional, courteous, knowledgeable,
and expedient.

I highly recommend this company.

reviews.author: Scott Norman
reviews.text: Very professional and courteous. Did an amazing job with my project. He and his colleague came back early the next day and stayed 12 hours to make sure everything worked. Clean up was amazing. Highly recommend David for electrical needs. Super friendly and great attention to detail. 5 stars for ABC Electric. Will use again. If you get their AI system just follow the prompts, they will call you back quickly. Happy customer!

reviews.author: Samall Hazziez
reviews.text:
This is ‘Part 2’ from my August 16th post:  The ‘Actual Install’

If I attempt to communicate my satisfaction with the work, craftsmanship, and professionalism of Esteban and his partner Tyler, it would be an outright ‘INSULT’…!  These guys were (are), simply the best of the ‘BEST’…End-to-End they were focused and meticulous with their work and ‘QUALITY’ checks…WOW, I AM SO PLEASED WITH MY SYSTEM…!

The actual install/equipment removal was a site to see…’It was like Esteban/Tyler, were building a ‘CASTLE’…It was like they were handling ‘PRECIOUS CARGO’…. Layer, upon Layer…The discipline, the order, the patience (with my questions), their attentiveness to keeping the work area safe and clean.  When it came down to the ‘Verification & Validation’ activities for the system (Testing/Quality Checks), they left ‘ABSOLUTELY NO STONE UN-TURNED’…!

It has been a long, long, LOOONNNGGG-TIME, sense I (my family) was on the receiving end of excellent service and a quality assured, quality driven product solution.  I and my family are eternally grateful for what the ABC corporation has/is investing in their team[s].

From the point of my initial consult and problem eval/assessment with Bob and Tony, through the path of installation/solution validation (testing) with Esteban and Tyler, these guys were absolute champions.  Every home/business should (must) have at their fingertips a master HVAC point of contact.  I recommend (without giving it a second thought), the ABC Team.

I’m not ashamed to admit that I am (at times), a selfish man.  Esteban and Tyler had me believing that I had my own dedicated (quasi) service enablement team.  With that said, Bob M., I will be contacting you ASAP, for my next project/my next consult…’CONSIDER IT DONE’

reviews.author: Muminah Muhammad
reviews.text:
We are members of ABC and having a membership has its perks.  Our appointment had to be rescheduled twice due to dire emergencies and scheduling conflicts.

The third appointment ABC scheduled Mr. Darrell Bell, the Drain Technician to come out and inspect our drainage issue.  Mr. Bell was very professional, he introduced himself, listen to our issue and concerns, provided quality service and gave us the best solution going forward.

We were very impressed that he didn’t make a mess and cleaned up very well when the job was completed.

Well as they say, “the third time’s a charm”.  We are very satisfied with Mr. Bell’s service!

~The Muhammad Family

reviews.author: Sara Qawwas
reviews.text:
Jose was a great tech helping me with moving and putting back the radiators in my home for some restoration work being done. He was very attentive to details and worked extra time to make sure it was all done properly.

My 5 star review is mostly for him. Pricing wise I think they over charge quite a bit but I'm happy with the outcome of the work itself!

plumbers.name: Precision Today Plumbing Heating Cooling Electrical
plumbers.address: 640 E St Charles Rd Suite 209B, Carol Stream, IL 60188, USA

reviews.author: Sofia Ascencio
reviews.text: The technician Ray Santiago did an excellent job. He was very kind and polite in explaining the work he would be doing. He took his time repairing the bathroom sink faucets and replacing the old valves. This was our first service with Precision Today, and we are truly satisfied with the work he did. We will definitely contact you again if we need their services in the future, and of course, we highly recommend you. Thank you for your services!

reviews.author: riana trice
reviews.text: We had two separate issues come up and had the pleasure of working with Carlos and Daniel. I have to say we have been having issues with the plumbing and pipes since we moved in around 5 years ago and never have we had such a positive experience. They were knowledgeable. They were quick. They were kind and willing to answer any questions that we had and it was clear that they were professionals. I felt comfortable signing up for the membership, because if these are the type of people that are coming out to help I know it'll a quality service and worth it.  Thanks again for coming out. Super appreciated.

reviews.author: Amrendra Kumar
reviews.text:
I am very disappointed with the recent service and the overall handling of my account. If a technician cannot replace a clearly dirty filter or at least document the issue on the work completion form, how is a customer supposed to trust that the rest of the job was completed properly? The new filters for both the humidifier and furnace were readily available in the home at the time of the visit. When I called the main office, I was told the technician “did not want to be rude” by changing the filter. That explanation is not acceptable. He could have asked my wife, who was present, informed her that the filters needed replacement, or at minimum documented it before obtaining her signature.
In addition, two maintenance visits in 2025 were missed despite our prepaid contract for biannual service. When I brought this to their attention, the initial response was, “You could have called us if we had not called you.” That is not a professional way to handle missed contracted services. We paid in advance with the expectation that your company would track and fulfill the agreed-upon visits. The minimum expected response would have been an apology and a reasonable solution, such as extending the contract by another year or offering a refund for the missed services. This experience raises serious concerns about accountability and customer service.

I am editing this review 45 minutes later to add that the heater is now not blowing hot air; only the fan is running. The furnace was working properly before the technician arrived, and the service document states that everything was functioning fine at the time of inspection. This raises even more concern about the quality and thoroughness of the work performed.

reviews.author: Robin Long
reviews.text:
Bryan Herrera is an awesome electrician with Precision Today. He took out my old Wadsworth fuse box and updated the electrical in my fuse panel. Bryan was very patient with me, gave a thorough explanation of the work, and how long it would take to be completed. He left the area clean and I’m very pleased with the outcome.
More importantly, his manager James Pope in electrical at Precision Today is a man of his word. He resolved my ongoing problem in one day that four people couldn’t do in two months. The installation Dept. blamed the Sales Dept. and vis versa for the mishap. The problem I had with them came after my furnace installation. The inspector deemed that the old Wadsworth panel needed to be updated to better support the new furnace system. They wanted to charge me over $6,000 for this work.
After speaking with James Pope for the first time to explain the problem, he returned my call the same day like he said he would and with a solution. This deserves repeating, he resolved my ongoing problem in one day that four people couldn’t do in two months. The icing on the cake is the work was completely free!!!  Thank you James Pope and  Bryan Herrera in electrical at Precision Today!

reviews.author: Donna Guy
reviews.text: Precision Today installed my water heater last year (2025) . Near the anniversary of the install, I called to have them do the annual inspection & possible drain of the water tank. It was easy to get the appointment. Michael, the technician, was on time. He quickly did a general inspection of my plumbing & any possible issues that may have to be dealt with soon (it's also part of my maintenance plan). He quickly took care of the water tank. He was very courteous & knowledgable.  I have been a customer of Precision Today for several years

plumbers.name: Black Diamond Plumbing & Mechanical Inc.
plumbers.address: 1400 Miller Pkwy, McHenry, IL 60050, USA

reviews.author: Shy Teal
reviews.text:
I’m a proud Diamond Member and officially part of the prestige family! My electrician was hands down the best — knowledgeable, patient, and professional from start to finish. I asked about 101 questions in under a minute, and he still managed to multitask, explain everything clearly, and get the job done right.

He even fixed the light in my kitchen over the sink — someone before me thought it made more sense to put a plug there instead of an actual light switch and outlet combo (don’t ask 😅). But he got it working perfectly!

Now I’ve got lights shining where there were no lights before! My utility room is beautifully lit with new canned lights — oh my God, excellent, très bien!

As a single woman, finding honest, respectful professionals means everything. I felt comfortable, informed, and completely taken care of. Black Diamond is a true one-stop shop — they go the extra mile and make your home shine, literally and figuratively!

reviews.author: Steven
reviews.text: Life savers! And I’m not even a customer. Well, I am now. I had a flat and without hesitation a representative from Black Diamond pulled over and hopped out with a battery operated compressor to help. It ended up being a pretty bad gash in the sidewall and wasn’t holding air. So he went back to the truck and got some rubber cement to help hold the air so I could get to a safer spot to change the tire. It was a busy two way street and he went above and beyond trying to help. And he did! Thank you so much. Praying I don’t having any plumbing issues, but if I do, I know who I’m calling.

reviews.author: J L
reviews.text:
I am so thankful for Black Diamond!

They have single handedly helped me repair and maintain my home with ease and savings since 2019.

Over the years, they have installed my furnace, air conditioner, replaced water shut off valves, garbage disposal, electric doorbell (Brennan was awesome), and most recently my water tank heater (Trevor and Keith were wonderful).

I always get several quotes for big repairs and Black Diamond is always the best!! They are worth every penny.  Honest up front pricing, no surprises, service windows are convenient, always on time, no employee turnover (i have had the same techs) and always knowledgeable and respectful. Their scheduling/customer service team is so kind and literally always answers my calls. Their quality is so good even my HVAC permit inspector raved about them when he came.

It is a god send to have one company offer the best service in all areas, plumbing,HVAC, and electrical and with the most experienced technicians, best schedulers/customer service, and for the best prices.

Thank you!

reviews.author: James Mashinter
reviews.text: I called Black diamond,about having my kitchen drain cleaned. Mario,was the plumbing technician who arrived on time. He looked over the situation,and got to work. He took great care in making sure my issue was resolved to the best of his abilities. I would highly recommend Black diamond,if all of their employees are as committed to excellent work,this is a company worth having a positive experience with.

reviews.author: Evette Rolon
reviews.text: First off I like to share that my family and I are not familiar with well water as we come from Chicago. We are not familiar with how well water works and almost gotten taking for a hell of a ride but thanks to Colten and black diamond they have been a blessing for my family and I. we HIGHLY recommend them especially Colton. Very intelligent, understanding, respectful, honest person. I work from home and the staff respected that and worked around my schedule. Everyone from the customer service department to the staff that came to work on our house were very polite and kind to us. Thank you for everything you have done for us. May God bless you guys.

plumbers.name: S and J Plumbing & Sewer
plumbers.address: 1156 W Shure Dr Suite 130, Arlington Heights, IL 60004, USA

reviews.author: John Yousif
reviews.text:
I recently hired this plumbing service for a leaking pipe under my kitchen sink, and I couldn’t be happier with the experience. From the first phone call, Justine was professional, friendly, and quick to schedule an appointment. She made the whole process smooth and stress-free.
When Brandon arrived, he was right on time, explained the issue clearly, and provided a fair estimate before starting the work. He was knowledgeable, efficient, and made sure everything was fixed properly. What really impressed me was how clean and organized he kept the workspace — no mess left behind.
The repair was completed faster than expected, and the pricing was transparent with no hidden fees. It’s such a relief to find a reliable team you can trust.
I will definitely use their services again and highly recommend Brandon and Justine to anyone looking for honest, high-quality plumbing work

reviews.author: Tammy Motin
reviews.text:
I called S&J Plumbing as I had a great experience with them in the past.  Plumbing issues can be so stressful, and Art, the technician that came to our home today, was so patient and thorough in every area, from diagnosis, to a repair that took several hours, coordinating a *second team for another issue, and in offering multiple recommendations to make sure the problem with our lines wouldn’t happen again.

Art told me that he really enjoys his work, and it is very satisfying when he can help resolve issues for customers, and that truly showed today.  I am never at a loss for words, but I can’t begin to tell you what a great job he did today, and today involved a lot of hard work.

In addition, *Mike N and Justin arrived a few hours into the job to replace a key piece of cast iron that sits between the toilet and the main line.  I had no idea how many aspects there were to that piece of the job, and Mike and Justin also exceeded my expectation in every way.

Mike and Justin were equally friendly and knowledgeable, and told me they also really enjoy their work and find it very rewarding to help solve customer’s plumbing issues.

These gentlemen didn’t miss any details and at the end, didn’t rush out, but thoroughly cleaned the job site, and put everything away for me.  It is very obvious these three gentlemen take great pride in their work and in their company.
I highly recommend this company.

The picture that I included in my review is “after”.  Had I been able to take a picture of the “before” you would have seen piles of sopping wet towels trying to stop a flooded floor from causing additional damage.

reviews.author: Eleanor Park
reviews.text: Nick Y and Nick L did a massive 2 day job in my crawl space with excellence, professionalism, and great craft. They explained everything as they worked, left my place very clean during and after, answered all my questions and concerns. I feel like my home is safe for years to come.

reviews.author: BOB SMITH
reviews.text: I called S&J Plumbing to repair a leak that developed behind the wall in our bathroom. Joe was able to get me on the schedule and sent Mark Lindeman out a few hours later. Mark was very nice, very knowledgeable, talented and informative. He noticed our tankless water heater and knew the unit and started telling us about it and how it needs to be maintained (I had no idea) and suggested other items he noticed that could be issues in the future. He wasn’t being a pushy salesman - just an experienced advisor. He did an excellent job with the repair and he was a pleasure to speak with. I definitely recommend S&J Plumbing and, in particular, Mark Lindeman. Thank you for fitting us into todays schedule.

reviews.author: Georgia McGuire
reviews.text: Had to have all our galvanized pipes replaced with copper pipes. Starting with Nick who came out to check out the problem and give us an estimate to Dennis and Robbie who came to our home and did a phenomenal job. Both Dennis and Robbie  were pleasant, professional and courteous. Answered all our questions and gave us a tour of what they did and what they were going to do. I felt comfortable with both of them and their knowledge of our problem was exceptional. The clean up afterwards was wonderful and I would recommend SandJ for any plumbing problems you have or may encounter in the future. They are definitely our go to plumbers for any future problems. All three men were great representatives of the company.

plumbers.name: Advantage Plumbing, Heating & Air Conditioning
plumbers.address: 992 St Charles St, Elgin, IL 60120, USA

reviews.author: Matthew Kooperman
reviews.text: I’m a new homeowner and six months into homeownership the thermostat and sensor on the old 9 year old water tank died. I called Four Seasons and they were out within 2 hours to evaluate my situation and make recommendations. I could either repair the old water tank which would be the band-aid approach with no guarantees something else wouldn’t go wrong or I could opt to replace with an entirely new water tank. I went with the second option and 24 hours later one of Four Seasons’ affiliated companies Advantage Plumbing was back at my house removing the old tank and installing a new tank that will hopefully last for as long as I own the home. I appreciate that Four Seasons was there for me when I needed help in an emergency and the level of communication from the service technician who came out to evaluate my situation was great. He didn’t try and upsell and he was honest and straightforward about my options. The service was really excellent. The install job 24 hours later went smoothly. I was relieved to have hot water again!  I ended up having a question about the billing invoice that customer service was unable to answer and I requested a callback from a manager and the manager called back which helped and I appreciated. Thank you. Five star experience. I definitely recommend Four Seasons and Advantage Plumbing.

reviews.author: Keshara Tyson
reviews.text:
I had an excellent experience with Four Seasons, and I truly appreciate their outstanding customer service. From start to finish, the team was professional, responsive, and reassuring during a stressful situation. They took the time to explain everything clearly and made sure I felt informed and supported throughout the process.

I especially want to recognize Madani, my technician, who did an amazing job. He was knowledgeable, respectful, punctual, and very thorough in his work. Madani went above and beyond to ensure everything was done correctly and took the time to answer my questions with patience and professionalism. His positive attitude and expertise made a big difference.

I highly recommend Four Seasons to anyone looking for reliable, high-quality service. Thank you again for a great experience!

reviews.author: Patricia Davis
reviews.text:
Excellent service from the salesperson Mr. Williams who came out to my home. The next day followed by the two technicians came out to install my furnace. Excellent performance all across-the-board they get a 10 out of 10. Thank you so much for having qualified technicians who come out to my home to guarantee safety and make sure that I am safe in my home after they leave by doing qualified work!!
Thank you Four Seasons your Company and your Services are the BEST ( 10 ) all across the board!!

reviews.author: KJ Johnson
reviews.text: I had a great experience with Four Seasons 😊. I required prompt service and they were able to accommodate me for the same day to tend to my furnace service. As the temperature has been so cold, this worked out greatly. Alex fixed my issue quickly and is very knowledgeable in his trade. Appreciate the great customer service from Alex and from the teammates at the office. I highly recommend all to use their services!

reviews.author: David Montee
reviews.text: Excellent work replacing my full HVAC system with new furnace, air conditioner, humidifier and UV lamp.  Install was done and looks very professional.  My installer Kasper was polite and did exceptional work.  Thank you!  New system is operating perfectly and exceeds my expectations.  Thank you Four Seasons

plumbers.name: Lifeline Plumbing, Heating & Cooling
plumbers.address: 296 Williams Pl, East Dundee, IL 60118, USA

reviews.author: Victor Haddock
reviews.text: Great turnaround. Hot water wet out yesterday evening. Less than 24 hours later we have a new water heater. Melissa in the back office was great giving us timing expectation. Kyle explained what happened to the old heater and what he did with the new one and why. They covered the floor ensuring where they walked was clean.

reviews.author: Paula Weisserth
reviews.text: The work was performed  on time, correctly and on budget. Not only did we need to replace the old and discharge pipe - We also had a leaking faucet outside that required creating an access panel inside. Erick is a great Technician! Not only was he knowledgeable, helpful, and well prepared- He was extremely polite and friendly! he cleaned up after he finished and even pointed out a few other Items we may want to update in the future for our rental property. I would highly recommend this company!

reviews.author: Vilia Drazdys
reviews.text: Miguel, our technician, was absolutely great. He was professional, knowledgeable and very courteous. He immediately assessed the issue with our sewer line and proposed a solution. He explained everything well (without talking down to us) and gave us the cost up front. He was very careful of our home and made sure all surfaces were protected before starting work.  When finished, Miguel cleaned everything and tested all drains several times to ensure everything was reconnected properly and that nothing leaked.

reviews.author: Ayomide Omole
reviews.text: I had a great experience with D’Andre , he came to fix my heat. He was extremely pleasant, professional, and respectful from start to finish. He arrived on time, explained everything clearly, and made sure the issue was fully resolved before leaving. You could tell he genuinely cared about doing a good job and making sure I was comfortable. Excellent customer service, great attitude, and very knowledgeable. I truly appreciate the quality of his work and would absolutely recommend him to anyone needing heating services.

reviews.author: John Kent
reviews.text: OK Art, we really appreciate your prompt response and coming over to diagnose the sewer line collapse. Also getting started tomorrow is fantastic. We really need your help with this one and you’re coming through.

plumbers.name: J. Blanton Plumbing, Sewer & Drain
plumbers.address: 5126 N Ravenswood Ave, Chicago, IL 60640, USA

reviews.author: Michelle Tyler
reviews.text: I had a great experience working with Clayton G. From the start, he really listened and understood what I was hoping to accomplish, and did everything possible to make sure the work aligned with my goals. He explained the process clearly, was respectful of my time and property, and paid attention to every detail. Super friendly and easy to work with — I never felt like the initial plan was being altered or going in a direction that would cost more than I agreed to. The finished result is exactly what I needed. I would absolutely use him again and highly recommend to anyone looking for a reliable and thoughtful plumber.

reviews.author: Robert Koehler
reviews.text: Emmanuel, Gio, and Greg were a great team. Handled the job with complete professionalism and left confident the money was well spent with the right people.  Fixed the sewer line using the best method and technology. Good interpersonal skills. Thank you.

reviews.author: Jose Flores
reviews.text: Christian and Julian stopped by for maintenance, my wife and I had been complaining about a running toilet for a few weeks. Christian changed out our flapper, and even tightened down the toilet bolts while he was at it, at no extra charge! I love having a plumbing company that doesn’t try to upsell on everything possible. Thank you Christian and Julian!

reviews.author: Susan Bledsoe
reviews.text:
My technician Andreas Pastos showed up on time. He was friendly and personable. He thought he was there to do a sewage line clearance but I really needed a toilet unplugged. I had tried to plunge the toilet myself but due to a recent hip surgery was unable to do it without increasing my pain exponentially.  Andreas used my plunger, gave me a lesson and how to use less energy to get the line clear and took care of my plumbing issue quickly and efficiently.  On top of that he was a great neighbor and would accept no money. He would not even let me give him money to buy him breakfast.  Who dies that any more?  I am so grateful.   This company will definitely be on my go-to list.

I also love their security. They text me a picture of the guy who was going to show up at my door and let me know exactly when he was coming.  First class.

reviews.author: Seth Maybury
reviews.text: Super helpfull.   They called back on a Sunday late afternoon and came out that evening.   3 plumbers came to the house on Monday to finish the job.   Joe, George and Anthony.   Highly recommend them.   No one wants to have Sewage backing up, they treated it like an emergency and kept at it.    Thank you.  Highly recommended..  (and the price was 100% fair).

plumbers.name: Mendel Plumbing, Heating & Electric
plumbers.address: 3N640 N 17th St, St. Charles, IL 60174, USA

reviews.author: Chris Synal
reviews.text:
Mendel came out when the original home filter casing finally broke and started pouring out water. No other service company was willing to come or care for concern.

Within 25 minutes the technician showed up after I shut of the main to the house.  After a an unsuccessful install of the replacement the new housing was faulty also.  After listening and spending beyond the time to care and explain some future issues that might occur in other areas while he waiting couple of hrs for a new housing to arrive we finally have water (note was not the technician fault to wait to hrs it was the gentleman delivering the canister)

Thank you and look forward to working with Mendel in the future.

Attached is some before and after shot.

reviews.author: Brandon Gentile
reviews.text: Tonight I came home and heard running water.  I called Mendel to the first time and my experience couldn't have been more awesome!!  Jenna took my call and was so professional!  I was all worked up when I called and after she reassured me that a tech would be dispatched, I hung up with her feeling a little more at ease!  Jared was the technician that came out and he was just absolutely great from the second he walked in my door.  He quickly assessed the issue and gave me several options!  He showed me several pictures of the issue(I wasn't getting in the crawl space).  He explained every option and weighed the pros and cons of each option with me.  Once I decided, he had everything needed in his van and he got right to work.  Had the repair done in a fair amount of time and showed me pictures of all the work he did after.  I have future plumbing work that I will need and I will be asking for Jared to come do the work!  10/10 Recommend!

reviews.author: Ed Dziewior
reviews.text: Unfortunately woke up on Saturday morning to find our pipes had frozen due to the weather. Called for service and was assured that a technician would be arriving later this morning. Received a text with the technicians' name and estimate  time of arrival. Dave was the technician that arrived and promptly evaluated the situation we were having. He gave us an estimate for the repair and mentioned that if unseen issues appeared we would have to reevaluate the repair cost. This was acceptable to my wife and I. His inspection did not turn up any water leakage. He isolated the area that he felt was the area of concern. He went his truck to get a piece of equipment that would place a electrical charge to the copper pipe to try to heat the pipe and breakup the ice blockage. He was successful in removing the blockage. No damage to the drywall, no split pipe, and running water again throughout the house. Thank you Dave for your experience and dedication in resolving our issue. He has a pleasant personality, listens to your concerns, and does his job professionally and with efficiency which is reassuring.

reviews.author: Andrew Nickel
reviews.text:
My 78 year old mother, who lives alone, has used Mendel for years.  Recently moved and had them come inspect the furnace.  Technician said it was fine and just needed servicing.  A couple months later, the furnace seemed loud, so she had another tech come out.  This guy said the furnace (less than 10 years old) had deadly problems.  Actually turned the unit off and said he did not want to be in the house with the unit on.  Said needed full replacement right away.  A sales person came out later that day and quoted $25,000+ for new furnace and install.  Said they could come out the very next day, take her money, and put in the new one.  Rush, rush.

She had another company come out the next day and they said the humidifier needed a new part, but otherwise the furnace was perfectly fine.

Draw your own conclusions.

reviews.author: Kenneth Weber
reviews.text: They sent Paul out on very short notice. He solved our problems quicker than expected was super friendly and gave us great information and technical advice for how to avoid problems in the future. Will absolutely call them the next time we need a plumber.  And definitely I would request Paul if he is available he was OUTSTANDING!

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.address: 1691 Town Center St Ste 104, Aurora, IL 60504, USA

reviews.author: nancy anderson
reviews.text:
Our old (and only) toilet had not been working right for a couple months (partial flushes, tank running, etc). It finally got completely stopped up and started overflowing and we couldn't plunge it out! Roto- Rooter to the rescue!

Our Technician, Marc, was great! He arrived within 3-4 hours of my call, diagnosed the problem quickly, and gave me possible solutions and estimates for the work before starting.

Marc augered toilet and replaced some old parts in a timely fashion. He got our old potty working better than it had before. Plus, he left the bathroom clean and tidy too -- Hooray!

It was expensive but worth it for the quick, friendly service.

reviews.author: Chuck Damore
reviews.text: We had a catastrophic failure of the cast iron sewer pipe exiting the house on a late Friday night.  None of the toilets or sinks would drain.  The salesperson from Roto Rooter came quickly after I phoned them on Saturday to assess the problem and give me a repair price.  The issue was a broken cast iron sewer line exiting the house at the foundation.  It sheared in two pieces and became clogged.  Monday morning, Roto Rooter arrived on site.  They needed to dig an 8 foot deep X 4 foot wide X 8 foot long hole under the porch to access the failed cast iron pipe.  They had to cut out concrete stoop as well.  They removed the failed pipe and replaced it with a new PVC pipe.  They pulled all permits and arranged for a city inspection.  We were able to use our water Monday afternoon.  Tuesday morning, they filled in the hole and cleaned up.  The cleanup was fantastic.  If you didn't know what happened the day before, you would have never known they were there.  It was a big job that required a large backhoe and many service techs to make the repair.  The supervisor Brandon M. did a fantastic job along with the sales associate Kyle and the rest of the crew.  The finished site was professionally cleaned.  My neighbors commented on how well the guys cleaned up.

reviews.author: Day
reviews.text:
We had a great experience with Roto-Rooter thanks to Leonard and Levi. Leonard was the plumber who completed the work, and he was extremely professional, knowledgeable, and thorough. He took the time to make sure everything was done right and left the area clean afterward.

Levi, the supervisor, was also fantastic — he clearly explained what was going on, walked us through the issue, and helped us understand the best options to resolve it. Having someone explain things in a straightforward way really made the whole situation less stressful.

Overall, excellent service, great communication, and a team that truly cares about helping their customers. I would definitely recommend them and wouldn’t hesitate to call again if needed.

reviews.author: Diana Caputo
reviews.text: I had water and sewage backup comimg from my shower. Mitchell was great. He came to my house twice. Both times in a timely manner, super friendly and respectful. He explained the whole process. He spent a lot of time getting to the root of the problem and didn't leave until he made sure everything was good. He was able to get my house running again until repairs can be done. I would highly recommend.

reviews.author: Brent VanLanduyt
reviews.text: I had an excellent experience with Roto-Rooter. Nertil came out to fix the water supply stop valves under the sink, and from start to finish the service was top-notch. The work was done efficiently, professionally, and he answered all my questions before leaving.  I would highly recommend.

plumbers.name: Andersen Plumbing, Heating and AC Repair
plumbers.address: 700 Terry Ave, Aurora, IL 60506, USA

reviews.author: Anthony DiAngelo
reviews.text:
Highly recommend Joe and the Anderson team. Joe replaced our sump pump and was outstanding to work with. He took the time to educate us, clearly laid out all of our options, and explained the trade-offs so we could make an informed decision—no pressure, just solid guidance. The quality of the work was excellent.

We’ve had Anderson out to our house multiple times over the past few months for different issues, and each experience has been consistently superb. Professional, knowledgeable, and reliable service every time. We wouldn’t hesitate to call Joe or Anderson again.

reviews.author: Mariah Wright
reviews.text: Nate & Zach were great! They were on time, very polite and very knowledgeable. Immediately was able to identify the issue and provide a solution. Walked me through everything in a way I understood. Great service all around! “Im just a girl” lol and I was able to explain the issue no problem to my husband as well. 10/10!!

reviews.author: Jeanette Hoffman
reviews.text: Jon and Cesar came out to diagnose a noise I heard coming from the furnace. They arrived quickly, were polite and professional and did a thorough inspection of the entire furnace. They were able to figure out the issue and discussed with me the other things they saw that looked like they should be addressed to keep the furnace running smoothly. They offered me different options on what to repair urgently and what should be addressed but could wait a bit longer. They were not pushy at all and explained everything thoroughly while showing me pictures of what they were seeing. I continue to use Anderson because every time I’ve needed them this is the same reliable and professional service I receive.

reviews.author: Max
reviews.text:
I recently had a bathtub faucet installed by Andersen, and I couldn’t be happier with the experience. Evan and Michelle were professional, courteous, and clearly knew what they were doing. They took the time to make sure everything was installed properly and working perfectly before they left.

Their workmanship was clean and precise, and they made sure the area was spotless when the job was finished. It’s clear they take pride in the quality of their work. I would definitely recommend this company to anyone looking for reliable and professional plumbing services.

reviews.author: Andre Porche
reviews.text:
We had an outstanding experience working with Joe Harkins. From the moment he arrived, he demonstrated a high level of professionalism, knowledge, and attention to detail. He took the time to thoroughly assess our home and carefully identify the source of the leak, explaining each step of the process in a clear and reassuring manner.
Joe truly went above and beyond to ensure we felt confident that the issue was properly diagnosed and that our system was secure. His expertise and patience gave us peace of mind during what could have been a very stressful situation.
In addition, he provided thoughtful recommendations for trusted services that could assist with the necessary repairs. That extra level of guidance showed that he genuinely cares about his clients and the long-term well-being of their homes.
We highly recommend Joe Harkins to anyone in need of a knowledgeable, dependable, and customer-focused professional.

plumbers.name: Rescue Plumbing
plumbers.address: 1137 W Webster Ave, Chicago, IL 60614, USA

reviews.author: Andrea Monllau
reviews.text:
What a great and fast job they did! We have a bursted pipe and called them. In less than 1 hour Javier and Jimmy showed up and were able to quickly repair the pipe.

They kept us informed of pricing and steps throughout the whole process.

Javier was really good at identifying where the burst was and only had to do a small whole in the wall.

10/10!! From call to fixed less than 3h

reviews.author: Lauren Ortega Falconer
reviews.text: Dex always comes through for us in an emergency! We have had several plumbing issues in our condo in the last 12 months, and Dex has been great. He's always responsive and persistent, even coming back a few times free of charge to tinker with his solutions to chronic issues we're dealing with. He's been trustworthy and friendly, and I would definitely recommend him to anyone.

reviews.author: Claire Anderson
reviews.text: This team was outstanding. Within 10 minutes of me calling they had three guys in the house working to fix my pipes. Ended up having 6 burst pipes during the Omar vortex that were really complex to fix and Dex and his team were fast and kept me updated the whole time. I have two small children at home and need water to properly care for them and he promised me no matter what he was getting me water by the end of the night. And they did for a good cost. I cannot say enough for how amazing this company is and the men who work for it are. So great fun to have found them

reviews.author: Rhianna Kern
reviews.text:
Dex and the crew literally saved our night (and our hardwood floors!) We got home from work and the kitchen sink was backing up with gross water and quickly started overflowing onto the floor. Between bailing out drainage water and panicking, Rescue Plumbing answered the phone in 2 rings and said we can help you right now.

Not only did Dex and his team show up AFTER HOURS in the SNOW, they were warm, kind and jumped right into action to save my kitchen. They knew exactly what to do, explained it all to me, told me the costs right up front and stuck to it. Within 30 minutes they fixed our building’s drainage issue, cleaned up the kitchen neat as a pin and were out the door with a quick joke.

I hope I don’t need to see them again but also if I need a plumber, they’re saved in my phone and getting every recommendation. 4 seasons and ABC told me I’d have to wait til tomorrow afternoon at the earliest and I think my floors would have been ruined from overflowing sink water if I didn’t have Rescue Plumbing. Thank you Dex and team!!!

reviews.author: Charles Hastings
reviews.text: Javier was fantastic, honest, and efficient! I got several quotes from other companies and this was by far the most cost effective. Not only did they provide a fair and up front quote, but they were friendly, and responsive. I will definitely be calling them again for any future plumbing needs!

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.address: 24W500 Maple Ave # 209, Naperville, IL 60540, USA

reviews.author: Fresh
reviews.text: Erlin was fantastic!  He actually took the time required to diagnose the issue (where previous plumbers did not) and address the true problem.  He was professional, respectful, and effectively communicated the details surrounding the problem and provided tips for future plumbing health.  I highly recommend Erlin and will definitely be using him again in the future!

reviews.author: Joseph Morisco
reviews.text:
I scheduled a plumber to come out and had a few questions after booking the appointment. I called back simply to understand what the technician planned to do since I had already had the line rodded a few months ago and didn’t want to just repeat the same service without understanding the approach.

Unfortunately, whoever answered the phone was extremely dismissive. She repeatedly cut me off while I was speaking and had a noticeable attitude. I wasn’t trying to be difficult — I was just asking basic questions about the service.

Instead of listening, she kept saying they couldn’t tell me anything over the phone and wouldn’t even let me finish my sentences. Because of that interaction, I immediately canceled my appointment.

Good customer service starts with listening to the customer. Losing business simply because someone won’t take a moment to hear a question is disappointing.

reviews.author: Burst Flames Entertainment
reviews.text: Kemal with Roto-Rooter was great! He explained everything that was recommended to be serviced and didn't try to upsale me on a service that wasn't needed. I highly recommend Kemal and I'll definitely be reaching out to him again when I need any plumbing service.

reviews.author: Charia Johnson
reviews.text: Roto rooter is a scam... they dont do any work... Im the president of a condo association... called them for a boiler issue the man didnt do a thing... looked at the hot water heater and told me it was old and probably out of warranty and it would be 15k to replace... I even asked like you didnt even look at it.. you arent telling me whats broken just that it old and broke... well I can see that... he made a call to the company about warranty... wrote his paper for the 75 dollar fee and left... did nothing for 75 bucks Nothing

reviews.author: Andrea Gomez
reviews.text: First service a few months ago left me happy, issue got taken care of right away. Appt was made and tech was there within the estimated time frame. The work was done quick and efficiently. Recently i had some plumbing issues and immediately thought to call them. Scheduled an appointment same day within the hour, the tech was dispatched- i waited 2 1/2 hours before calling for an update and being told there is issues with travel and they cant make it in, thats fine, i reschedule for next day, wait over an hour and a half before calling for an update, was told to hold on a bit more. An hour later they call to reschedule that the tech cannot come, made for next day in the AM this time instead of PM. Got a call this morning at 7am-(3 hours before my appointment time) to ask if my appointment can be moved up, the tech can be there in the next 30 minutes, i agree, wait, over an hour later, nothing- i call for an update, am told the technician is supposed to be on the way still but nothing. I cancelled the appointment. Ive had to rearange my schedule for 3 days now and ive been able to try things at home to help my plumbing issues. Crying in the club- send help

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.address: 650 E Terra Cotta Ave #110, Crystal Lake, IL 60014, USA

reviews.author: Esther O
reviews.text: Jonathan was super helpful with my plumbing issue and made sure there were no leaks after the job was done. He was very kind and worked quickly and professionally. I would recommend him to anyone who needs an understanding plumber.

reviews.author: Mary Hawkins
reviews.text: Bruno & Steve were very helpful not only at talking me through what caused our main line slowness/backup, but also daily preventative measures. We were also able to talk through bigger picture needs down the line. Our home is an investment, and they were easy to talk to about protecting it. Never felt like I was getting upsold.

reviews.author: Epic Battle Reenactments
reviews.text: Roto-Rooter was swift to respond to my request. The technician they sent, Azzi, arrived promptly on site and demonstrated his skill and expertise at handling the fixes and installation required. He was dedicated to completing the task on my behalf and overall was a pleasant interaction. I am very satsified with his work and the experience given!

reviews.author: Eric Ohlrich
reviews.text:
Our house has had issues with roots clogging drainage pipes for years so we have had a few different companies come and resolve the issue, Roto-Rooter was very thorough, Israel and Mike were very professional, kind, and patient. They explained everything they were doing and why, even giving us information about our pipes and issues that could arise later on. Israel and Mike didn’t just stop once the clog was cleared, they went through the pipes multiple times in order to guarantee the pipes were completely clear and told us the further steps to take.

The price was a bit steep, it was around 720$ for them to do this service which hurt, but unfortunately it wasn’t too surprising.

Overall, overpriced, but they were very knowledgeable and took the job seriously and worked through it thoroughly. Will be using Roto-Rooter again, after our wallet recovers 😅

reviews.author: Sagar Mehta
reviews.text: This is from Saturday morning. Bruno, Steven & Kyle came to check in the drainage issue. After going to the root cleaning in the pipeline process they were able to pull the roots and waste. The pipeline has got some real issue that merges into the city sewer. All them tried really hard and put in 5+ hours of work. They are helpful and I recommend them for your services

plumbers.name: Tidy Tank Plumbing, Sewer, and Septic
plumbers.address: 740 McArdle Dr, Crystal Lake, IL 60014, USA

reviews.author: Kevin Morrison
reviews.text: Great experience with Tidy Tank Septic! Brad handled my septic pumping and was incredibly helpful. Not only did he get the job done smoothly, but he also took the time to explain my whole setup and what to watch for over time. I left the visit knowing a lot more about my system and confident about when I’ll need service next. I’ll absolutely be calling them again. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Hyung J. Kim, MD
reviews.text: They performed residential septic tank service at my house. They did a wonderful job. They were professional and courteous. I highly recommend Ron's Tidy Septic Tank Service!!

reviews.author: Sabine Vosters
reviews.text: Was contacted by Tidy Tank Septic reminding me that the last service had been almost three years ago, and did I want to schedule a service. Set up an appointment for the very next day. They arrived at the scheduled time and got the job done thoroughly and efficiently. They explained what they were doing and documented everything in pictures and on the invoice. Their prices have gone up quite a bit since our last appointment, but I guess it's on par with every other price increase in the country. A very professional experience all around, I would definitely recommend this business to anyone looking for septic tank maintenance.

reviews.author: Terry A
reviews.text: I called Tidy Tank plumbing because my sump pump line broke. Dan was here within 45 minutes. He looked at the obvious issue but then investigated further to make sure that there were no other related issues such as frozen drain lines, etc. He went through all of the options from doing a simple repair to replace it with a top quality sump pump and backup system. He did not push me in any direction nor try to upsell me. Once the choice was made he had all of the equipment on the truck, completed the work, tested the system, and cleaned up. I've always had very good luck with their septic service and now I can add their plumbing service to that.

reviews.author: angelique archos solhi
reviews.text: TJ was polite and very professional.  He was even better at his job!  He replaced a disposal and faucet as well as reconfiguring the entire pipe system. He explained everything that needed to be done and was quick and efficient.  I will recommend him to my friends and family. I will also use his services in my new home going forward. Excellent!

plumbers.name: Fly Plumbing & HVAC
plumbers.address: 584 Chaddick Dr, Wheeling, IL 60090, USA

reviews.author: Catherine Ortiz
reviews.text:
Great service. Respectful to our property and cleaned up after work was completed.
We needed an outdoor spigot replaced and they recommended an anti-freeze spigot which I had no idea was an option.
They send us pics of the completed job and accommodated a service latch.
Shawn did a great job. This is our second time using their services and they do not disappoint. I recommend Fly Plumbing.

reviews.author: Michael Hansen
reviews.text: A very positive experience with Fly Plumbing. The company is always very responsive and goes above & beyond. I had a back up in my basement on a Sunday evening. I was able to easily reach them and set up a next day appointment (they had offered same day service, but the water had gone down). I requested Adrian (he had been out before) and they accommodated my request without issue. Adrian and Ben came out and addressed the issue. They were communicative, knowledgeable, kind and attentive. They remedied my issue & left my home clean. I highly recommend Adrian, Ben & Fly Plumbing!

reviews.author: Courtney Biewald
reviews.text: Miguel and Adrian were amazing. They really helped explain the process of everything they did and tips for the future. I will 100% be a returning customer and will be recommending them to everyone in the area! Thank you again! Excellent service.

reviews.author: yaakov sugarman
reviews.text: Adrian was amazing! He was very thorough and a pleasure to work with. He explained everything clearly, and I would definitely use him again.

reviews.author: Manny Arenivas
reviews.text: Got some work done on a few drains in my basement that were overflowing. Mikhail and Mickey did a great job getting everything sealed and cleaned. Very polite, friendly, and efficient. I will only go with this crew for any job moving forward. 5 stars.

plumbers.name: J&R Herra Heating, Cooling, & Plumbing
plumbers.address: 701 May St, Geneva, IL 60134, USA

reviews.author: KERRY CRABBE
reviews.text: I had a water heater that needed to be replaced. J&R Herra got back to me within an hour with a quote at a reasonable price. They sent a technician out within one working day to replace the old unit and they added a couple of bells and whistles. Their technician was friendly, courteous and very efficient. I highly recommended them.

reviews.author: Earthgirl Ray
reviews.text: Excellent experience from start to finish! Sebastian was friendly, professional, and resolved my plumbing issue quickly and efficiently. I really appreciated that the company sends a personal text with a little background about who will be coming to your home, it made everything feel more comfortable and personable from the start. The front office staff was extremely friendly and helpful and had someone at my house in less than 30 minutes. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Big Nelly
reviews.text: Great work done. Very knowledgeable and friendly. He had the Job done within an hour. The last guy that attempted it took over 5 hrs and didn’t do the job right. Michael did an amazing job and did it correctly. I will definitely be recommending J&R Herra to family and friends… Hell, even to strangers.

reviews.author: Niccole Dienst
reviews.text: Great experience from start to finish! Fast response, honest pricing, and very professional service. My furnace is working better than ever. I’ll definitely be using them again in the future for all my HVAC and plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Katherine Zielezinski
reviews.text: Our tech Sebastian was excellent! He called when he was on his way, arrived promptly and put booties on over his shoes when entering the house. He found the issue quickly, explained the repair and got right to work. No mess was left behind and we would be more than happy to have him as our tech any time we need a repair done. We called after hours for immediate repair and the job was done within 2 hours of making the call. Couldn’t recommend Sebastian more!

plumbers.name: Andersen Plumbing, Heating and AC Repair
plumbers.address: 1554 Crescent Lake Dr, Montgomery, IL 60538, USA

reviews.author: Anabelita G Merck
reviews.text: He did a excellent job. He was very polite and answered all our questions. This is the kind of company you want to come to fix and maintenance your equipment. But will not be possible if you don't have people like Austin Ramirez he deserves a big compensation or bonus. We really like him and thanks again for the service he did an our home. Definitely we will continue working with Andersen Plumbing and Heating an the future.  The Merck's.

reviews.author: David Podjasek
reviews.text: David and his team were incredibly efficient and friendly. They installed a brand new furnace and air conditioning system. The process throughout the day was easy and the result is EXCELLENT! Would definitely recommend... I had two toilets replaced with them a week ago and that experience was just as good!

reviews.author: Frank Rivera
reviews.text:
We have nothing but great things to say about Anderson. We have had them do yearly maintenance on our HVAC and its always been a great experience. Their techs are professional, super knowledgeable and recommend other optional services that help ensure your system is at optimal level.

For example, we had them install a UV light in our HVAC system & boy what a difference!! The house smells alot more fresh & its a peace of mind to know that there are no viruses or bacteria growth in your unit!! Thank you Anderson for your superior service.

reviews.author: Dave Lach
reviews.text: Jon was extremely personable and very friendly. This guy loves his job! The quote we got from him was reasonable considering we needed two furnaces replaced. We’ve used Anderson’s for plumbing in the past and never had any issues, so we decided to try them for 2 complete furnace replacements after the heat exchangers were defective. They always have been honest and upfront with no gimmicks. No upselling, just give you exactly what you need for your house. Kyle came by to inspect the old units initially, and then again a day after the installers left to make some minor adjustments to the new units. He is simply fantastic at what he does and just a wonderful person to talk with. The installers, Sam, Richard, & Kris were fast and efficient and got the job done in less than 8 hrs for 2 units. These guys made sure everything was left cleaner than when they found it and left to our satisfaction. The Anderson H&P experience has always been top notch!

reviews.author: Charm
reviews.text: We called Andersen Heating because we needed to replace our old furnace. From the 1st call to the completed installation of a new Lennox furnace, the Andersen team did a great job! I was kept informed, the installers worked hard, and everyone involved was great! Thank you to Cory, Jon, Sam, Ron, Erin. Thank you to Chad Andersen for offering a quality product. I didn't realize how loud my old furnace was or the different temperatures from room to room until this morning! I woke up to a comfortable home! The new furnace is quiet and every room is comfortable with a consistent temperature. Thank you to the Andersen Team!

plumbers.name: River City Plumbing, LLC
plumbers.address: 1125 Paramount Pkwy E, Batavia, IL 60510, USA

reviews.author: Brian Karel
reviews.text:
Our old injector pump was working but needed replacing along all the piping. Jake did an amazing job. He explained everything thoroughly along with showing what needs to be done.  Only took 1 hour. Very professional!!!!  Arrived on time.
Getting this preventive maintenance done before parts break is well worth it.
Highly recommend River City Plumbing.

Brian K

reviews.author: Michelle
reviews.text:
I am so grateful to Dustin Bradley & River City Plumbing. 5 stars for high quality work, professionalism, very fair about fees, super fast at responding and resolving the problem, and excellent clean up,!

Specifically, I contacted them to diagnosis and repair a problem with my shower & tub and toilet not properly draining.  Dustin was really fast to respond and come on site, and he knew immediately what the problem was and how to fix it.  Plus he and my technician Joseph were professional, polite and friendly when interacting with me, patient with my questions, and clearly communicated throughout the process.

Dustin went above and beyond making sure the drain line was cleared all the way out to the public lines, he was also wonderful at testing the work to be sure the problem was solved and that all was clear and clean underneath and around the house.

They also guarantee their work to be sure that you don’t have the same problem in the near future.

Thank you Dustin & River City Plumbing!

reviews.author: Susan Teska
reviews.text: This is the second time we’ve used River City Plumbing. They’re very reasonably priced, friendly, and prompt. I like that they keep you updated with texts and send a photo of the tech so you know who’s coming to your house.  No complaints here!

reviews.author: Chris Wegner
reviews.text: Danny Ramirez and his co-worker came out to clean out my shower drain and it was done quick and easy!! They also installed a new shower head i had purchased at the last minute. These guys were very nice and courteous, answered all my questions with no problem!! I will definitely hire them again!

reviews.author: Thomas Paul
reviews.text: My PTSD with plumbing companies is finally over. River City Plumbing was professional, easy to schedule an appointment with and they sent a thoughtful and focused plumber team (Conall &  Chris).  Pricing was very good and the time of service was efficient. I can now move forward with non-priority plumbing needs, because I found my plumbing team!

plumbers.name: The Fair Plumber LLC
plumbers.address: 846 N York St, Elmhurst, IL 60126, USA

reviews.author: JH
reviews.text: I had to get the line routed out between the house and the street, once that was fixed he had to repair the wax ring.   Jose was my plumber,  he was awesome!  Polite and knowledgeable.   A great smile too!  I will definitely use him again. Thank you Jose!! 😊

reviews.author: Peggy Woloszyk
reviews.text:
Our house is 100 years old. Water was backing up into our basement shower. We called 3 companies and only Fair Plumbing sent someone out that same day.

Manny used the camera and found that some clay pipes had shifted and rodding out the pipes did not clear the build up.

The next day, Manny, Anthony and Gabriel arrived. A section of the basement concrete floor needed to be jackhammered to expose the pipe. Once exposed, they also found a hole in the sewer pipe and in the drain pipe.
The clay pipes were replaced with a 10 foot PVC pipe, a new drain and two clean out traps were also installed.
Anthony and Gabriel did a great job laying the new concrete and Manny made sure to keep us informed throughout the entire project.
The team came on time, plastic was hung around the work area, they mopped the floor and did a great job cleaning up. They told us what they needed to do and they got it done. Thank you so much!

reviews.author: Ron & Yasha Talaga
reviews.text: Our toliet had been sprouting water from the tank, as well as leaking from around the bottom. Thomas and Rolando from The Fair Plumbers came out, and replaced the wax seal which was pretty much nonexistent, replaced the supply line and reconnected the valve. They were quick, thorough, and informative. The office also did a good job communicating when the plumbers were scheduled and on their way. Overall a great experience!

reviews.author: Orlando Santiago Jr
reviews.text:
Jose and Eric were INCREDIBLE!
Honest, upfront and super helpful with every option they had. They truly saved the day!  The laundry sink broke in the back and when I was unable to reach or see what the issue was i shut the main water valve off and began calling. No one was available, or they were too far away to be bothered until I reached out to The Fair Plumber. They came within an hour and handled it. Will use them again and highly recommend their services

reviews.author: Cruse Family
reviews.text: I called due to a malfunction with our pump. We had warranty with them. I called and they came out to replace it the same day at no charge. Jesus was super helpful at explaining what happened and over all we are very satisfied with the work.

plumbers.name: Restore Plumbing and Drain
plumbers.address: 1401 Timber Dr, Elgin, IL 60123, USA

reviews.author: Barbara Diepenbrock
reviews.text: Quick in and out.  Half as much as a plumbing company I've been using for years with the same product and quality.  Friendly and fast.  I believe in paying fair wages and paying what for what you get but the other guys were ridiculous for what the job is.  If I wasn't old and fat now....I could do it myself but it would take me a whole day lol!  Thank you Restore Plumbing for being accessible and affordable without losing the fantastic service and quality.

reviews.author: Mike Dudek
reviews.text:
Absolute incredible experience from start to finish with the Restore team. From my very first phone call, everything was handled professionally, clearly, and with real care. The consultation with Dave was thorough and straightforward. He took the time to explain the system, answer questions, and make sure I was comfortable with every step before moving forward.

The installation work completed by John and CJ was equally impressive. They were punctual, respectful of my home, and clearly took pride in their work. The install was clean, efficient, and well explained, and they made sure everything was working properly before they left. It is obvious this team knows what they are doing and genuinely cares about delivering a great experience, not just finishing a job.

It is rare to work with a company where every touchpoint feels this well run and thoughtful. I would give this group 1000 stars if I could. Restore has absolutely earned my long term business, and I will confidently refer them to anyone I know who needs reverse osmosis or plumbing solutions. I truly appreciated the experience and could not recommend them more highly.

reviews.author: Ula Borodzinska
reviews.text: We had Kohler Veil "smart" toilet repair (still under warranty luckily).   Jonathan was on time, super polite and professional. He quickly determined issue and fixed it perfectly. Thank you Jonathan! If needed in a future I will be calling them and requesting Jonathan's services.

reviews.author: Pat Pornsakwiwat
reviews.text: The shower had no hot water. We called Restore plumbing and drain. The woman who answered the phone was very nice. John came the next day to inspect and explain the possibilities in detail. He was extremely patient and tried to fix the problem. Finally, we had hot water running. Very happy with the service we received from John.👍👍

reviews.author: Larry Wetzel
reviews.text: This is the second big job I have had in my house plumbing-wise.  Restore has done an outstanding job from start to finish. My technician, Virginio, was absolutely fantastic on explaining everything and performing the work.  Thanks again.  Will talk to you in the future.

plumbers.name: Bulldog Plumbing, Inc.
plumbers.address: 580 S River St, Batavia, IL 60510, USA

reviews.author: Justin Clapper
reviews.text: Chris did phenomenal job. Knowledgeable and competent and worked efficiently. installed multiple redundancies to prevent the pipe from freezing, including a local water cut-off valve, a drain, and added necessary pitch to enable the pipe to drain properly. I was very impressed with his work. pro tip: have cash available if you plan to tip; i was not able to add a tip with my CC bc its not enabled with B'dogs transaction service.

reviews.author: N. Cavallaro
reviews.text: Had an excellent experience with Bulldog. Will recommend to all friends and neighbors. Quick to come out, very reasonable pricing! Plumber Chris was so great to work with. Fast and knowledgeable.

reviews.author: Marina Hinton
reviews.text: I am so glad I came across Bulldog Plumbing! We own a house in Aurora and have been looking for a go-to plumbing company. They were very no frills about the estimate via phone, and were able to send someone out to do our repair same day! The pricing was right on-par to what they provided via phone and my plumber was friendly and knowledgeable. Will certainly be calling Bulldog for future repairs!

reviews.author: julie tokars
reviews.text: I was very happy with my experience with Bulldog Plumbing.  They were very responsive with my request and had a quote and appt set within an hour.  The plumber was prompt, courteous and showed me exactly what he was going to do.  Price seemed reasonable.  I would recommend them for any project.

reviews.author: Jessica Grace
reviews.text: I could not recommend Bulldog plumbing more! They were fast and efficient, clean and respectful. They explained the scope of work to me and had incredibly fair pricing. He was even kind to my cat who wanted to get under the sink with him. They will be my go to company for all my plumbing needs. As a single woman, it is great to know I have such a reliable and respectful option for help when I need it!

plumbers.name: Jim Wagner Plumbing, Inc.
plumbers.address: 51 Eisenhower Ln S, Lombard, IL 60148, USA

reviews.author: Julie Adams
reviews.text: We were really happy with the customer service at Jim Wagner. Someone came within the hour to look at our water heater. Our plumber Kevin was awesome!! He was honest, thorough, and friendly. He was able to get our new water heater installed that day and within 3 hours. The price seemed average too. We will definitely work with them again!

reviews.author: Mike Rodak
reviews.text: They came out the day I called to evaluate the situation and provide a quote immediately.  We wound up replacing my old concrete laundry tub and galvanized pipes with a new fiberglass tub and PVC pipes, new copper, new faucet and shut off valves.  They were fast, friendly, clean, and efficient!  Highly recommend them.

reviews.author: Tim Abell
reviews.text: Had our kitchen faucet replaced.  We supplied the faucet and had Jim Wagner replace it.  Kevin was great.  Did a great job and was on his way in less than an hour.  Not knowing the cost of other plumbing services, I would say the price to replace the faucet was on the high end.

reviews.author: Rich Chiesa
reviews.text:
Kevin came out to repair a leak off our sump pump.  Not only did he fix the leak, he fixed the problem with the piping hammering when the sump pump stopped.  Kevin did a FANTASTIC job!

Kevin was transparent about pricing, he cleaned up after the job was done, and he was very courteous.  I HIGHLY recommend Jim Wagner Plumbing!

reviews.author: Kelly Toboja
reviews.text: I did a thorough review of 5 local plumbers, including taking time to read reviews/ratings, preferred local and family-owned business, quality and certifications. I plugged each into AI and selected 3 and reached out/put in a request for a call back on their website. First, Jim Wagner reached out same day (and it was a Saturday!), another one reached out 3 business days later, and the other one never reached out. I went with Jim Wagner, and I am so happy I did. They had a call off, and called to ask if I could move my appointment to a later time in the day - no problem. Christopher showed up promptly at the time promised, and he was friendly, explained everything in detail, was very transparent with cost, provided a coupon online I was not aware of, and spent a lot of time here ensuring the problem with our drain was fixed. For the record, the cost for them to come out was a little less than the others I researched, and second - I am a firm believer in you get what you pay for, but of course value has to accompany the cost, and I firmly believe it did. I would and will use them again, and will recommend them to friends and family. They have created a loyal customer in me.

plumbers.name: Residential Plumbing
plumbers.address: 155 Kirkland Cir #600, Oswego, IL 60543, USA

reviews.author: Stephanie Van Tieghem
reviews.text: If you need a plumber, call Residential Plumbing first. I had multiple plumbers out for a quote and Residential was by far the best price and did an amazing job. I had just moved into the house and the previous owner had done his own plumbing. Everything was out of code or not working. I have had Residential out 4 times in the past 2 weeks for new issues that pop up and every time they are great. I am a loyal client from now on.

reviews.author: Denise Murray
reviews.text: Residential Plumbing was recommended by a friend of mine. I called another plumber first and was very unhappy with the receptionist, who could not answer my questions and would not let me speak with a plumber. I was very pleased with Residential Plumbing. I spoke with Stacia. She answered my questions and relayed my information to the plumber. She was supposed to call me back after speaking with the plumber but perhaps forgot. I called her back the next morning. I received email confirmations and texts with a picture of the plumber prior to his arrival. When he arrived, he listened attentively and was very nice. So far, so good. Everything seems to be fixed and working great. I will definitely recommend Residential Plumbing to anyone I know.

reviews.author: Mary Anne Sorensen
reviews.text:
Residential Plumbing once again delivered outstanding service! We had a water leak in our living room ceiling, and Rob and Cade came out promptly today.  They were extremely professional, kind, and knowledgeable from start to finish.

They took the time to walk us through every step of the repair, explained what they were doing, and reassured us throughout the process. They even remembered being at our home last year when we had a leak in our laundry room ceiling—such a thoughtful touch that shows how much they care about their customers.

Rob and Cade were friendly, respectful, and truly went above and beyond. They also recommended a great company to help with the drywall repair and to work with our insurance, which was incredibly helpful.

We are very grateful for their excellent service and highly recommend Residential Plumbing to anyone needing trustworthy, professional, and dependable plumbing work!

reviews.author: Natasha Marriner
reviews.text: I discovered a back up (coming up laundry floor drain) to the house on a Sunday and left a message for Residential Plumbing.  They called me first thing Monday morning and had a team at my house within an hour.  The office texted me updates of their arrival.   The team was professional, friendly and helpful at explaining the issue and solution.  Overall fantastic experience.

reviews.author: Mark Taghap
reviews.text: Great experience from start to finish. Ken arrived on time, explained the issue clearly, and completed the work efficiently with high-quality results. Pricing was fair and transparent, with no surprises. I would definitely recommend this service to anyone needing reliable and professional plumbing work.

plumbers.name: MPT Plumbing Inc
plumbers.address: 1520 Industrial Dr, Lake in the Hills, IL 60156, USA

reviews.author: Bob Lescaleet
reviews.text:
I was impressed with the plumber Mike.  He was very knowledgeable and efficient.  Mike was on-time and finished his work without a problem.  He answered all of my questions and gave me good advise about my upcoming project with a new sink install.
All in all it was a very good experience and I would not hesitate to recommend MPT Plumbing.

reviews.author: Dave Dorocke
reviews.text: Called MPT Plumbing (Mike) to address a minor leak after a water meter replacement late last week. Since the issue occurred due the meter replacement, he not only called the city to ask about having this fixed, they directed him to the company that replaced the meter. He called, they listened to his explanation of what happened and promptly scheduled to come out the day to fix this issue. Mike is a true honest business owner that genuinely cares about his customers and goes well beyond the norm in regards to typical customer service. I am incredibly grateful to have met this good man today. Thank you for your service and insight today.

reviews.author: Gina K
reviews.text: Mike saved me from a major disaster with a sink install. He came in and took over the situation and I’m grateful for his professionalism and direction. He even set me up with other contractors to help with other needed services. Great guy. Highly recommended MPT!

reviews.author: Carol Schacherer
reviews.text:
Mike and his partner were amazing!
Very professional, very kind.
I had a big difficult job that they had to do and now it’s fixed!
I would recommend this company to everyone.

reviews.author: Brian Seng
reviews.text: The gentlemen who did the job were perfectly reasonable and professional. Clean job and did exactly as needed for a little less than I expected to come in at. MPT came recommended by 2 acquaintances, will be happy to continue that recommendation.

plumbers.name: Ex-Stink Plumbing & Sewer
plumbers.address: 19 Hillcrest Ave, Fox Lake, IL 60020, USA

reviews.author: Joe Rodriguez
reviews.text: I’m a caregiver for my mom. Had a sewer line collapse and needed to get it fixed to make sure she had what she needed. Dave and his crew were great to work with. Very professional and efficient and kind. Easy to work with. They showed up when they said they would, kept me informed and when I thought there was another issue they were quick to address it. Enjoyed working with them. 👏

reviews.author: Ruth Wojak
reviews.text:
The owner Dave came out and assessed the situation. He realized that the plumber the day before didn't do their due diligence. He called them immediately and had them out again within 20 minutes to finish what they should have finished the day before.
The job that Dave was hired to do, he explained that it needed to be done, but was probably not an emergency.  He actually called me three times after he left, to make sure that I was doing good with my present situation (which was a rusted through kitchen stack, which was now full of mud).
The guys who came and did the work were fantastic. Arrived on time. I received a text with their location, so I knew when exactly they would arrive, should they be delayed. They were courteous, quick, clean, friendly.... Can't say enough good about them.
When they left, I went down to clean the path to the work zone. They literally left the area cleaner than when they arrived. I assumed they would make a mess, so I didn't vacuum up the dust that is frequently in a basement. I also didn't clean up the mess from the basement being flooded. All was cleaned up. True, they jack hammered part of the floor out, but they also cleaned more than just the area they jackhammered.
Top notch company. I would hire them again in an instant.

reviews.author: Lindsey Idle
reviews.text:
Dave is awesome… such a good guy. I own a home bakery, so my pipes are definitely used more often than others.

I had a pretty major blockage this morning and not only did Dave come out on time but he brought all the necessary equipment as well as some preventative care for me to hold onto. He gave me great advice on how to avoid blockages in the future and made sure I knew how to use the drain treatment product to get the best results.

Honest plumbers can be hard to come by but these guys are absolutely fantastic

reviews.author: Justin Richtmyre
reviews.text:
The crew as well as the staff at the office were extremely professional and extremely helpful. They helped us achieve a workable solution for our needs. All expenses were discussed upfront so that there were no unexpected financial surprises. They communicated their arrival times via text. Our experience was top notch and we would definitely reach out to them for any needs in the future.
They dug up our broken pipe, installed new pipe, installed a sump pump which we did not have before, and poured concrete. Great job.

reviews.author: Ricardo Cedillo
reviews.text: Superb performance by all of the crew at Ex-Stink Plumbing & Sewer! I give there professionalism and attention to detail an A+. Excellent job gentlemen! I will highly recommend and pass the word on. Thanks again!

plumbers.name: H.R. Stewart Inc
plumbers.address: 52 Crystal St, Cary, IL 60013, USA

reviews.author: Mike Tate
reviews.text:
H.R. Stewart went out of their way to get a plumber to my home in less than 24hrs when my water main valves broke and needed replacing. Jimmy was great and a super nice guy! Jimmy replaced 2 old screw valves with new ball valves.
Would recommend H.R. Stewart to everyone and will definitely call them again if I need plumbing or HVAC work done.

reviews.author: Ryan Smid
reviews.text:
Eric from H.R. Stewart was incredible. My furnace stopped working in the middle of the night, and he spent nearly 30 minutes on the phone with me at 4 AM troubleshooting the issue. He was patient, thorough, and even followed up exactly at 8 AM like he promised.

We later found out Nicor had a frozen gas valve outside, so the furnace wasn’t actually faulty but Eric’s help and dedication at that hour really stood out. I’m extremely grateful and will definitely use HR Stewart for my other properties. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Judy Gitchell
reviews.text:
Cody is prompt knowledgeable and efficient. Fixed a leak under the bathroom sink. Cleaned up after the job. Bathroom looked better than before he started the job.
Have only been doing business with this company for 4 months but they are the best plumbers I’ve ever used

reviews.author: Arden Nelson
reviews.text:
He did excellent and I as a General Contractor am sincere.
I had guys onsite and we all worked together to determine best path and  Cody was key to that decision.
He walked the entire area and shared thoughts which all made sense.
Decision to put on semi hold made total sense and if needed for sure I will call you guys back and highly likely ask you to bid on future projects I may have.

Thank you

reviews.author: Dan Kennedy
reviews.text: I rely on HR S to be the reliable and professional experts for my home HVAC system and I am never disappointed.  They are very responsive on the phone and quick to be available and service my home systems issues.
