All of the personnel that come to the house know my HVAC system and will install or resolve issues expertly and with professional customer service attitude.

plumbers.name: Excellent Plumbing
plumbers.address: 785 Oakwood Rd STE E101, Lake Zurich, IL 60047, USA

reviews.author: Aaron
reviews.text: Gino and Saul were great!  They fixed a leaky/dripping shower faucet with a quick response on a Saturday and explained everything in detail.  They were able to save the fixture and in turn saved me a lot of money.  Very professional and courteous.  I would highly recommend them.

reviews.author: Antonio Castillo
reviews.text: I highly recommend Excellent Plumbing for your plumbing needs. Saul was extremely professional in his work and understood our needs perfectly. All work was done to perfection. What really impressed was their way of communication with us leading up to the day of work. Five Stars…

reviews.author: Alina P.
reviews.text: Gino and Saul did an excellent job cleaning out the main line. Before they did the hydro jetting, we had concerns that the pipes were damaged, but after Gino and Saul cleaned them, they could see that they were not damaged. We highly recommend their business!

reviews.author: Robert Fitch
reviews.text: Woke up with no hot water and the water tank leaking. Called two places. The first was a machine left message. Gino picked up on the second ring gave me a rough estimate. He did say that any variable issues would be identified on site. His team showed up 1 hours later. They did a great job, cleaned up after, and since there were no issues with the replacement, the estimate was accurate.

reviews.author: Frank Barnard
reviews.text: Called for clogged floor drain in laundry room.  Response quick.  Results successful.  Around an hour to completion.  Price not transparent and seemingly high.  Senior discount not in invoice detail.  Appealing to 'customer service' resulted in the contractor calling me up and was explained away as implied in the final amount. Clumsy and unsatisfying.  Would have potentially turned more business over to them if their pricing had been more transparent.

plumbers.name: LaCassa Plumbing | Plumber, Drain Cleaning, Sewer Repair and Tankless Water Heater Installation Naperville, IL
plumbers.address: 50 S Main St Suit 200, Naperville, IL 60540, USA

reviews.author: Susan Angus
reviews.text: Carmen and his entire staff were awesome. We had an emergency and they came out right away. We have never used LaCassa before and we are extremely happy with the work. Carmen was very detailed in explaining the work he was going to do. He was very patient with all of our questions. They finished the job in one day and cleaned up everything. Nicole was super helpful with the process with permits and a payment plan. I would recommend LaCassa 100%.

reviews.author: Tim K
reviews.text: Mike and Carmen did an amazing job! They were reasonably priced and very thorough. My basement drain was backing up from the sewer and they got everything cleared out of the main sewer line. They ran into some issues that they thought may cause problems in the future and they spent hours more than they needed to making sure everything was able to flow properly. 10 stars!

reviews.author: Jonathan La Berg
reviews.text: Mike and Carmen were both incredibly helpful in solving my issues with two toilets that needed repair. They walked me through my options after assessment and provided recommended solutions. Additionally, they completed the repairs quickly and effectively. I will definitely continue to use them going forward.

reviews.author: Carlie Martin
reviews.text: Carmen and Nick were very helpful in repairing our toilets. We had a leak in the toilets due to a faulty flap. They were detailed oriented and informative in their recommendations. They gave us recommendations on how to proceed and what next steps would be in terms of our faucet and water pressure issues. This was our second time using LaCassa (previously for a water disposal replacement) and we have been very happy with their service both times. I highly recommend LaCassa Plumbing to anyone in the area!

reviews.author: Lou Cassara
reviews.text:
Carmen always does a very complete, thorough, and professional job. We’ve worked together for years, and I wouldn’t use anyone else for my plumbing needs. You get what you
Pay for.

plumbers.name: J. Blanton Plumbing, Sewer & Drain
plumbers.address: 3406 W Elm St, McHenry, IL 60050, USA

reviews.author: Lemiell Kareem
reviews.text: Excellent service! Well priced.  My husband and I just purchased a home in the area. We had some plumbing issues that arose literally after closing. J. Blanton Plumbing was able put me on the schedule quickly. They came out early the next morning.  John,  the technician, was able to completely solve all of our issues that same day! He is knowledgeable about the job, very professional, and communicated well.  He showed me areas concern, and told me what to do to make sure the problem we had would not be back, but if it does come back, we know who to call!

reviews.author: Jon Rappoport
reviews.text: Scott was fantastic. He walked us through every step with great information and perspective. His passion for the work and helping people is so apparent, matched only by his passion for dogs! Obi enjoyed meeting Scott as much as we did. Thank you!

reviews.author: Christopher Dingman
reviews.text:
We had an issue with our sump pump in a home we moved into less than a year ago, and we contacted J. Blanton Plumbing, Sewer & Drain. Scheduling an appointment was easy, and the service charge was very reasonable—especially since it’s applied toward any work performed.
Robert Camargo came out the very next day (today) and just wrapped up his visit. He was extremely personable and genuinely a pleasure to talk with. Robert is honest, straightforward, and clearly very knowledgeable in his field. The way he explained the issue—with clear options for how to proceed and what each option would mean both now and in the future—made everything easy to understand.
His communication style, paired with his expertise, gave us a lot of confidence moving forward. We truly appreciated having someone like Robert take the time to walk us through everything so thoroughly.

reviews.author: jalen herring
reviews.text: Great service honest worker. Anthony The service technician rodded out our pipeline heading into the sewer. He was very efficient and honest about his work. I highly recommend you guys contact him specifically.

reviews.author: Lucy Pristovnik
reviews.text:
In the morning, Ronnie came to review the work we needed done. Ome of what we wanted ended up being more extensive in nature and was not needed or necessary. We agreed to just replace our toilet and faucet that we supplied. The other work required cutting into our wall which we did not want to do.
Then later in the afternoon the actual plumber came out to do the work. Brendon was very pleasant and I went over what I needed done. Took about 2 hours to complete the job and he removed the garbage so I didn’t have to put it out to the trash. He also put the sticker with the faucet model # inside my cabinet for future reference which was great.

plumbers.name: Amy Home Services
plumbers.address: 39 N Western Ave, Carpentersville, IL 60110, USA

reviews.author: René Zamora
reviews.text: I have been using AMY Home Services for 18 years !!  I currently have (3) products a water heater,  air conditioner and furnace.  Good products reasonably priced and great service.  The air conditioner and furnace come with 10 year warranties.  I’m signed up with a service agreement that covers annual inspections to keep these products under warranty.  The crew always offers great tips on what home owners can do to minimize service calls.  I’m a happy customer.

reviews.author: stephanie papaioannou
reviews.text: We have been clients with Amy Home Services for more than 10 years and have used them for electrical, HVAC plumbing. Don't think there is anything in our house they have not touched!!! Techs always reliable and get the job done. Would not consider ising anyone else! Highly recommend!!

reviews.author: Jacob Reisbich
reviews.text: Had the last thing you want during a cold wave with our boiler giving us no heat to the entire house and Justin was able to come out quickly and troubleshoot the issue. Ended up being a rather simple fix in form of a malfunctioning damper, but Justin was also able to temporarily provide heat to house while we waited for the part to arrive. When it did get here the replacement was about as quick as you could ask for and at a very reasonable price. Ended up having a circulating pump that was also on the way out and got that fixed as well. Given the age of my home and it being worked on by a good handful of contractors throughout the years Justin handled everything very professionally. My favorite part is he not only fixed our issues, but was thorough in explaining how he also detected the issues so these things can be better avoided in the future. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Kevin Sanchez
reviews.text:
I had a great experience with Amy Home Services and Jake installing my new water softener. He showed up on time, was extremely professional, and clearly knew exactly what he was doing. He took the time to explain the system and walked me through everything I needed to know.

The installation was done quickly and cleanly, with great attention to detail. Jake even cleaned up the workspace afterward, which I really appreciated. Since the install, everything has been working perfectly—I can already notice the improvement in my water!

Highly recommend Jake for anyone needing any plumbing services. He made the whole process stress-free and seamless. Great service all around!

reviews.author: Dave Snyder
reviews.text: This is not as easy as it may sound. Trevor and Jason removed the entire furnace system and replaced it in a day. Not only the outside condenser unit but the inside furnace and blower system. Trevor had noted that the size of the trunk was smaller than recommended and completely modified the system to enable a greater airflow. There were many changes to the system requirements based on updated HVAC code, which Trevor explained. In general, the overall reworking of the system was done smoothly and with hardly any change to our home system, except of course, the whole furnace and outdoor unit. Amy has done many upgrades to our home and my Wife and I are very pleased with the work that was done in the past as well as this particular upgrade.

plumbers.name: Tom's Plumbing Inc
plumbers.address: 130 Tefft Ave, Elgin, IL 60120, USA

reviews.author: Rudy Galfi
reviews.text: Tom’s Plumbing did an absolutely amazing job relocating my water heater, adding a hot water recirculating pipe and motor, and installing a Moen Flo water protection system. The quality of workmanship was excellent—efficient, clean, and clearly skilled. Best of all, the estimate was very reasonable for the scope of work performed. Highly recommend Tom’s Plumbing for anyone looking for quality and reliability!

reviews.author: Diana
reviews.text: I had a great experience with Tom’s Plumbing. Bob kept a clean, organized workspace throughout the entire job. During the inspection, Bob was patient and took the time to thoroughly explain each concern I had, making sure I fully understood the work that needed to be done. I’m very pleased with the quality of service and the work completed at my home, and I would not hesitate to recommend him.

reviews.author: Joe Bayer
reviews.text: Bob from Tom’s plumbing helped replace galvanized pipe coming from my main that was starting rust and drip. Bob went above and beyond on the job, was quick, and was very respectful. The estimate from Tom’s plumbing was by far the best out of the 5 plumbers I asked estimates for. I will definitely contact them again in the future when I need something done.

reviews.author: Patricia Davis
reviews.text:
I have used Tom's Plumbing for three different jobs. I live in an older townhome and thigs are starting to wear out.
They are professional, dependable, qualified and each job has been done
within a good time frame, attention to detail including to my home. I am more than pleased with their work, pricing and dependability. This time they replaced the Ejector Pump and the Hot Water Heater.
I can confidentially give this great review because several years I had work done by another company and it was a terrible experience.
Tom's is the BEST!!!!

reviews.author: Joseph Bajek
reviews.text: Tom's Plumbing sent out a professional to install my toilet within a few days. Bob was very professional and did a great job. Total time was about 2 hours. Would recommend service.

plumbers.name: JCB Plumbing, LLC
plumbers.address: 1099 Brown St STE 201, Wauconda, IL 60084, USA

reviews.author: Judy Billings
reviews.text: Roger Tinajero made sure everything was working well—and gave us next steps, if there is more trouble with the sewer backup, and for peace of mind.  Great work.  He is thorough and personable.

reviews.author: Michael Dahlgren
reviews.text:
I had a great experience with JCB Plumbing. Our water heater went out, and they handled the replacement quickly and professionally.

Roger did an awesome job! He was efficient, knowledgeable, and made sure everything was running perfectly before he left.

reviews.author: Jennifer Gallien
reviews.text: Outstanding service from JCB Plumbing! I was super nervous calling a plumber for a sudden leak coming from our guest bathroom and falling through our kitchen ceiling.  I called JCB plumbing because of the many positive reviews that I found on Facebook and Google.  What a great decision! This company answered right away and scheduled a call within two hours that same day. Our service technician, Jake, was extremely knowledgeable, honest, and professional. Jake explained everything in detail so that I understood what was broken and what needed to be fixed.  He was truly kind and honest.  I felt that he was there to help, rather than worrying about being taken advantage of with quotes of unnecessary work.  Thank you, Jake!! Fair pricing and high-quality work. Highly recommend to anyone needing a reliable plumber! Thank you, JCB Plumbing.  We will make sure to spread the word!!!

reviews.author: Abigail Cornish
reviews.text: I greatly appreciated JCB Plumbing’s same day service.  The plumber was professional, thorough and friendly.  He took his time to explain everything before and after.  The hot water heater was fixed quickly with no disruptions, and the service charge was reasonable. I recommend them for their expertise, friendliness and quick response time.

reviews.author: Samantha Turzynski
reviews.text:
JCB Plumbing really did a quality job and they are totally a reputable company!  I had a problem with my plumbing not draining and Kyle spent hours assessing the issue.  It was unfortunately an outdoor drainage issue!  The entire team was respectful of my home, my landscaping and me!  I never felt uncomfortable or like I was being gouged.  I added the replacement of the water heater while they were there for the sewer and everything was done at the same time, by different plumbers!  The entire crew worked to finish the jobs, a real testament to the team work!  No detail was too small for the crew members to help each other with, including the resolution!

Thank you to the entire team for doing a fantastic job and for being so respectful of my home!

plumbers.name: A&W Plumbing, Inc.
plumbers.address: 1420 E Algonquin Rd Box 385, Algonquin, IL 60102, USA

reviews.author: Tyler Sullivan
reviews.text: I highly recommend A&W Plumbing! Matt did a great job from start to finish! We were in need of a water softener and installation and Matt was able to come out on very short notice to help us determine the best solution for our home. With the limited space we had available, it was determined that our best option was to install the unit in the crawl space. He helped us choose a unit - making sure that it wouldn't be too tall while also fitting within our crawl space access point. Matt's attention to detail and craftsmanship was exactly what the job called for. I am extremely pleased with the results and look forward to working with him again for any and all of my future plumbing needs.

reviews.author: J Schmidt
reviews.text:
Called Matt on Saturday, found my water heater was leaking pretty bad.  He swung bye on Sunday and confirmed the tank was compromised and that we'd need to wait until Monday to replace.

Gave me a call at 7:30 am first thing with a quote, price was amazing, well under quotes I got from other larger plumbing companies.  He showed up around 10:30am with the new water heater and  left shortly after 1pm.

Matt is a great guy, great service, and even corrected issues the previous plumber had done like over tight fittings.  Matt does an amazing job, this is my second time having him over, the previous effort was to repair my Ejector pump that failed.

A++ job, Five stars all the way.

reviews.author: Sean Patrick
reviews.text: A&W is FANTASTIC AND Matt is great reliable owner. Very friendly and professional and at a very reasonable price. Takes pride in his work as he is the owner. Always on time, and communication is fantastic. He has replaced my water heater, replaced whole house shut off valve, as well as other plumbing issues. A&W is the only plumber I call these days. Great business.

reviews.author: Marie Beusse
reviews.text: I had a great experience with Matt he was very quick to respond to my call. He arrived on time and immediately diagnosed my problem. The repair was done efficiently and at a very fair price. It is hard to find such an honest and dependable service these days. I will definitely call him again for any plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Brendan Gillespie
reviews.text: I needed to have some shower/tub fixtures replaced so Matt from A&W came out to work on it. The new set looks good and works good with no leaks. He also inspected some of the other plumbing features of the house and took care of a pipe on the water heater that was not positioned right. Overall I am satisfied with the work. Thank you!

plumbers.name: ASAP Plumbing
plumbers.address: 1258 N Rose Farm Rd Unit 1, Woodstock, IL 60098, USA

reviews.author: Kevin Crown
reviews.text: The technician showed up within the time window ASAP advised. He was courteous and ready to work. He stayed until the entire job was complete and knowledgeable, he answered all of our questions. We had a tankless water heater installed, a whole house sediment filtration system installed, shut off valve replaced, and reverse osmosis drinking water system installed.

reviews.author: Gitlin Law Firm
reviews.text: We have been very happy with ASAP Plumbing for all of our needs. We’ve used them for both general repairs and plumbing issues, and they have consistently delivered excellent service. They are always prompt, professional, and pleasant to deal with. We truly appreciate their reliability and highly recommend them.

reviews.author: Steven McCarty
reviews.text: Lucas was very professional and installed the water heater within a couple of hours. He went over the install details and how long it would take. When finished with the install, he explained maintenance and warranty. He cleaned up everything including disposal of the old unit. His work was very clean and demonstrated there were no gas leaks to set me at ease. I am very happy with the process and the price. I highly recommend ASAP Plumbing.

reviews.author: Nicole Leconte
reviews.text:
ASAP has been wonderful to work with! From Alex, who I initially  cumminicated with regarding my hot water heater, getting a quote, and scheduling a plumber, Olivia after hours, and finally Max who installed the water heater. They were very efficient and got everything handled in a very short turnaround time (next day).
In addition, Max is extremely knowledgeable, helpful, and professional. I am pleased with the removal and installation he performed and he patiently answered all of my questions. Overall, they ALL are very friendly and empathetic which truly helps when dealing with plumbing emergencies that always seem to happen at the worst times. I would not hesitate to use them again. I
strongly recommend their services!

reviews.author: Bethany Bellavia
reviews.text: Jon came out and gave me an estimate and explained everything to me. He was accessible and personable through the entire process. Keifer & Bryce are the plumbers that completed the work and they did phenomenal! We had a transitional hot water heater replaced with a tankless in addition to repiping and moving our water softener. They did it all and were at my house ALL day. They were professional, kind, and answered my questions. I highly recommend ASAP!

plumbers.name: J. Blanton Plumbing, Sewer & Drain
plumbers.address: 200 S Main St Suite 3, Naperville, IL 60540, USA

reviews.author: Steve Johnson
reviews.text:
We opened up our finished basement to do some remodeling, and found the main gas line on the floor, badly corroded, as a result of continuous water intrusion. (You can see the corroded gas line in the first photo-basically a ticking time bomb!)

Shane from J Blanton came out, worked with us on the quote, and Edwin and Peter were scheduled within two days. It was a tricky route for the new pipe - tying into an offset T, moving the new pipe up higher (obviously), avoiding PVC drains, sump pump discharges, and electrical conduit.  They were friendly, efficient, and did great work - photos of the finished product below.

reviews.author: Laxman Jitarwal
reviews.text: Alex Cruz from J. Blanton Plumbing did an excellent job i specifically requested an early appointment and he arrived right on time around 8:30 AM, which I really appreciated he worked very hard for almost 4 to 5 hours straight and handled everything professionally. My water wasn’t running at all, and Alex stayed focused until he fully fixed the issue and got the water running again in my house he was knowledgeable, and clearly cared about doing the job right. You can tell he puts real effort into his work. I’m very satisfied with the service and would definitely recommend Alex Cruz and J. Blanton Plumbing to anyone

reviews.author: Joan Ralph
reviews.text:
If I could have given this company ZERO stars or negative stars that would have been my rating.  NEVER do business with this company!!!!!!!!!  They lie repeatedly about their service calls and are EXTREMELY expensive for what they do!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!  I have NEVER dealt with a worse company in my life!!!!!!
I just needed a valve replacement under my sink for a new dishwasher to be installed.  I talked to J. Blanton Plumbing and scheduled the work to be done the following week on a Tuesday.  The dishwasher was being installed the next day.  On Tuesday, a plumber wearing a "pretty" J. Blanton sweatshirt shows up NOT to do the work but to upsell me on having more plumbing work done!!!!  I told him he just needs to get the valve replaced as I was promised and he responds that he just drives a shell of a truck and has no repair equipment!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!  And that they would send a plumber out the next day which is when the dishwasher is coming!!!!!!!!!!!  After I pointed that out, I was promised a plumber at 8:00 a.m. Wednesday morning and got my delivery pushed back as much as they could on Wednesday.  The pretty sweatshirt knew that the work requirements were and I was promised the plumber would be here.  I even called 3x later on Tuesday to ensure they would stand behind their commitment.  Well, it's now Wednesday and no plumber showed at 8.  I called again at 8:50 and was told they would send someone over right away.  I called at 9:30 as no plumber yet and was told I was someone's next stop but they couldn't tell me when that would be!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!  My dishwasher delivery window is 10 - 2!!!!!  And this worthless, lying company knew this.
BOTTOM LINE:  Do not do business with them as it will be greater headaches that your current plumbing issues.  There are many good, reliable plumbers out there - J. Blanton is NOT ONE OF THEM!!!!!!!

reviews.author: irish
reviews.text: Cameron our plumber was just Awesome!! He worked like a machine and was very organized in how he went about the repairs.(I’m a Union Carpenter so I can relate!)He also KNEW HIS STUFF! And he was very personable and polite! I’d use him again for sure!👍👍

reviews.author: Charlie Benson
reviews.text: Ronnie came to take a detailed look and give me estimates on preventative maintenance. He was polite and thorough, shared his observations, explained options, and answered questions. They have great service tech, and the whole process was quick and seamless.

plumbers.name: 1-Tom-Plumber
plumbers.address: 9200 Pyott Rd, Lake in the Hills, IL 60156, USA

reviews.author: Cordell Walker
reviews.text:
I had a wonderful experience with 1-Tom-Plumber from start to finish. They answered my call right away after I discovered my old water heater was leaking, which honestly caught me off guard since it was only about 8 years old. I had a big bulky 75-gallon Richmond power-vent water heater, and by the time I noticed the issue, water was leaking throughout my basement.

To make matters worse, some of my existing plumbing lines were already corroded and beginning to leak as well. I went a full week without hot water while trying to figure out the best long term solution, which was incredibly stressful.

When 1-Tom-Plumber came out, they were professional, knowledgeable, and took the time to explain all of my replacement options without pressure. After talking it through, I decided to upgrade to a tankless “endless hot water” system. I’m so glad I did.

The new system works amazingly well. I never run out of hot water, and unlike traditional systems, it doesn’t require a specific hard-water softener, so I didn’t have to invest in an additional water softening system. It also doesn’t require costly yearly flushes, which was a huge plus for me.

On top of that, the system comes with a 15-year manufacturer warranty and is made right here in America, which gave me even more confidence in my decision. The workmanship was truly top-notch, the installation was clean, and everything was explained clearly along the way.

I’m extremely happy with my experience and the upgrade. If you’re dealing with water heater issues or considering going tankless, I highly recommend 1-Tom-Plumber. They made a stressful situation so much easier and delivered excellent results.

reviews.author: Cy Nick
reviews.text: What I thought was a simple laundry clog turned out to be a much larger sewer job. Even though Justin was slotted for what was probably a fast job, he was still able to quickly adapt thanks to being incredibly prepared and having everything he could need in his truck, didn't have to run out for parts or tools even once. Got me back up and running quickly and expertly, highly recommend!

reviews.author: Kristina
reviews.text: I would absolutely recommend this company and its valuable employee Eric!  He was here within 2 hours (Sunday am at 7) for a leak in the garage ceiling.  Eric was professional and patient in answering our questions and very knowledgeable….for a cubs fan 😂.  He fixed the issue! I would absolutely recommend this company again

reviews.author: jose lopez
reviews.text: The place to call for sure , came home and my ceiling was about to cave in, called them and  they were here in the blink of an eye. Justin did an excellent job and was done in less than 20 minutes. Super friendly and professional.

reviews.author: Peter Bilik
reviews.text: Our tankless water heater froze during the recent subzero temperatures, causing the system to burst and we completely lost hot water. We have a 10 month old baby at home and it was a really tough spot to be in. 1-Tom-Plumber was recommended to us through a local community page and we gave them a shot. Eric was an absolute delight to work with, straightforward, and gave us multiple options not just equipment types but ways to pay. Moises, the owner was also very accommodating and they were all able to get us our hot water back in no time. The install looks clean and professional. They saved us during this big freeze. Thank you Eric!

plumbers.name: Crystal Clear Plumbing
plumbers.address: 820 McArdle Dr, Crystal Lake, IL 60014, USA

reviews.author: Joe How
reviews.text:
Pedro arrived within 1 hour on a Monday morning after I called for a leak investigation. He is very knowledgeable and thoughtful during the troubleshooting process, and quickly identified the source of the leak. Despite it's in a very tight location between walls, Pedro demonstrated his skill and experience by adapting to the situation and fixing the leak. His work is very neat and he kept the site very clean.

Such a good experience with Crystal Clear, and their pricing is reasonable. Will call them again for my future plumbing need.

reviews.author: B McG
reviews.text:
We once again hired Crystal Clear Plumbing when our water heater failed us. Jared and Sonny did a wonderful job! I'm glad we found a plumber that we can trust. They do a great job at a fair price and are very respectful of our home. They also installed our kitchen sink and faucet when we installed new counters, as well as a utility sink in our basement. (See review below) Jared takes time to explain everything he and his crew are doing. We really appreciate him! We love Crystal Clear Plumbing!

We hired Crystal Clear Plumbing to install a kitchen sink and faucet after having countertops installed in our kitchen, as well as a utility sink in our basement. Jared came out to give us an estimate. Crystal Clear's pricing was fair, as we received two other estimates for the work. We liked Jared best right from the start. He explained everything that needed to be done. He showed up when he promised and he treated our home as if it was his. We are so grateful we found Crystal Clear Plumbing. If we ever need anything done with our plumbing I will always call Crystal Clear. And I will definitely request Jared! He has wonderful work ethics. I did meet other members of his team who also seemed nice...Pedro, Scott, and another gentleman, but I can't remember his name. All were very kind. Thank you Jared!

reviews.author: Austin Voeller
reviews.text: Scott & Sonny were great! Came out next day to replace our water heater. We’re quick, efficient and clean. Would recommend Crystal Clear Plumbing!

reviews.author: Kevin Ciganek
reviews.text: Scott did an outstanding job running the new plumbing drain for my kitchen sink. His work is very neat, clean and looks great. He was very efficient with his time and explained everything very well.  He also provided some guidance and advice on a couple other projects that I am looking to do, so that is always nice as well. Pricing was reasonable and I'll definitely use this company again for any gas line or plumbing projects in the future.

reviews.author: Eric B
reviews.text: Great experience with Crystal Clear Plumbing. They replaced our water heater quickly and did a professional job. Efficient and easy to work with and I really appreciated their straightforward, transparent pricing

plumbers.name: Titan Plumbing & Drain Services
plumbers.address: 1830 Wallace Ave STE 217, St. Charles, IL 60174, USA

reviews.author: Jessie Zepeda
reviews.text: Absolutely wonderful we are happy with Titan. We were pretty much in a jam not only one clog. We had three clogs in our master bedroom and our kitchen and in our laundry room. I know nothing about Plumbing or how to find somebody so I went on the Internet. I found about 10 plumbers and I checked for reviews, after talking to a few plumbers some of them absolutely were scared to work at my home so that terrified me and my wife we didn’t think we’re gonna find any Plumber since we had an old home, wow when I got to tighten I told him I need somebody very experience they sent out Dave, not only did he make us feel calm and cool. He said will be able to do the job. He didn’t turn it down. He actually went over everything with the Plumbing with us and sat down with us and told us what it was our option we said let’s just get it all done so he came on a Saturday not only did he fix one room, but he was able to fix all three rooms my laundry room, my master bedroom and my kitchen. Our plumbing is running great better than before and trust me. Our pipes were really bad so I wanna take Titan and Dave especially for helping us out when we really need them not only do I recommend them. They’re the only people we’re gonna use for our Plumbing trust me if I can give them 10 stars I will let me tell you this they’re pricing was unbelievable. We can afford it. Me and my wife are on a budget. Tighten worked with us. He went over every job and how much it was gonna be. I appreciate that.

reviews.author: Michael Trejo
reviews.text: Out of the 4 places I called this morning they were the only ones that had a person actually pick up the phone. Schedule a service call for the afternoon but I was able to finally unclog my toilet. I called the cancel and it was smooth with no pressure for them to still come out. If I ever have a plumbing issue I will be coming to Titan.

reviews.author: Timo Lyons
reviews.text: Titan always delivers. I went down to my basement New Year’s Eve and found my hot water heater leaking. A quick call to Titan and they had a plumber out to my place within 2 hours and a new water heater installed shortly after. They were professional, tidy and skilled. I highly recommend these guy!!

reviews.author: matt trinidad
reviews.text: Worked with titan plumbing since we moved into the house and they have been amazing. Recently added a clean out since out house didn’t have one and it’s made fixing any plumbing problems a breeze. david was on site doing amazing work and thoroughly explained the issue and what the options are. Pam was great at coordinating any updates that would come up and wanted to make sure that my plumbing problems were no more. highly recommend.

reviews.author: Janice Holland
reviews.text: Titan came out quickly when our sump pump went out. Lou was very professional and answered all our questions. He gave us all our options and the prices so we could choose the sump pump we wanted. Many plumbers just give one option, and that’s what they install. That is what our old plumber did. Lou patiently trained an apprentice plumber that day, even though they were very busy. Lou came back again to install a new backup pump and used a special camera to check our drain tile which also needs work. It was backing up during the heavy rain. This is a really good plumbing company. I would definitely use them again. The company we always used told us to get someone else because they were too busy that day due to heavy rains. Titan is so helpful and cares about the quality of service they provide to their customers.

plumbers.name: Air Man Heating, Cooling & Plumbing (Air Management Services Inc)
plumbers.address: 1030 Greenlee St, Marengo, IL 60152, USA

reviews.author: Robert Koehler
reviews.text:
I had a fantastic experience with the team for my new AC and whole-home humidifier installation. They also installed a smart thermostat for me and took the time to make sure I was comfortable using it before they left. From the initial booking to the completion of the project, the entire process was seamless.
The crew was professional, arrived right on schedule, and did an incredible job cleaning up, you wouldn’t even have known they were there. It’s rare to find such high-quality service, technical expertise, and genuine attention to detail. I am thrilled with how the new system is running and would highly recommend them to anyone in the Woodstock, IL area looking for high-quality HVAC work.

reviews.author: Crystal Levy
reviews.text: I recently had some home improvements done, including a new water heater in the bathroom vent/light installation and I couldn’t be happier with the experience from start to finish. The team was outstanding Rosa who scheduled everything was incredibly helpful, kind and flexible. She made the whole process, smooth and stress-free. Every crew member who came to my home was professional, courteous, and respectful. They worked efficiently answered all my questions and made sure everything was done right the quality of the work exceeded my expectations and I felt completely comfortable having them in my home.  The entire crew was fantastic! I Highly recommend this group to anyone looking for reliable high-quality home service they made the process easy and the results speak for themselves

reviews.author: Areil Eckardt
reviews.text:
Amazing. 10 out of 10!!
Bought a new water heater and had it installed today. Andy and Asa showed up just after 8:30 am and were done by 11:15am.
Let me tell you, I was dealt the dream team! They were so professional, friendly and personable.
We just bought our townhouse and only rented prior so I guess you could say this was my first rodeo "Adulting". I didn't know what to expect and they made the whole process feel so seamless. I highly recommend this company and these techs for all your heating, cooling, and plumbing needs.
Its inevitable that I will need their services again in the future. I will 1000% be calling them first!

reviews.author: Philip Smith
reviews.text: We use AirMan because their team is knowledgeable and professional. They maintain both our ac and baseboard heat/boiler.  Most recently they addressed an issue with our high efficiency heater was whistling. The team stayed highly engaged while resolving the issue and kept us informed. I would definitely recommend them.

reviews.author: Luna Moon
reviews.text: Joe and Jose did a lovely job! Quick, courteous, and professional. Rosa in the office is so nice! An absolutely pleasant experience to set up an appointment. These vents were so gross but after Airman cleaned them, I'm confident my allergies and health will improve dramatically! 10/10 will hire again.

plumbers.name: Journeymen Plumbing and Sewer LLC
plumbers.address: 30W270 Butterfield Rd Unit 117, Warrenville, IL 60555, USA

reviews.author: Michael Snyder
reviews.text: I called Journeymen plumbing out for some dishwasher and tub leaking issues, both of which they were able to accurately diagnose and troubleshoot, resulting in both issues being fixed. Over the phone I talked with Caleb who was very pleasant and professional to talk with, and then Noah was the technician that arrived to the house. Noah was also very pleasant, communicative, and easy to talk with. He walked through all the steps of the repair with us before doing it, and very nicely showed us the problems and what needed to be fixed. Overall, I was very happy with our experience with the company!

reviews.author: Barone's
reviews.text: The plumber we have had servicing us for years recently retired.  Journeyman Plumbing was suggested to us, and we have had them out several times within the last month to help with a few plumbing issues.  Caleb the owner has been wonderful to work with. We have received call backs promptly and the work they have done has been clean and efficient.  Happy we have found another great plumber to call for our needs.  Highly recommended.

reviews.author: Lilah Rabe
reviews.text: Our sewer had backed up. Caleb came out quickly, cleared the problem, and provided us with a great video of our pipes all the way to the connection with the city sewer. Great service at a very reasonable price. We have our new plumber for any future plumbing work!

reviews.author: K M
reviews.text: We contacted Journeymen Plumbing and received a call back from Caleb the same day.  He was very professional and friendly and booked an appointment for the following day. Kyle unclogged the kitchen sink drain and fixed a low pressure faucet. He was very knowledgeable, professional and listened. He covered the floor before setting his equipment down, which I really appreciated. His work was high quality at a very fair price. I will definitely use their service again.

reviews.author: Lisa Miller
reviews.text:
Excellent service!  Noah was very knowledgeable.  He not only explained what was wrong but how it would be fixed.  He also gave me some very important information on our water heater pipes (we have 2 water heaters) that could affect our health due to new EPA changes.  He was here for over 2 hrs. the cost was $650.
We will definitely call to have him come again & will also use them for plumbing issues at our business.

Thankyou for the prompt, informative, & reasonable cost to resolve to our issues.

Lisa M.

plumbers.name: J. Blanton Plumbing, Sewer & Drain
plumbers.address: 2390 Esplanade Dr #200f, Algonquin, IL 60102, USA

reviews.author: Amanda J P Dunakin
reviews.text: Edgar (main plumber and contact), Johnny and Colten (excavators), and the team who installed the pipe lining for us (Liam and Richard) were all amazing! We had an emergency sewer overflow with a hole in our pipe and a blockage. They fixed it, helped us understand what was happening and why, and were able to help us navigate some additional preventative sewer lining to save us from a much bigger disaster down the road. They were friendly, and when offering services they didn't put pressure on us to say yes. We would definitely recommend the team at J. Blanton!

reviews.author: Jerome Austriaco
reviews.text: Scott was great with educating me on possible sewage issues - fortunately, none - and found that we needed other maintenance that he was able to help with. Their “unclogs for dogs” program illustrates the character of this company…

reviews.author: Alexis Black
reviews.text: I recently had a great experience with J Blanton! I called to have them check out a possible small gas leak (not an emergency). They were able to send someone that week. My inspector, Jacob, was very friendly and knowledgeable and presented different options as we made a service plan for the following day. My technician who performed the work, Welhem (Will), was awesome. He did great work, explained everything, and answered all of my questions. This is the first time I have worked with the company, and based on my experience I highly recommend them. Thank you!

reviews.author: Alexis Farrar
reviews.text: Lou is such a great worker. Found the problem with my shower and went great lengths to make sure everything was perfect/fixed and to my satisfaction before leaving. Lou is very knowledgeable and such a pleasant person. I am grateful he was able to fix my shower. Ask for Lou if you need any work done from this company.

reviews.author: Sandra Shore
reviews.text: Scott evaluated all our plumbing repair needs and provided a cost estimate. He did a good job explaining why the repairs are important and necessary. Scott was friendly and easy to work with answering all our questions.

plumbers.name: Flotek Plumbing
plumbers.address: 608 S 1st St, St. Charles, IL 60174, USA

reviews.author: Betsy Wassilak
reviews.text: This review is long overdue. We have used Flotek for a couple years now and in a couple houses. They are always very responsive. Of course things always seem to happen over the weekend. No problem with Flotek. They always respond and will even let you know if it is urgent or can wait. They have replaced an ejector pump, removed an old battery back up and replaced our toilet fill valve and flapper. They seem reasonably priced but I am a believer in sometimes you get what you pay for! Professional and friendly service every time! Thanks Henry and Gabriel!

reviews.author: Cheryl Taylor
reviews.text: A backup in the sewage pipes at my place of business left my customers without a bathroom. I called Flotek at 9:00 a.m., the problem was cleared up by noon the same day! They were happy to speak with my septic guy to gather all info beforehand and find the best solution to my problem. Prices were given ahead of time. Very nice guys, will use again- but hopefully not too soon ;)

reviews.author: Joe Kuryla
reviews.text: I just had a water softener replaced, and about a year ago I had a water heater replaced in the winter around the holidays.  High quality work, easy to get scheduled, great products, and reasonable prices.  Flotek has become my go-to company for plumbing work.

reviews.author: J Matthews
reviews.text: We hired Flotek Plumbing to replace a hot water heater, install a garbage disposal, run a new water line for our refrigerator, and install a new primary sump pump along with a battery backup.  Flotek was very professional and responsive from the initial meeting for the estimate through the completion of the project.  They were prompt and came prepared.  They completed all the work in one day.  Once the installations were complete, Gabriel spent some time going over everything with me.  I have to say, the quality of their sump pumps is fantastic, they are very quiet.  All in all I highly recommend Flotek for any plumbing needs you may have.

reviews.author: victor Vukovich
reviews.text:
Our toilet would not drain properly.
Upon arrival, Gabriel quickly confirmed the main line was clogged.
Wrote up a proposal and explained in detail what was wrong and what needed to be done. No BS. No extraneous explanation.

Yes, an expensive repair but the pricing was fair and the tech was HIGHLY professional and thorough. Plus, per our request, Flotek arrived within less than an hour after we called.

plumbers.name: Hansen Heating, Plumbing & Air
plumbers.address: 11910 Smith Ct, Huntley, IL 60142, USA

reviews.author: mark cichy
reviews.text:
The Hansen technician, Bruce, called ahead and arrived on time to replace old water heater. They were very careful of home walls, etc... in swapping out the old and bringing in the new heater to basement. I had some additional shut off valves put in for fridge and furnace humidifier. They did a great job per my final inspection. Both gentlemen were very polite and eager to answer all my questions. We plan to use them again come fall of 2026 to replace our basement ejector pump.
Mark & Deb C. Hampshire, IL

reviews.author: Jim Bockmier
reviews.text: They were just the best ever. Our furnace was emitting a weird smell. Secondary heating exchange failed. We were extremely lucky that Hansen’s was so thorough in their diagnostic skills. Gave us multiple options, explained what had gone wrong and showed us, cleaned up after themselves and were very pleasant. They stayed until 8:45 to complete the job. Everything was done expertly at a fair price and major repair completed in one day so that we did not go without heat on a cold winter night

reviews.author: Suzy Q
reviews.text: You can always count on Hansen Heating & Plumbing for quality work and fair pricing. I’ve been their customer for over 10 years and fully trust what they diagnose as the problem. They provide complete estimates, quick response, and have kept my 50-year old home safe from water damage that can lead to even more costly repairs.

reviews.author: Geoff Yu
reviews.text:
Horrible business. Expensive and don't back their own work. Had a backup and they were supposed to address the issues permanently. The exact issue happened again about 40 days later and they told us they only warranty their work for 30 days. A waste $715. The gentlemen on the phone was also rude and impatient when we called back.

The techs were not through, skilled, and definitely not professional. Even paid extra for the useless inspection camera and they were unable to locate the clog or issue.

Hansen should be ashamed of themselves. Don't spend your hard earned money on this company. Plenty of decent plumbers out there.

reviews.author: Richard Hane
reviews.text: Super clogged toilet.  We tried everything including using Dawn soap method.  Nothing worked.  Called Hansen, they were here in  less than an hour.  Brought in the auger and fixed our problem in less than an hour.  Great work.  I would highly recommend them to anyone.

plumbers.name: Ability Septic
plumbers.address: 801 N Raddant Rd, Batavia, IL 60510, USA

reviews.author: Cindy Rohde
reviews.text: I highly recommend Ability Septic. They did a great job. They were timely, polite, and knowledgeable. They even came out to shorten a sewage pipe that was too close to an electrical box w/o any charge. Prices are comparable if not a slight but less than other companies. They are family -owned and have been serving our area for at least 30 years (which is as long as we have used them).

reviews.author: Dennis Wacker
reviews.text:
Just put a call into Ability and they are running 100% for answering the phone with a speaking, helpful human being.
IMAGINE THAT!
Ability installed a new system for us last fall, upgraded the tank size and discharge piping (an old tech pipe material was near failure..good catch by them) and I needed to get a bead on the first pump out timing.
Turns out the larger 1500g tank was a great idea, as LIFE happened with the birth of a new citizen last May making for a much busier household.
You can find larger companies and enjoy their robotic phone systems or you can call Ability and work with folks who show their pride and professionalism in the conduct of business.
So rewarding to find a supplier that TRIES to work with you and satisfy needs in an informed dialogue instead getting bounced around searching for the right person.
No matter who picked up the phone...pertinent answers were the result.  Ability folks know their business well and care about it, but more importantly, they CARE ABOUT their customers!!

reviews.author: Noe Lopez
reviews.text: Ive been using them for years , their employees very respectful and courteous of your property. Had 2 guys come out today to clean my septic. Professional and on-time ill recommend to family and friends  10/10

reviews.author: Bob Runge
reviews.text: We use Ability every two or three years.  Very courteous staff, answer all our questions and suggest proper maintenance.  Fair prices and prompt scheduling.  5 stars for over 35 years at our location.

reviews.author: Kurt Breitlander
reviews.text: Missed our request for service over July 4th, but made up for it by getting us on the schedule asap without charging an emergency fee. Did great work, and applied a discount code without us requesting. Would recommend using them if you have any septic issues.

plumbers.name: Helton Plumbing Hero
plumbers.address: 1217 Blackhawk Ave, McHenry, IL 60051, USA

reviews.author: Ben Isaacs
reviews.text:
We were in the process of having a bathroom remodeled, and just our luck, our water heater goes out. I was recommended to contact Helton Plumbing by our contractors. I spoke with the owner, Jeremy, who was very helpful in my time of panic. Jeremy was able to give me the information about upgrading to different types of water heaters: tankless, tanked and power vent. What I appreciated was the upfront tasks required to install each one, as well as the pros and cons of each unit. We ended up going with the Navian tankless water heater. I've included pictures of the before and after.

Carey was my technician for the project. I cannot say enough about how magnificent Carey was. Answered all my questions, explained the process, gave me insight on the new product (including gas use, electrical use, rebate possibilities, etc). Additionally, Carey completed this entire task by himself, wasting no time to get the project going - it was an all day task. Carey even recommended a type of recirculation valve in the primary bathroom that will help to heat the primary bathroom faster (it is the furthest away from the water heater, so historically the shower took 60+ seconds to get hot). The recirculation valve and new water heater have the primary bathroom hot in under 10 seconds. It is sorcery.

I am very pleased with the service. Words can't explain how much we are enjoying the new water heater and the constant hot water. Also, the floor space that it opened up is monumental too. I will say that to go from a tank to tankless, it is an investment. It is expensive to make the change. It is definitely worth it - high efficient appliance, lower gas bill and constant hot water. We have young children and always worried about those 'hot pockets' of water in a tank water heater burning one of our kids. The tankless is so consistent I wish our Chicago Bears would take note. Overall, couldn't be happier with how it turned out. If you are on the market for a new water heater, consider Helton Plumbing. They fixed my issue entirely in one day!

reviews.author: Georgia Kelly
reviews.text: I came home from vacation to a leaking pipe and puddle of water on the floor. Helton was able to come within a couple of hours. Carey immediately put my mind at ease. He diagnosed the problem and explained it to me with a photo. He gave me an estimate before he began the work. He had everything he needed to replace the cracked piece of pipe and worked efficiently and professionally. He was friendly and courteous. This was the second time I’ve used Helton and have been 100% satisfied. Julie who took my call was great also.

reviews.author: Robert
reviews.text:
We have used Helton plumbing many times over the years for various issues (water heater and other pipe related problems)
They always do an excellent job. Yesterday they replaced three toilets in our house. Their tech arrived on time and looked over our problems and gave me two options to solve it. One- to rebuild the toilet ( new parts) or two- to replace the entire fixture. We opted for replacement. He had to pick up the fixtures an hour away and then come back to begin. One man on his own and he removed and replaced all three units in three hours. After removing one of the toilets he found a broken flange that needed replacing. And he was equipped for that too.
He removed the toilets and wrapped each one in plastic so nothing dropped on our floors.
He arrived on time and did the job quickly and cleanly. He took the old toilets and all of the cartons and garbage left over from the install to dispose of. If I could give them more than five stars I would.

reviews.author: Bill Spelman
reviews.text: We are relatively new to the area and found ourselves in need of a plumber. I like to shop local and found Helton Plumbing had a lot of happy customers. Unfortunately we now live in a time of horrible customer service, however, Helton is the exception. They are extremely knowledgeable, polite, prompt, affordable and the finished job was done to perfection. I will not hesitate to use them again. Thank You Helton for supplying good old fashion customer service

reviews.author: Kevin
reviews.text: Have used Helton for a while for jobs ranging from hot water heater repair, frozen pipes, and one off needs. They give straight forward honest quotes and do great work. Would highly recommend.

plumbers.name: Alexander Plumbing
plumbers.address: 221 E Chicago St #9, Elgin, IL 60120, USA

reviews.author: Isidro Perez (Sid Perez)
reviews.text: Had them come out and repair a water washer inlet hose that had rusted together. They came out the same day I called, and repaired the issue in less than and hour. They were cheap and affordable and I would highly recommend Alexanders Plumbing for any of you plumbing needs. I've used them several times thru out the years and they never disappoint. reviews.author: Aaron
reviews.text:
$35,000 DISASTER FROM A SIMPLE CLOGGED TOILET!!!

We called "Emergency Plumbing" with a clogged toilet in August 2024. After their plumber visited us, we ended up with THREE ROOMS DESTROYED BY WATER AND SEWAGE, costing $35,000 IN REPAIRS that took SEVERAL MONTHS, and then later getting dropped by our brand new homeowners insurance due to the claim!

"Emergency Plumbing" happily took my several hundred dollars in payment for "clearing the clogged toilet". They have offered no recompense for causing our massive loss. But, to their credit, they did say "sorry" a couple times.

THE FULL, DISGUSTING, DANGEROUS, SAD STORY:

In August 2024 I called about a clogged toilet I couldn't plunge clear. They were able to schedule a plumber for early in the morning.

He tried an auger to clear the clog, to no avail. So, he asked to see the sewer cleanout. We went to the basement, where things were about to go DANGEROUSLY BAD.

He opened up the cleanout and A FIRE HOSE RIVER OF SEWAGE immediately began to spray out onto him and our finished basement. He panicked and asked for garbage cans / bags to catch the sewage river.

My wife brought down some large utility garbage bags. The plumber and I held up and filled about 3-4 large bags of sewage over our heads during the next several minutes before the flow finally stopped and he could cap off the cleanout. He reassured me by saying, "sometimes stuff like this happens". We were both drenched in sewage from head to toe. Some had splashed in my eyes and mouth.

He started to hand mop up the large sewage puddle with some paper towels. I told him "don't bother, this all will need a mitigation company". He replied, "all you really need is some soap and water". Ummm no.

We dried off, shedded clothes and went back upstairs. The toilet still wouldn't drain, so he said he'd drive back to get the larger auger. He asked if I had any toilets upstairs, and I replied yes. He said "OK, you can use your upstairs toilet and shower, just don't use the clogged one down here". He left and I started to shower.

After showering I came back down to the main floor to discover that SHOWER WATER WAS GUSHING OUT OF THE TOILET INTO OUR BATHROOM AND HALLWAY!!! More fun!

In the second panic of the day, I tried my best to dam up the NEW RIVER OF WATER now FLOODING my main level hardwood floors. I ran downstairs to see even more water now soaking many ceiling tiles and raining onto the sauna and floor.

I called the plumber and the head plumber agreed to come join the fun. He arrived, I explain the scene, and he said "Oh no, he should never have told you to use the fixtures upstairs". Oh no!

The first plumber later returned with the larger auger. They managed to clear the clog with it. They did some hand mopping up of the now destroyed first floor powder room, hallway, hall closet, and living room. They asked for a check for several hundred dollars, said sorry for the problems, took my check and left.

The next day we opted for a water & sewage mitigation company, rather than the plumber's recommendation of "soap and water". We then watched much of our house get ripped apart and endured days of loud fans a dehumidifiers.

The insurance claim process and reconstruction took place over the next couple months. We had to cancel our Thanksgiving party, as we were still wrapping up the rebuild by then.In the weeks after the plumbing adventure, I texted and called the plumber, hoping to get some recompense for this disaster, maybe cover my insurance deductible, maybe even my money back? We talked on the phone once and I made my case. He didn't offer anything at all. Haven't heard from them since.

0 STARS - CANNOT RECOMMEND FOR ANY PLUMBING WORK. Maybe the head plumber is good? But whatever junior plumber they sent to unclog my toilet basically destroyed much of my new house. They were arrived on time and were friendly to talk to, though, tiny bonus points for that. ONE QUARTER OF A STAR

reviews.text: I'm really glad I went with my gut and chose Gregory's Plumbing for my plumbing needs. reviews.text: We woke up to find our basement flooded because our water heater had cracked overnight. reviews.author: Veronica F
reviews.text: Gregory's Plumbing provided top-notch service when I needed several plumbing updates after moving into my new home in Batavia. I reached out based on their great reviews, and I’m glad I did. Jacob and Donovan came out to help finish a plumbing project I had started myself but ran into trouble with. They showed up right on time, which I really appreciated. Both Jacob and Donovan were very friendly and took the time to explain each step of the work so I understood what was happening. They replaced my kitchen sink, installed new shutoff valves, hooked up the dishwasher, and swapped out my garbage disposal. They also took care of the shutoff valves for both toilets and even fixed a small leak on the main water line. Everything was completed quickly and looked perfect when they finished. The price for all the work was fair, and I felt like I was getting honest advice the whole time. Later, I scheduled another appointment because I was having issues with my hot water tank. Jacob said he’d try to repair it first to save me money. When the water heater suddenly failed and started leaking everywhere, I called for help right away. The office was very understanding about the emergency and had Jacob and Donovan at my house with a new tank in less than half an hour. Once again, the work was done fast and professionally. I highly recommend them for any plumbing needs in Batavia. The prices are reasonable, the plumbers are trustworthy, and they don’t try to upsell you on things you don’t need. Overall, I am very happy with the service and the results!

reviews.author: Dolores Alex
reviews.text:
I called A.C.T because I had a problem with a brand new hose for my sump pump that wasn't connected right.

Water was shooting out from the base of the hose. I did ask my landscaper if he could install this brand new hose for me because i was in a pinch and he said yes.  He said he would charge me $60 for a very simple job.

However...i needed this done so i paid him $60 to do this. A couple days later when we had some bad rain i was outside and noticed the  hose was shooting out water of the base of the hose.  The same thing that happened to my old hose that i needed to replace with the new hose.The only difference was the old hose actually had a split in the hose (because it was old) so I needed to buy a new hose.

When A.C.T. came out he told me right away the landscaper didn't tighten the hose in a couple spots leaving water to shoot out from the base of the hose.

Prior to all this i did called the landscaper to tell him what happened he told me it wasn't an emergency and it could wait.  That didn't make me very happy because i paid him $60 to do the job right and when i told him what happened he didn't at all seem alarmed and couldn't be at my house for about 3 days. I was shocked.

Thats when i talked to my neighbor and they recommended A.C.T. and i can see why... he was excellent, and charge me a trip charge which I felt was very fair. He came out on a Sunday and he fixed the problem, and above all done it right the first time.

The purpose of this review is to solely let people know that there are good trusting, reputable companies that truly care about their customers.

A.C.T. the owner Ron did not hesitate to come to my aid to help me out
ASAP and fix the problem.

Easy fix...however, the problem was the landscaper he did not tighten the hoses.

Next time ill go with the professionals.

Thanks to Ron for all his help it meant the world to me.  Now I can sleep knowing the job was done right the first time.
