The staff person was on time, kept the service within the estimated reasonable price range, and made several good suggestions.  Will definitely call Tony's again for future services.

reviews.author: Heather Roskopf
reviews.text:
We had a major clog in our main drain line and couldn’t use any water without it backing up — very stressful situation. We called Tony’s Drain & Sewer, and Mike came out to help.
Mike was professional, knowledgeable, and explained everything clearly from the start. He cleared our main drain and then performed a camera inspection to make sure the line was fully open and to check for any additional issues. Unfortunately we have some more issues we need to address, but we have draining water for now. I really appreciated that he took the time to show us what was going on inside the pipe — it gave us real peace of mind knowing the problem and how to resolve it fully. The whole experience was smooth and efficient.
Highly recommend Tony’s Drain & Sewer — and definitely ask for Mike!

reviews.author: Tara Quade
reviews.text: My sewer lines back up every couple of years with my 100+ year old home due to tree roots in the lines. I have used Tony’s on numerous occasions and they always come quickly and are very efficient at resolving the issue! They also provide a warranty on their service. I would definitely recommend them.

plumbers.name: Bee Quick Plumbing & Sewer - Naperville
plumbers.address: 1133 Elizabeth Ave, Naperville, IL 60540, USA

reviews.author: Cori Southwood
reviews.text: We had issues with our main sewer line. We received other quotes. Elias's insight, knowledge, expertise, and professionalism was in a class of his own. He also provided a great explanation as to what was going on, the concerns and also the options we had available. We didn't think we had options until we met with Elias and Bee Quick. With his expertise in the field he fixed the issue (efficiently, thoroughly and effectively) and saved us a significant expense and undertaking that wasn't necessary but deemed necessary by others. We are grateful to Elias and Bee Quick. He is the epitome of a class act and professional. I highly recommend and would encourage you to get a quote from Bee Quick before making final decisions elsewhere.

reviews.author: Brett Sather
reviews.text: I had a main drain line issue and Bee Quick was one of three plumbers I contacted.  His technical expertise, knowledge, and love of his trade are unparalleled.  He diagnosed the problem, provided a quick turn-around schedule date to complete the work, and the work was completed professionally, cleanly, and quickly.  I will never be contacting any other plumber ever again as a result.  The quantity of 5 star reviews is very indicative of the service provided.

reviews.author: Vicente Meissner
reviews.text: I had a really awesome experience with Bee Quick Plumbing for my underground plumbing repair. The technicians were super skilled and efficient, and they made sure to clean up everything afterwards. I would definitely choose their services again without any hesitation for any future needs.

reviews.author: Nicolette Gleespen
reviews.text:
Elias and his team were able to find an issue that 4 other plumbing companies could not identify in our condo building. He got to the root of the problem and my neighbor and myself finally have peace of mind. I will absolutely recommend him and his team. They were also very polite and thorough.

Thank you guys so much!

reviews.author: Randall Nelson
reviews.text:
We needed the drain pipes replaced for about 1/2 the house. 90 year old pipes. First quote ( from another plumber ) was eye watering. Bee Quick did the job for less than 1/2 the other quote.
They listened to my concerns and we quickly agreed on what they were going to do. The only thing I wanted, that they would not do would have been a code violation. ( politely explained )
Total pros and a pleasure to work with.
If there was an option for 6 stars I would have given it to them.

plumbers.name: Prestige Plumbing, Heating & Cooling
plumbers.address: 11 John St Ste A, North Aurora, IL 60542, USA

reviews.author: Crystal Smith
reviews.text:
We had great service today from Mark C.  We woke up the first day in our new home to find that our water heater was not working properly.  We weren't expecting we could find someone to install a new one on the weekend but Prestige had great reviews and weekend hours.  Mark answered right away this morning, let us know of their promotions and said he could be there by early afternoon.
He was prompt and had everything needed to complete the job. He explained in detail what he needed to do to complete the job detailing the expenses.  He also inspected our dryer gas line (we're having a new dryer delivered Monday) and repaired it as well.  We were extremely pleased with his service.  Just an awesome job and by 5 pm he was finished, everything was cleaned up and upgraded for safety.
I would recommend him and Prestige Plumbing without hesitation.  We are so thankful he was able to come out on the weekend!  Thanks, Mark!

reviews.author: James Wodka
reviews.text:
I worked with Mark C. on my water heater. Mark was very professional and cordial both over the phone and while he was out here doing the work. They were able to get it back up and running almost immediately. I will definitely use Prestige again.

EDIT:
A few days after initially repairing the water heater, I couldn't get the heater lit, again. After fiddling with the igniter I could to get it lit, albeit briefly, so that I had enough hot water to shower. I called Prestige and left a message to have someone call me to walk me through opening the new, redesigned front plate so I could attempt to clean the inside. This was on 1/7. I didn't get a call back on 1/8. I called again and left messages on 1/9 and 1/13, with no return calls either time. By the evening of 1/13 my water heater was no longer working at all. I have had the water heater replaced, and because of this poor customer service I went with another company. That's $1,300 that could've been Prestige's if they took the time to make a single phone call.

reviews.author: Steve Wittenborn
reviews.text: Five years ago Prestige installed 2 water heaters in my home.  Today, one of them wasn’t able to keep the pilot going.   Called Prestige, they came out, fixed it in 30 minutes.  Parts still under warranty and was only charged a minimal fee for labor.   Courteous, fast, knowledgeable work.  Very happy.

reviews.author: Vijay Shah
reviews.text: Was not impressed. Father & Son came to my home within a few hours of my call for service on my water heater.  They arrived at the time they said and they called when they were on their way. Took a very quick look at my water heaters and although they got one pilot on, they swiftly decided I needed new heaters.  Quoted me over $3500 which I felt was too high.  They charged me $135 for coming out and lighting the one pilot. They could not get my second heater pilot on.  I immediately called another service company who arrived to my house within 1 hour and told me he could replace them for $2300 (the specs of the heaters and the install were the same, trust me, I went over the details).  This service guy from the other company was able to easily ignite the heater that Prestige could not.  When I asked the second service company what I owed him for coming out and getting this pilot on, he told me...NOTHING, call me when you need to replace them, but for now you're good"........My opinion of Prestige is that they are probably good at what they do, but you will likely overpay or worse get ripped off

reviews.author: Eva Balek
reviews.text: Your service is way above the other plumbing, heating and cooling services.  I have been a customer for the past 20 years and have never had a complaint.  Today was yet another time when I needed your immediate help and there you were within the hour.  Your work is always neat and efficient but what I appreciate the most is the quality of work in every job no matter how small.  Thank you for always being there.  This time I am enjoying my new and cutting edge hot water heater.

plumbers.name: Euro Plumbing & Sewer, LLC
plumbers.address: 8435 Pyott Rd, Lake in the Hills, IL 60156, USA

reviews.author: Mincho Komitov
reviews.text:
I had an outstanding experience with Euro Plumbing & Sewer! My sump pump failed over the weekend, and they were the only company willing to come out on a Sunday without hesitation. The technician arrived on time, quickly diagnosed the issue, and replaced the sump pump efficiently and professionally.

What impressed me most was the clear explanation of the problem, the fair pricing, and the quality workmanship. They left the area clean and made sure everything was working perfectly before they left.

If you need fast, reliable, and honest plumbing service—especially in an emergency—Euro Plumbing & Sewer is the team to call. Highly recommended!

reviews.author: Brigid Paulson
reviews.text: Our unit had water coming in through our ceiling. Our maintenance engineer quickly called Euro Plumbing who sent Austin out the next morning to start addressing the situation. Austin even noticed an unrelated issue with a pipe on our HVAC room that he fixed. When the leak was resolved and the clog removed he even took the time to explain everything that happened and what they did to try to ensure it never happens again. I seriously appreciated Austin's dedication to the job and his expertise. I told my partner that if we ever move from our condo to a townhouse or SFR, we're calling Euro Plumbing and we'll be asking for Austin!

reviews.author: Eric Easterlin
reviews.text: When other plumbers didn't seem to sense my urgency that I had an underground leak in my pool, I gave Euro Plumbing a call.  They were responsive and sent me Mike the following day.  I knew where the leak was and it was under my patio.  Mike got right to work solving the problem.  It took him the better part of the day, considering everything that was involved, but he fixed it right.  I appreciate how prompt and professional these guys are!

reviews.author: Patty Johnson
reviews.text: Euro Plumbing has outstanding service! I have been a customer for many years and I can always count on them to fix any problems I may have. This time my water softener needed to be replaced.and Mike did a superior job!  Mike was very professional, knowledgeable and reliable.I can’t thank him enough for all of his help!

reviews.author: Kathy Keiser
reviews.text: Euro was great to work with on our water heater that needed to be replaced. The service person was professional and took care to make sure we were satisfied.  Serge gave us a military discount.

plumbers.name: Family Rooter Plumbing and Sewer IL
plumbers.address: 143 US-12, Fox Lake, IL 60020, USA

reviews.author: Jules Jonas
reviews.text: From the first phone call to the final walk through, the team was incredibly professional. The plumber arrived on time, explained the issue with our clogged drain, and completed the drain cleaning quickly and cleanly. Their professionalism really stood out – they were respectful, wore clean uniforms, and left the work area spotless. I would definitely recommend Family Rooter Plumbing and Sewer IL for any plumbing services.

reviews.author: Staci Field
reviews.text: We had our sewer line back up, and the first plumber that came out was claiming that we would need to dig the line up for over $10k.  So we called Family Rooter and they were able to come out and give us a second opinion which was Much better news than we were expecting.  They were able to fix the issue same day (hydro jetting the line), explained everything thoroughly, answered all our questions, and made sure we understood the maintenance plan to prevent the issue from coming back.  Will definitely be using their services in the future, especially for the maintenance of the line.

reviews.author: javan phillips
reviews.text: Family Rooter Plumbing and Sewer IL was fantastic – they showed up on time, were courteous and got the job done quickly. The plumber was honest about what needed to be fixed and very professional, which made me feel confident in their plumbing services. We couldnt use our water at all before they arrived and now everything works great! They were extremely transparent about the process and taught us alot about how to keep our system maintained. 10/10 would recommend.

reviews.author: Jennifer DeGregorio
reviews.text: Tim and his partner were great.  They were on time, professional and courteous.  He got the job done quickly.  Will definitely call them again with any plumbing problems.

reviews.author: Samuel Burke
reviews.text: Rob and Tim out to my house in Harvard to unclog my main sewer drain. Super courteous people and the pricing was half of what other companies were trying to charge us for the same exact quoted work!! The service they performed was professional. They cleared the drain, showed us the camera as they ran it down after the clog was clear and thoroughly explained what our options were.  HIGHLY recommend.

plumbers.name: Accurate Plumbing Pros, Inc
plumbers.address: 4133 W Orleans St, McHenry, IL 60050, USA

reviews.author: brian valerugo
reviews.text: Brian responded to my text right away and helped me come up with a plan to trouble shoot my sump pump.  He was able to send a plumber to my house the same day.  Dave did excellent work.  His communication was awesome and he did a great job of explaining the work that needed to be done.  I’ve worked with Brian for many years and many houses.  He is very professional and a great plumber.

reviews.author: James Harmel
reviews.text: Dave arrived @ 8:00 am. Completed Bradford White 50 Gal Gas Tank Water Heater installation.  Installation complete @ 10:00 am. Accurate Plumbing Pros submitted the most reasonable quote. The installation by Dave was professional and fast. I have another plumbing project coming up. I will certainly contact Accurate Plumbing for a quote. I highly recommend this plumbing contractor for any of your plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Stephen Mathews
reviews.text: What a class act! Accurate Plumbing are true proffesionals and Dave was great. With no one home, Dave replaced our kitchen faucet and fixed our poolroom bathroom faucet. He left the place clean and even shut the door. Thank you very much.

reviews.author: Linda Wozniak
reviews.text: First of all, I had an emergency with a broken pipe and they responded quickly. Dave came out, assessed the problem and expertly repaired thr pipe. Im very happy with the whole experience.

reviews.author: James Ashworth
reviews.text: They did an awesome job on my water heater. Very professional. Because of this I will have another job for them shortly. Thanks guys

plumbers.name: Aquaduct Plumbing, Heating & Air
plumbers.address: 74C Stone Hill Rd, Oswego, IL 60543, USA

reviews.author: Mark W
reviews.text:
Jason and team were outstanding in every capacity, from start to finish. Highly professional, excellent customer service. Took the time to provide thorough explanations and answer any questions we had.

For our new home, we had them install a new furnace, replace and upgrade our water filtration system, install new sun pump, and replace a toilet. Everything done to perfection with the highest quality products. Highly recommend Aquaduct Plumbing, Heating & Air.

reviews.author: Kelly Wake
reviews.text: We had our water heater go out on Thanksgiving Day. We had a contract with another provider in the area who didn’t have our size water heater in stock and with the storm, no one was available until Monday. I called Aquaduct’s emergency line and received a call back within 5 minutes on a Saturday. After waiting almost two days, they were able to come out within 2 hours and provide a honest quote with breakdown that was easy to understand. We are canceling our contract with the other provider. Very professional and friendly! Highly recommend!!

reviews.author: Michelle Masciola
reviews.text: I have been using Aquaduct plumbing for years now. Jason the Owner is Amazing! Jason always takes the time to answer any questions and always thoroughly explains the work he will be doing. The customer service is also top notch; from the first phone call I make to the office speaking to either Vanessa or Britanny to when Jason and Mike show up at my front door. They all go above and beyond to make calling a plumber less stressful. I highly recommend using this company.

reviews.author: Vickie Friedrich
reviews.text: Friendly, efficient and professional. Appreciate the rapid response despite being a busy season. Had my problem diagnosed and repaired quickly without extra charges or unneeded work. Gave recommendations for potential future needs. Would certainly call them again.

reviews.author: Patricia Nuter
reviews.text: Our entire extended family uses Aquaduct plumbing. They’ve installed water filtration systems at three of our family homes and most recently installed a tankless water heater. Always professional and courteous! Fair pricing, and financing available too!

plumbers.name: Northern Lakes Plumbing and Sewer
plumbers.address: 585 Foxridge Dr, Fox Lake, IL 60020, USA

reviews.author: Jeffrey Pilcher
reviews.text: Quick and skilled service,  Adam responded same day within an hour. Honest and fair pricing  he had us back up in running in no time! Will definitely be in touch for more plumbing needs in the future.

reviews.author: Jessica Lytle
reviews.text: Adam was very professional and polite. He came to my house and replaced a spigot in no time. Clean solid work and I no longer have to worry about my leak. I would 10/10 recommend to anyone needing plumbing work. Great job, great person, beautiful work. Thank you!!

reviews.author: Jeff Lullo
reviews.text: Adam was great! I can’t say enough about him. If a rating of 10 was available, he definitely earned it. Called him at 8am on Super Bowl Sunday and answered right away. In fact he was already on his way to another job. Adam showed up ready to work. Thought our Water Softener was leaking all over the basement. He rotted out the drain.  Then explained and showed me the real reason for our water issue; the ejector pump was dead, and water was almost at the top ready to flood our basement. Adam gave me a very reasonable quote to go get a new one and install it. Adam was back with the new pump within 20 minutes. He completed the install at the quoted cost, and even wiped our floor before he left. Adam has earned our business, and should be your first call for a reliable plumber!

reviews.author: Joey Dehn
reviews.text: Adam was fantastic. Provided prompt service and great communication. Needed my washing machine water valves replaced. He was in and out in less than 20 minutes, and his pricing was more than fair. Before and after pictures provided.

reviews.author: Tanya Harvey
reviews.text: Our hot water heater started leaking on Weds.  I did not know any plumbers in the area and started looking for one on Google.  Adam had great reviews, so I called to explain what our issue was and discuss our options.  We chose to go with a tank less water heater and also replaced 4 toilets in our home.  He gave us a fair price and came on Fri to complete the job.  His workmanship and attention to detail is second to none.  We are super excited for our tankless water heater and high toilets (we are getting older so our knees are thrilled)!  Thank you Adam for your quick response, good price, and beautiful work!  We will be recommending him to all our family and friends in need of a plumber.

plumbers.name: Fox Valley Plumbing & Backflow
plumbers.address: 953 1/2 Grace St, Elgin, IL 60120, USA

reviews.author: Rick Siefken
reviews.text: Matt and Corey came out same day.  Sump pump routing was leaking and poorly installed by me.  Also fixed copper leak and installed new pump.  The work was above expectations and I didn't feel cheated like I have with corporate plumbers.  I cannot recommend more highly.  Before and after photos attached.

reviews.author: Moses Kane
reviews.text:
Matt from Fox Valley is extremely knowledgeable and is the only plumber who thinks outside of the box unlike many other plumbers who stick to the basics and unable to figure out any issues. Matt helped us diagnose issues that we never knew we had. Him and his team are top notch professionals that will deliver a clean and excellent job. Highly recommended for all plumbing related work!

Matt was available to talk and give us advice at all times and we highly appreciate his help!

reviews.author: Cheryl Mackin
reviews.text: Fox Valley Plumbing worked with me to assess and amend a frozen pipe.  They were friendly, listened to my concerns, and recommended solutions that worked.

reviews.author: Nico L
reviews.text: Matt came right over to inspect our home and to see what was going on with our sump pump. He gave me two quotes and didn't push any of them on me. I did opt for the more expensive unit since I'd rather play it safe than sorry. Cody came the next day after they even ordered the unit before I made my final decision. They installed it and were very customer oriented. It's hard to find folks that care, I got a follow up call later that night checking how everything went. I seriously cannot recommend them more. It's an experience you won't find with larger run businesses and I will definitely call them in the future.

reviews.author: Lee Petit
reviews.text: Matt provided an excellent solution to an ongoing issue. His team came in and executed that plan in a prompt professional manner. It’s very appreciated!

plumbers.name: Rescue Plumbing
plumbers.address: 839 N Winchester Ave #2r, Chicago, IL 60622, USA

reviews.author: Mike Schlechtweg
reviews.text: Great service. I had an issue with my shower and Rescue Plumbing came out promptly and helped me get things working again. Would certainly recommend to anyone!

reviews.author: Lorraine Freund
reviews.text: A big shout out to Rescue Plumbing. They certainly came to my rescue. My shower wouldn't turn off completely and I needed a quick fix. They arrived within two hours. Victor Cruz was polite and efficient and got my shower working properly again in no time!

reviews.author: Rajatha Priyadarshini
reviews.text: Pete and his team were awesome. Our dishwasher wouldn't run, except for one hour quick wash. Three different people gave three different diagnosis. Pete was the only one who caught a pinched copper pipe under kitchen sink. He assured that it was the only problem and dishwasher will run fine after the fix, that's exactly what happened. Easy appointment, free estimate, honest diagnosis and quick fix. I highly recommend them.

reviews.author: Lisa Spengler
reviews.text: Pete arrived quickly and assessed the situation -- my old toilet needed to be replaced. He and Noah were back early the next day with a replacement that was installed in no time. Not only were they fast, but they were thorough and friendly. After the successful install, Pete cleared up all the materials and the old toilet and left the space clean. I highly recommend Rescue Plumbing. They'll take great care of you!

reviews.author: Subgeta
reviews.text: Called to get a leaking boiler pipe fixed. Fast response, got a quote, and my boiler was not only fixed, but brought to code. Excellent job by Freddy and Carlos whom were very professional, knowledgeable, and informed me what needed fixing/replaced. Excellent! Will call them when I need pluming repairs in the future. As well as recommend them to others!

plumbers.name: Aurora Sewer Cleaning Corp
plumbers.address: 3185 Longview Dr, Yorkville, IL 60560, USA

reviews.author: David Shin
reviews.text: He's a truly professional technician. I was so happy he arrived promptly, fully equipped with all the necessary equipment. He diligently cleaned the drain for two hours, which was truly admirable. Furthermore, he successfully completed the entire job and paid me a very satisfactory fee. I recommend this company to everyone I know.

reviews.author: B Lehnen
reviews.text:
Rafael did an amazing job. He really took his time and explained everything he was doing
I had another company prior who told me it would cost thousands to fix.
He was very professional and honest. His recommendation was yearly cleaning.
Price was very affordable.
I would highly recommend Aurora Sewer Cleaning Corp.

reviews.author: Tyler Quintana
reviews.text: Called them in need of a quick turnaround to help me rod out my main line. They were able to send a technician, Jose, out to me in less than 2 hours. Jose was very professional and cleared out roots that were backing up my line. Prices were exactly as quoted for me. At no point was pushed to try to buy more services. I will for sure be using Aurora Sewer Cleaning Corp again in the future if needed.

reviews.author: Jeanette Ortiz
reviews.text: We had a sewer backup emergency and received exceptional service. Rafael was on time. identified the issue right away, and worked efficiently to resolve the problem. He was professional, knowledgeable, and kept me informed throughout the entire process. We truly appreciated the fast response and quality work during a very stressful situation. Highly recommend their service!

reviews.author: Jacklyn BB
reviews.text: I highly recommend Aurora Sewer Cleaning Corp. I have been dealing with an issue for 2 years now. Everytime I washed, water would drain back to my tub making it impossible to wash on a weekly basis. Once they came out, they listened to my issue and made sure they took their time resolving it. He put in a camera, and saw many roots. He went over it about 4 times making sure he cleaned it out as much as possible. I was shocked at how much he was able to remove. Very professional and he drove about 35 minutes from his home. I will continue having them over and keep up the maintenance every year. They offer a great price as well.

plumbers.name: Turner Plumbing
plumbers.address: 818 Stone Creek Cir, Genoa, IL 60135, USA

reviews.author: Schulenburg Realty, Inc.
reviews.text: Dylan and Mark are extremely professional, honest, courteous and competent. Showed up 5 minutes early and texted 30 minutes before to confirm. Replaced a toilet and a kitchen faucet. Cleaned up afterwards. Left no mess. Highly recommended. Will use again as needed.

reviews.author: Austin Welte
reviews.text: 110% satisfied! Dylan is knowledgeable, timely, professional and clean. He absolutely blows the other plumbers I’ve used out of the water. Based on what I’ve paid for smaller jobs, I feel that Turner Plumbings pricing is fair and competitive. This is the only company I’ll call from now on. I originally reached out directly through Google and got a response almost immediately. From there, Dylan took over with phone calls and texts which was perfect. He delt with the city directly and coordinated with them for repairs on our mains and I didn’t have to lift a finger. I would give 10 stars if I could.

reviews.author: Alicia Kellogg
reviews.text: These people are amazing! Every time they come I am wayyyy more than satisfied. Great thorough job, and very great prices. I only call Turner Plumb when I have an issue. I trust them 💯

reviews.author: GORDON AKEY
reviews.text: I have nothing but great things to say about Turner Plumbing. I had a toilet that was leaking and had to be replaced. Dylan came over almost immediately gave me a price for the whole project. He removed my old toilet and replace it with a new one the very next day. Turner Plumbing did an excellent job for a fair price.

reviews.author: leea herriman
reviews.text: To say Turner Plumbing did an outstanding job is an understatement but no other words completely describe the wonderful work  they did; which included multiple  jobs from my bathroom to kitchen and even the outside and I can say honestly everything was done beautifully. Trust if I have any other plumbing issues they will be the first people I call.

plumbers.name: K.B.I Sewer & Drainage
plumbers.address: 2016 W Indian Ridge Dr, Johnsburg, IL 60051, USA

reviews.author: PermablockTank - FukCal51
reviews.text: Keith and his crew were awesome. They replaced a section of sewer line under my basement floor. Right on time. Super polite. Kept me informed the whole time. Oh, and the work is top notch. Definitely recommend these guys.

reviews.author: Ashleigh Holley
reviews.text: KBI was super respectful and professional when they came to install our new water heater. We had bought our own water heater and had them install it for us. Keith Jr. was so nice and respectful. He did a great job on the installation and even ran out to get a drip pan that we had requested. The price was very reasonable and way less than I expected. We will be using them for all our plumbing needs in the future!

reviews.author: James Kutz
reviews.text:
I had a Sunday afternoon backup of sewage in my basement floor drain. I called and spoke to Keith Jr., who made it by the same day within a couple hours. He talked me through the process and accurately quoted me the cost over the phone. A couple hours later, my sewage line was flowing again. He provided me with some long term solutions and estimates regarding the coming months/years so that I could begin planning for similar issues in the future. He was kind, patient, informative, and diligent considering I needed his services on a Sunday evening. Based on my research, his pricing was very competitive considering the time of the week.

Thank you Keith Jr.!

reviews.author: Jon G
reviews.text: Owner Keith and his team did a wonderful job. Modern equipment , honest, knowledgeable, and great work.  I had drainage issue.  Came out right away for a free estimate.  Access wasn't easy but he showed me using a camera exactly what was going on and offered alternatives.  Keith took care of working with the village and identifying all the lines.  His pricing was good and fair.  The work was done as quickly as possible and was quality work.  Cleaned up everything nicely.  I will use them again and recommend them to everyone.

reviews.author: Jeffrey Bautch
reviews.text: We needed a sewer lateral in our basement repaired and Keith from KBI Plumbing came out immediately to give us a free estimate, which was a great deal more reasonable than the previous contractor had quoted. They were right on time the day the work was scheduled to be done. Their crew was very polite and did a fantastic job. They cleaned everything up, it was left spotless! I would HIGHLY RECOMMEND them! They did an excellent job and were very reasonably priced.

plumbers.name: A&P Grease Trappers, Inc
plumbers.address: 801 N Raddant Rd, Batavia, IL 60510, USA

reviews.author: Kyle Stoffers
reviews.text: Highly Recommend A&P Grease Trappers for your business. Our technician, Bruce, was on time for our appointment and was not only extremely knowledgeable and helped us out with cleaning our grease trap, but he was also incredibly nice and personable. Bruce really went above and beyond our expectations and clearly and politely made recommendations for what we should do in the future. We hope to use A&P for our business again in the future.

reviews.author: Dawn Phillips
reviews.text: I have had great experience with this business from start to finish. They were efficient, knowledgeable, and clearly take pride in the work they do. Everything was handled smoothly and professionally, and I always felt like I was in good hands. It’s refreshing to deal with people who know what they’re doing and genuinely care about delivering great service. I’m very happy with the results and wouldn’t hesitate to use them again or recommend them to others!

reviews.author: Collin Dissette
reviews.text: First time using this company for my restaurants , absolutely fantastic experience by everyone I interacted with !!

Received a $675 bill to clean my grease trap after they were just there 2months ago.
Claimed I needed hydrojetting services, once they opened up the grease trap it showed the unit was only vacuumed out, the walls were left with 2-3” grease layer. After three years or business at $225 a clean out they offered me $125 off my next cleaning.
I’m sorry but that’s not good enough

reviews.author: Justina Pikor
reviews.text: They are always on schedule and do a great job cleaning our Grease Trap!  It is always clean after they leave too

reviews.author: Julie Pfeffer
reviews.text: Pete helped us with a complicated leak in our 3 flat. He was incredibly communicative, professional, and dedicated to making things right for us. I’d hire him again in a heartbeat!

reviews.author: Olivia Williams
reviews.text: We had a great experience with Rescue Plumbing. Making an appointment is easy because their admin staff are super organized. Both times we were able to get someone to come out within a day. The guys that came and installed our new sump pump were incredibly nice and professional. They emailed us options to fix our problem with price estimates, which made everything really clear and easy. Everybody at Rescue is so friendly! We highly recommend.

reviews.author: Christine Del Priore
reviews.text:
Editing up to a 3 star for now.  The company called and is doing their best to rectify the issue which I appreciate so much!  I will edit the review again once the leak if solved once and for all!

They came promptly which was nice, however the service cost to our bath faucet was over $300 and the sink was leaking again a few hours later worse than before they “fixed it”. There was no guarantee on their work so they would charge the full fee again to check it. I will not be calling them again.

reviews.author: Dean Ramoino
reviews.text: Logan was fantastic to work with. Very responsive, professional, and accommodating. My tenants did not have a working shower and Logan offered to come in on his day off to fix the issue. I would highly recommend Logan and Rescue Plumbing for any plumbing needs. The office staff was very friendly and helpful as well! Thank you again!

reviews.author: Mari
reviews.text: Pete and Noah were amazing! Total professionals. They installed an outdoor spigot on our house in about an hour and a half. Pete was great about explaining everything, and the job was done perfectly! Will definitely be calling them again in the future!

plumbers.name: Michels Plumbing Inc
plumbers.address: 225 Gale St, Aurora, IL 60506, USA

reviews.author: Monica Yvette Venegas
reviews.text: Wonderful Company to rely for any plumbing need. Not only was the price reasonable there plumbers were exceptional.  We had to remove old cast iron sewer lines and add additional drains for new washroom. Leon, Kyle and Brenan were on-site, attentive, courteous, with excellent workmanship. So happy I used them. Overall a wonderful experience. Would highly recommend.

reviews.author: Doug Hafer
reviews.text:
Marnie,
Could you please thank everyone, as we truly appreciate you all.  We have been working with Michels for maybe 15 years, and when things go wrong, we do not hesitate to call you all.  Customer service is great, prices are honest, and we have always had an all-around excellent experience.

Kyle was quick to diagnose the problem, looked at other issues that could have caused the issue or could cause future issues, and recommended a solution.  We, of course, took his advice.

Thanks again, we appreciate it!

-Doug & family

reviews.author: Julie Wallin
reviews.text: Brian came out and cleaned out my sewer water line - I was previously told I needed a whole new sewer line $6000 from another company. Brian came out and removed all the mud and roots from the line!!  I appreciate him taking the time and fixing my line!! Great great great great job!

reviews.author: Alan Unnerstall
reviews.text: We have been using Michels Plumbing for over 20 years and they have always provided reliable and efficient plumbing work.  Just had our sump pump replaced and a custom cover installed today.  Looks great!   Kyle the technician did an awesome job, very respectful, responsive and efficient.  Great job!

reviews.author: Leslie Friedrich
reviews.text: Michels is by far the best plumbing service in the Aurora area! Brian did an incredible job with a challenging kitchen disposal installation. He redid piping, and now there's even more room than before in the cabinet under the sink & we now have a disposal! Michels is always right on time & provides updates on exact arrival time. Office staff is extremely helpful providing quotes or estimates via text messages. Prices are excellent! Definitely a 5 star plus company!

plumbers.name: Dave's Plumbing & Repair Service, Inc.
plumbers.address: 732 Tek Dr STE D, Crystal Lake, IL 60014, USA

reviews.author: Barbara Boissonnas
reviews.text: Dave's Plumbing was recommended when I needed someone to find and fix a leak downstairs that no one could locate. It was making my ejection pit pump run every 20 minutes, and I was afraid the pump would fail. So many people, including other professionals that I hired, had searched everywhere down there and given up. Colin came the same day, determined to find it and fix it -- and he did! He was totally professional and polite, a pleasure to work with. What a relief to finally have a smart, experienced plumber at a very reasonable cost. I will use Dave's Plumbing from now on and highly recommend them!

reviews.author: Liz Cook (Pomaraptor)
reviews.text: Dave and his crew came to my house and replaced a broken pump. We just purchased a house and had water backing up from the drain.  Dave explained everything, taking his time to make sure I understood all available options.  The pricing was reasonable and the service was outstanding.  We were so happy with Dave and his staff that we had them come back a few days later to replace the sump pump.  Upon completion of each install  I received an explanation of what was installed, how it works, and when I need to contact them if something goes wrong.  The install sight was clean when they left.  We will use Dave for all future plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Kurt Waatti
reviews.text:
Dave,
Thank you for going "above and beyond" in the installation of the new garbage disposal, despite the obstacles encountered from the previous installation, which turned a 1 hour job or less into a 3 hour job. You stuck with it until the job was done and didn't raise the price showing conscientious respect for adhering to the deal and respectfulness to your customers.

I highly recommend Dave's Plumbing & Repair Service to anyone who wants an honest plumbing service with integrity.
Kurt J. Waatti

reviews.author: Scot Berndt
reviews.text: Dave's Plumbing came out and repaired issues with two toilets that a previous (licensed) plumbing contractor misdiagnosed. The cost to repair the underlying issue for both toilets was essentially the same price I paid the previous plumber to simply reseat the two toilets. Dave's Plumbing was thorough and their communication was excellent. Pricing was very reasonable. All work was accomplished the same day.

reviews.author: S L Watkins
reviews.text:
3/6/26
Had Dave come out and install new sump and backup pumps. Spring is heat and mine was no longer working. He did a great job, cleaned up, and the work is top notch!

I continue to use Dave’s because he is honest and doesn’t cut corners. I know he is going to do a great job and quality work. Thank you Dave for coming out and installing our water heater.

plumbers.name: JVS Plumbing Co
plumbers.address: 5211 Mann Dr Unit D, Ringwood, IL 60072, USA

reviews.author: catherine peters
reviews.text:
Just had a wonderful experience with Christian from JVS plumbing.  Christian was at my home for a water heater installation.   He arrived right on time, was respectful of my flooring, making sure he covered everything, and took the old tank with him.  He was very personable and finished the job quickly.
Pricing was the best offered out of 7 different local plumbers.  I would highly recommend JVS for any plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Shar Wade
reviews.text: I called due to a leak with my hot water heater.  I left a message and got a return call within a few minutes.  JVS was able to send someone out in less than an hour! Christian was able to fix the leak quickly.  He was very professional about everything.  I thought the price was reasonable.  I would recommend JVS Plumbing Company to anyone for their plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Tom Zambito
reviews.text: I recently purchased a new home, the appliances, not so new, so I requested a home warranty from the seller. Our 17 yr old hot water heater went out with all the fun stuff, water leaking all over, etc. Dealing with the home warranty co. was exhausting, and said 3-5 days to fix it, plus $1200. Nice. I went on Angi and JVS immediately called to see what was up. Spoke with the tech, explained the issue and I wanted to go tankless, and he told me he would get back to me in 20 minutes. In 15 minutes, a JVS tech was at my fence flagging me down. I showed him the mess, called his supervisor, his exact words were "I am confident about this". I have never heard those words from a tech about anything. The first contact called, sent a quote, it was $1800 more than the cost from the home warranty and their cheap replacement. He told me that they can install it the next day (Saturday). By 8am, the tech was on time, and began working. Done by 3pm, I had hot water. The entire experience at a time of turmoil was breathtaking. Some companies, just want to work to get stuff done, and JVS Plumbing is one that I shall be calling them the next time something goes boom. The overall service was impeccable, the quality of work was well worth every cent. No BS, no hidden fees, just great work and excellent value.

reviews.author: Ryan McReynolds
reviews.text:
Tried to hire before Christmas. They came out in 2 days to give us an estimate, and he recomended getting it done asap. I called that same day to set up the service, and was told that she would talk to the tech who gave the estimate, and he would call me later that day to set up. He texted to ask if we would be home over the holidays, I said yes, then I was not contacted again for 11 days, and after the holiday. I received a call, from a girl in the office, asking if we had a chance to review our estimate, and would we like to set something up?
Absolutely unacceptable way to run a business. Do not try to hire. Not that they would want the job anyway.

reviews.author: Mike and Lane Schlagel
reviews.text: JVS Plumbing did a fantastic job of replacing our water pipe. They were polite, professional, and good at communicating about the process. They also cleaned up everything exceptionally well. We would highly recommend them!

plumbers.name: TJM Sewer and Plumbing
plumbers.address: 31W070 Rohrssen Rd, Elgin, IL 60120, USA

reviews.author: Robin Fomusa
reviews.text:
I hate to leave a bad review, especially for a local business, but I’ve given TJM Sewer & Plumbing plenty of time to fix things to no avail. On December 26, I paid a $125 estimate fee and was quoted $4,500 to replace a pump and tank and redo plumbing. I was told the $125 would be credited if we moved forward. When the work was done, they determined the tank did not need to be replaced, yet I was still charged the full $4,500 and the estimate fee was not deducted.

Shortly after installation, the pump was not functioning properly. When I asked them to return to fix it, they attempted to sell me a whole-house filtration system instead of addressing the issue. I declined. They later blamed our problems on an issue with the well and claimed they could not fix it. I hired a well contractor who resolved the problem in 30 minutes without touching the well, leading me to believe there was never an issue with the well.

I requested an itemized invoice, which did not align with the work performed. Based on labor and materials, the job appears significantly overpriced (almost double). I formally requested a partial refund on January 12 and followed up multiple times, most recently on February 6, and have received no response.
I am incredibly disappointed with the lack of response and professionalism. I’ve also since been informed that they were never even licensed to have done the work they performed. I am sharing my experience in hopes that it can save someone else the headache and loss of money.

reviews.author: Andy Jeser
reviews.text:
TJM Saves the day!  Todd, Chris, and the TJM team were outstanding.    We had an excellent experience with TJM.

We  noticed strong sewer gas odor on a Friday morning.   Todd and Chris quickly came out and determined we had a broken sewer pipe. They were back at my house Saturday morning with a big crew to fix the issue.

Our repair was very involved.  It was big and extensive repair.  It  required saw cutting our driveway, opening the foundation,  and major excavating to access the broken pipes and fix the issue.      Todd, Chis, & crew had our plumbing fixed that afternoon.    They were back Monday to finish things up and closed things out with the inspector.

TJM was honest, professional, knowledgeable, delivered on quality, and was priced fairly.

My family and I were in a very bad spot with an unexpected broken sewer pipe that required major repairs.   TJM walked us through every step and did their best to help us out during a stressful situation.   No matter how many questions or issues we had-  Todd always took his time to address our concerns.  He wants to help and he does great work.

I 100% recommend TJM for any plumbing and sewer job.      They will get the job done right.

reviews.author: Gina Postelli
reviews.text: I had a wonderful experience with TJM Plumbing. They were right on time. They were knowledgeable and efficient, finishing everything they said they would in 2 hours. And that included an unexpected trip to Home Depot to ensure they had a part which would not leak. He charged exactly what his estimate said he would charge. I would call them again for any job in my home.

reviews.author: Neil Hollister
reviews.text:
Very happy with the initial visit, was with in the hour.  They promptly put camera in sewer line and quickly identified the problem to the 61 year old Cast main sewer line.  They had to break through concrete slab to replace all cast.  Messy job but needed to be done!

I will be using them again to install a tub!

Highly recommend TJM!!!!

reviews.author: Eric W
reviews.text: Man this company is the BOMB! I called and got same day service. Chris and Christian showed up and diagnosed my issue with 10 mins and had my kitchen sink and 1st floor toilet fixed with the hour. 2 issues only $400.  THEY DIDN'T EVWN WAKE MY SLEEPING KIDS. HIGHLY RECOMMEND

plumbers.name: Mark's Plumbing Inc.
plumbers.address: 1851 Suncast Ln, Batavia, IL 60510, USA

reviews.author: Bill Henkelman
reviews.text: Mike and Jesse are talented and courteous plumbers. They handled our list of maintenance items quickly. They replaced a Kohler shower valve, toilet valve and cleared faucet filters. Recently we had Mark’s staff replace an aging sump pump and water softener with new technology. Have had Mark’s plumbing at our home for 20 years. We have several neighbors that have Mark for all their plumbing needs. They are the best.

reviews.author: paul jagiello
reviews.text: Mark's Plumbing was recommended to us by a neighbor. Mark's Plumbing provided us excellent plumbing service.  Michael and Jesse were knowledgeable, professional and polite.  They were on time the two times that they were at our house.  The plumbing work that they performed is exactly what was needed and it was completed quickly.  I will definitely recommend Mark's Plumbing to family and friends.

reviews.author: David Hunter
reviews.text: Mark's was the low price of three plumbers I contacted. They did pricing over phone / email instead having to come out, which the other two required and charged for. Communication was good. Work was done efficiently and professionally. 10/10 woudl call again.

reviews.author: Sean Morrissey
reviews.text: Absolutely amazing! We had a shower cartridge issue that went sideways. Mark‘s plumbing handled everything incredibly professionally and communicated very well. I’d highly recommend using them moving forward.

reviews.author: Cynthia Kieckhefer
reviews.text: Great company. Mark DiBiase has always been our direct provider but he’s managing a couple younger plumbers in his business now who are just the nicest, most personable guys. Well qualified. I feel such peace of mind knowing that they’ve done work for me.

plumbers.name: Good Call Plumbing
plumbers.address: 707 Herra St UNIT H, Elburn, IL 60119, USA

reviews.author: Jeff Dieken
reviews.text:
Great job from Goodcall!
Outstanding service, repairs were done professionally with everything left, clean and in perfect working order. What you can expect is honesty with attention to detail.
This is a company you can trust. We have used them for several jobs and would not hesitate to call them again.
Fair honest, pricing and with great follow-through.
Expert plumbers and service every time!!

reviews.author: Joan Henriksen
reviews.text: Nobody wants to call the plumber! A simple sewer clean-out turned into a major repair including replacing old corroded cast iron pipes and re-routing other plumbing for simple flow and connection to the main line. Good Call got us on the schedule ASAP. The plumbers are smart polite friendly and took the time to explain everything. They cleaned everything up and we are completely happy with their high standard of work.If you need a plumber, call GOOD CALL, they rock!

reviews.author: jessica roberts
reviews.text: Loved GCP! Missy in the office is fantastic…. When they came out to replace our water heater they were very thorough and explained everything to us about what they did from start to finish. Good Call Plumbing has my forever business…

reviews.author: ray O
reviews.text: We have used good call Plumbing for a few years now and have never been disappointed. Steve and his crew are great. It literally is a good call

reviews.author: carol ireland
reviews.text: Brett W. came and installed a new bathroom sink in our 130 year old house. He did a fabulous job. He's careful and so respectful. What a pleasure to work with and his work is excellent!

plumbers.name: Doctor Drain & Sewer Cleaning
plumbers.address: 127 Ridgeway Ave, Aurora, IL 60506, USA

reviews.author: Sonia Agudo
reviews.text: I had a great experience with Dr. Drain and Sewer Cleaning Company. They were very punctual, professional, and provided excellent service from start to finish. They cleaned the sewer lines thoroughly and took the time to explain what was going on and share their expertise. I really appreciated their honesty and attention to detail. If you’re looking for a reliable company to handle drain or sewer issues, I highly recommend them!

reviews.author: Orbelin Martinez
reviews.text: Great service, friendly staff very fast and efficient took care of our problem. I highly recommend them use them for any small or big job. They will definitely take care of you. Prices are very good. Not like other companies that charge an arm and a leg.

reviews.author: Anita Martinez
reviews.text: Today we encountered a serious problem at our home. The drain was clogged in all our toilets and main drain system in the home, as I called the drain doctor, he came out quickly within the hour, took care of the problem and discovered that there was roots in our sewer system. I highly recommend this company to anyone in the area. Their prices are very friendly and the team works fast and efficient.

reviews.author: Keith R.
reviews.text: Called them on a Friday night for a recurrent issue we’ve had with our sewer backing up, which hasn’t happened in 5 years, nevertheless it needs to be taken care of fairly urgently. Javier spent a good amount of time explaining our options and what we can expect from the service tech coming out. Ended up going with Doctor Drain over the other companies that I called for bids on based on the amount of time they spent on the phone with me, and they were out here within 36 hours of my request. He took extra time working on everything and our drain flow better than it did even before the blockage stopped things up, and showed me where the sludge was collecting in our pipes. Don’t hesitate to call Doctor Drain out for your drain and sewer needs! Reasonably priced, great service in home, great customer service over the phone, and quick to respond, what more can you ask for?

reviews.author: Eric Barrera
reviews.text: I couldn’t be more happier with  having Dr. Drain and sewer coming out and unclogging my basement drain. The pricing he charged me was unbeatable compared to any other companies I’ve called. He’s very reasonable, very professional and knowledgeable when it comes to his work I highly recommend him!

plumbers.name: Friendly Plumbing
plumbers.address: 1128 Algonquin Rd, Lake in the Hills, IL 60156, USA

reviews.author: Karen Smith
reviews.text: Michael is terrific! Quick response. Knowledgeable. Friendly and extremely fair. Professional,  respectful, direct. Follows through and truly cares. Love this company.  Can't say enough good things!!

reviews.author: Paulette C
reviews.text: Friendly Plumbing is a wonderful company.  We had a leak in our storage area and were so worried about what was happening.  I called Friendly Plumbing and Michael was here the next day.  Looked at the issue and told me all I needed was an end cap on a vent pipe and he wouldn't take any payment from me. So nice to work with an honest company.

reviews.author: m m
reviews.text:
I had an emergency water heater issue on a Sunday and called Friendly Plumbing.  Even though they were technically closed, they answered my call, gave me instructions for safety until they could arrive the following morning and provided me with warranty information on the unit within minutes of us talking

The next day when Michael arrived he knew within minutes what the issue was, explained why it malfunctioned and had the faulty parts installed.  Because of the previous days water leak, the unit wouldn’t stay lit because everything was still wet so we set up a large fan to dry it out and he returned later to finalize the repair.  Michael has done other work at my home over the years and it’s always done meticulously, professionally and  of course Friendly!  He’s a plumbing genius!  Fortunately for me he installed a floor drain years ago in the utility closet and that saved my adjoining room’s flooring during this incident

From start to finish this company was amazing- made a tough situation much easier to navigate. Highly recommend them for sll your plumbing needs

reviews.author: Nany Michael
reviews.text:
Total ripoff! I hired them to take a look for a partially clogged toilet. A guy came and asked, if I wanna remodel?!!! I said no
He said; well, it will cost you $825!!!
For what?!! He said we will remove the whole toilet and unclogged.
I told him it’s just a partial clogging. He said:” I know but that’s our price”!!
Total RIPOFF

reviews.author: Susan McKinney
reviews.text: I cannot speak highly enough of Friendly plumbing. The owner is so conscientious. He resolved my tree root drain clog quickly and competently, left the area spotless,  and even resolved an additional issue I had with low water pressure in my faucet. He was also so personable and polite. I would hire him any time.

plumbers.name: Convenient Plumbing
plumbers.address: 200 South Dr, South Elgin, IL 60177, USA

reviews.author: Ami Engel
reviews.text:
The team at Convenient Plumbing is great. I have used them for years to help with all kinds of needs, large and small. They are responsive and strive to educate you when they are doing repairs so you understand the need. They won’t do a repair if it is not warranted, and they will talk you through those situations as well.

We have had their help with our toilet, the outdoor spigots, the ejector pump, and our water heater. They even did a camera view of the pipe that goes out to the street.

I appreciate their service and certainly recommend their services to others!

reviews.author: Jeremy AmRhein
reviews.text: Had a great experience working with Convenient Plumbing.  They turned my Thursday night nightmare into an early Friday morning solution.  My water heater broke down and Ed and his son Jeremy came the very next morning to diagnose the problem.  After a discussion about the cost to repair versus the cost to replace (10 yr old heater), I decided to replace the unit.  They replaced the unit within a few hours.  Fast, efficient and honest.  Straight forward communication, no upselling or pressure.  Rare to find these days.  Highly recommended.

reviews.author: Joe F
reviews.text: We just had Convenient Plumbing fix an issue with our ejector pit backing up. They were upfront about all charges and options to resolve the issue. They were  amazing, professional, and speedy. Great work, great company.

reviews.author: Leo
reviews.text: They are now my go to plumbing company. Called 3 different plumbers. Ed called me back within minutes and stopped by within 15 to take a look at what needed to be done. Quoted me on the spot, scheduled to have the village shut off the water a few days later and was here a few minutes after the water was turned off. Ed and Jeremy worked quickly, explained everything and answered all my questions. They did a great job and I will definitely recommend them to anyone needing a professional plumber.

reviews.author: Carlos Durand
reviews.text: Had recently needed our ejector pump replaced, called and was quoted properly over the phone and the work was done within 2-3 hours of me calling, and here I thought I was just going to be calling to schedule! Walked me through what was done and some tips with the new pump, highly recommend for anyone in the Fox Valley area that is looking for both reliable and speedy plumbing service!

plumbers.name: Cork's Plumbing, Heating, & Cooling
plumbers.address: 10249 Vine St, Huntley, IL 60142, USA

reviews.author: Joel Weideman
reviews.text: My furnace decides to go out when it's zero degrees on a Saturday.  I call Cork's and they find the part for my 20 year old furnace.  Gil shows up and I'm back in business 30 minutes after he arrives.  Can't ask for more than that!!!  They do great plumbing work too!

reviews.author: J. M.
reviews.text:
Needed 2 bathroom faucets replaced. Dave came out, was prompt, personable, knowledgeable and professional. Very neat. Was appreciative that we emptied out the vanities and gave him room to work.
We've used Cork's several times - replaced toilets, our water heater...
Very reasonable and they do excellent work!
Save yourself some time Googling and collecting estimates, just call Cork's!

reviews.author: Edward P
reviews.text: Came out to fix a code 33 on my furnace, overheating. changed the limit switch that took about a hour, never checked the furnace for other problems that could cause the problem and told me to lower the gas valve if the problem persists a highly dangerous thing to do then took the old part to resell to someone else that was in working order.  $263.00 bill. Never again Corks

reviews.author: Emotional Sobriety Retreat
reviews.text: I called this company for an HVAC repair, and the lady who answered told me they were too busy and didn’t want the business. I’ve honestly never heard anything like that before. If you’re looking for reliable service, I’d suggest finding someone who actually wants to work with customers. I wonder if the owner actually knows the lady is turning people away.

reviews.author: Venkata Seera
reviews.text: The service is very reliable and reasonable price, not over priced like others.  Frank is an amazing person

plumbers.name: FJ Bero & Co. Plumbing
plumbers.address: 1629 Weld Rd, Elgin, IL 60123, USA

reviews.author: Wendy Wessel
reviews.text: We called to have a kitchen faucet replaced. Jeff set up appt as soon as they could, and Zach - who puit new faucet in- was wonderful. We have an old home and only a certain faucet works. They were so helpful and so glad we called them.

reviews.author: Laura Zorn
reviews.text: F. J. Bero plumbing has helped with our old house plumbing a number of times. I called them this morning and the issue was solved before noon. Excellent service!!!

reviews.author: Korin Stocker
reviews.text: I have been a customer for the past 10+ years and have always had exceptional service. Zach was very professional (and honest) which I definitely appreciated.  He even returned my call after about 15 mins being finished with the job to assist me even more. Keep up the great work FJ Bero!!

reviews.author: John Dahlberg
reviews.text: Second time in the last 8 days that we have used the services of F.J. Bero Plumbing.  Zach, from Bero was prompt, courteous, knowledgeable and efficient.  We have used F.J. Bero Plumbing for years.  We find their entire service team to be friendly, professional and skilled in all facets of plumbing. They show up on time and get the job done right the first time - every time! A special thanks to Jeff Bero to making sure our clogged drain issue was addressed before the Christmas Holiday weekend.

reviews.author: David Crail
reviews.text:
I've used FJ Bero 3 times now, most recently in January 2024. The response was very timely from when I requested an appointment to when the appointment occurred. Zach addressed all of my questions and successfully handled the issues we were having.

I have been very impressed with their knowledge, professionalism, consideration of options I had, competitive pricing and quick turnaround for availability. I would not hesitate to use FJ Bero again with any sort of plumbing needs that I may have.

plumbers.name: Suburban Sewer & Septic Inc.
plumbers.address: 17201 Jefferson St, Union, IL 60180, USA

reviews.author: Rosanne Derango
reviews.text: Absolutely the best customer service.  We had a broken waste line and Kyle came out at midnight to confirm.  Rest of the crew came today and fixed it.  Excellent work. Nice people.  Honest.  They don't make them like this anymore.  Family run business we would highly recommend.

reviews.author: Julie Palmisano
reviews.text:
I hope it's okay to say THANK YOU to your company who not only came out to look at our concern the very next morning, but took the time to educate us and give us options for repair.

We called three seperate companies and yours showed up, crawled under our pipes, and provided a reasonable quote. The work you did was greatly appreciated, the guys were very detailed, and job was done by the afternoon. Thank you!
-Steve & Julie Palmisano

reviews.author: Christina DeRaedt- Robledo
reviews.text: We have been using the family owned Suburban Sewer and Septic since the late 1980s. They have always been the best in the area for all of our needs. From a rodding of sink or floor drain to a larger repair of the sewer line between the house and the street. Randy, Jeff, and Kyle have always been our go to when in need.

reviews.author: Steve Lazzerini
reviews.text: The guys came by Friday first thing and fixed our leaky toilet and leaky laundry tub. Good work ethic and they knew what they were doing. We will definitely call them with all of our plumbing needs. Thanks guys.

reviews.author: Gary Esterling
reviews.text: Totally not dependable.  1st call -did not bring proper equipment. second call - routed out old cast iron pipe but did not water jet the entire length which made for overflowed sewer again because of debris left in the pipe.    Would not recommend. Not professional

plumbers.name: Blue Whale Backflow, Plumbing, & Excavating
plumbers.address: 801 N Raddant Rd, Batavia, IL 60510, USA

reviews.author: David C
reviews.text: I've used Blue Whale for several plumbing issues in the past, and I've always had an great experience.  The owner (Ken) is very responsive and friendly.  Always patient and explains the issues. The work is done right the first time, and they show up when they say the will!  Just yesterday (a Saturday), my water heater was leaking.  I called early in the morning, and within a couple hours, Tony was out here replacing it.  Completely done by 1 pm, and I initially called at about 8:30 am. Amazing, especially for a Saturday!  I will only call Blue Whale for my plumbing issues...I have them stored in my phone! Great people to do business with!

reviews.author: Jeremy Hesselink
reviews.text:
A great experience with Blue Whale today.

Responsive, efficient and fairly priced. They showed up in a great looking vehicle and had everything they needed stocked on the truck for a garbage disposal replacement.

Ken and crew took great care, made no messes and were very polite. I'd recommend anyone needing a residential service plumber to give this company a call.

Thanks so much!

reviews.author: Bob Cohoon
reviews.text: Ken and crew replaced my old clay sewer line that had major problems in Woodridge. They were very responsive and helpful during the quoting of the job. During the job, they took a lot of steps to preserve my lawn and keep the dig site safe. The new sewer line is great and I am very happy with the work that was performed. Overall, I had a very good experience with Blue Whale Plumbing and Sewer and the work was high quality at a reasonable price.

reviews.author: Uallknowme22
reviews.text:
BEST EXPERIENCE EVER!!!!

I stumbled upon this company because the previous homeowners used them and left the contact info behind when I bought this house.  I contacted them to install a toilet and I have to say the professionalism and level of customer service I received was outstanding!  They arrived on time, worked quickly to get the toilet installed and best part of all is they did not leave a mess behind.  I was impressed with the knowledge the plumber shared about things to do around my home to keep plumbing issues at bay and the price point was great.  I would not hesitate to recommend them to family, friends and coworkers.  I salute you BWP&S for the level of service you provided me today and putting my mind at ease in this new space of homeownership.  Thank you, thank you, thank you Tony & Zion.

On both occasions they were on time and extremely professional/knowledgeable. For the utility sink, I received multiple quotes which were all within $50.00 of each other so Blue Whale’s pricing is very competitive…licensed plumbers aren’t cheap. Also, in my experience(s), their office coordinator was very responsive to calls/emails about the scheduling/quote. Thanks Blue Whale!

After going through the other reviews I just had to edit.  Do you actually verify drivers licenses??

reviews.author: Brittny Jablonski
reviews.text: One of your drivers just straight up ran a red light in downtown west Dundee just now. And then when I passed him I saw he was on his phone. Please tell your drivers to be safe, as some of us have precious cargo (kids) in our vehicles.

reviews.author: Joe Joe The Circus Clown
reviews.text:
If your company’s work is anything like the behavior of your drivers, I wouldn’t trust you to paint a fence, let alone handle a professional job.
Absolutely disgraceful that someone representing your business drives like a maniac, tailgating and endangering others on the road. A quick look at your reviews shows years of the same complaints so clearly this isn’t an isolated issue, it’s a company problem.
Either you condone this reckless behavior, or your drivers are out of control. Either way, it’s unsafe, unprofessional, and unacceptable. If your team is in that much of a rush, maybe they should sign up for DoorDash instead.
Do better, though based on your track record, I won’t be holding my breath.

reviews.author: Kelly Plath
reviews.text: I had a pipe burst in my basement and was given the recommendation to call Hartwig to help. Not only did they respond with a tech at my house within an hour, but he did the work so quickly and clean. He was very kind and helpful. They made a very stressful situation feel calm and easy. I'm grateful for their work.

reviews.author: Abstrakt Marketing
reviews.text: We love partnering with the Hartwig team! They are so easy to work with - always great communicators and very informative.

reviews.author: Rachael Ivanovic
reviews.text:
Stop searching and hire The Tim’s. 100/5 stars. If you need someone who is honest, does great work, is extremely knowledgeable, goes above and beyond AND has fair pricing, you found them.

We are SO lucky we found them. Our situation sucked but it could have been way worse (and frankly, 5x the cost). They communicated at every stage of the project, explained what was going on and what to expect and prepare for. They worked in single digit weather, early mornings/weekend/late nights, did everything possible to limit the cost, and really went the extra mile to complete the job although they had to move their schedule around.

We had a leak in a pipe in the yard. It became urgent when we started to get water in the basement. They moved their schedule around, got the permits, rented the equipment, etc in the matter of about a day. Most people would have told us “oh well you’ll have to wait”, but the Tims CARE and that’s the difference. When they identified another issue, they already had the plan of attack in motion. Although they told us it was most likely impossible, they worked literal magic so that we didn’t have to replace concrete that was poured this past year, saving us a lot of money, stress, and time. Overall, they did EVERYTHING they could to take care of us and our situation, and made a really stressful situation as pain free as possible. I cannot even begin to express how grateful I am.

reviews.author: Mark Whipple
reviews.text:
Drain Masters was recommended to me by two friends at the gym for what I thought was a plugged toilet drain line.  They came by within a day of my call, diagnosed the problem at no charge, and told me I could fix it myself, or have them repair the issue at what I thought was a pretty reasonable price.

I elected to do it myself to save the money as it was a pretty simple fix.  They were honest and comfortable to deal with.  I will definitely be calling these guys again for any plumbing issues I have.

reviews.author: Cheri Patrick
reviews.text: This is the second time we’ve used drain master to route our Floor drain by washer/dryer prevent back ups!  They are Extremely professional, and   cleaned the area after the work was done. They charged a reasonable fee, they were  on time and full of helpful information.  I would highly recommend them to anyone in the area who Have plumbing issues.

reviews.author: Jen Duberville
reviews.text: I needed some help fixing an underground downspout drain that I shattered while digging out a shrub in my garden. Tim was incredibly responsive, prices were competitive, the job was done quickly and no mess was left behind. DSP's card has found its rightful place on my fridge and they will be my first call if a future plumbing need arises.

reviews.author: Kaitlyn Hudgins
reviews.text: These guys were super helpful and informative, and very professional and friendly! They had my toilet issues assessed and fixed in no time! Will definitely call them again!! Thanks Tim & team!

reviews.author: Zoe Cornelius
reviews.text: The bathroom shower head sprayed unevenly and weakly. I called their plumbing experts for assistance. They inspected the fixture and found mineral deposits inside. Once cleaned, water sprayed evenly again. Very pleased with the fix.

reviews.author: Karlee Cailyn
reviews.text: Their plumbing crew impressed me with how they fixed recurring toilet clogs caused by internal buildup. After contacting the team, the plumber performed a detailed inspection. The blockage was fully cleared. The toilet now flushes smoothly every time.

reviews.author: Nolan Finley
reviews.text: A pipe behind the bathroom wall burst suddenly. I called this plumbing service without delay. They replaced the damaged section and secured all connections. Their fast and professional repair prevented serious damage.

reviews.author: Conrad Bradley
reviews.text: A rattling noise began coming from a pipe inside the wall whenever we used the upstairs sink. The plumber opened a small access panel, secured the loose pipe, added proper brackets and tested the flow. The noise vanished completely. The repair was neat and minimally invasive.

reviews.author: Christian Wood
reviews.text: The bathroom tap leaked constantly and caused stains around the sink. Worn fixtures were replaced to fix the leak. The faucet now shuts off properly. The area was left clean.

reviews.author: Lisa Lonigro
reviews.text: John and his crew were great! My sewer line was full of roots and starting to back up into my house. The company that I had been using for the last 3 years refused to come out because they said I didn't live in a convenient enough location for them to continue to service me. Then I was in a bind, but John talked to me, I explained my situation and how the other company kept me waiting almost 3 weeks and then refused to come. John came the next day to help me out. He did a wonderful job and now I have peace of mind and no more sewer back up. They were quick and efficient and very helpful. They even checked my water heater for me because it was turned up to high, so they turned it down to a safer level for me for no charge. He has a new customer in me. Thanks All Family Plumbing!

reviews.author: Kathrine Clarke
reviews.text: Amazing service! We called Thursday evening and they were able to send someone Friday morning. The plumbers (Don and Shawn) were so helpful, clean, and determined to find the problem. They stayed calm and kept great humor throughout the call. The service operators were super nice and friendly too.

reviews.author: Mark Paulsen
reviews.text:
I recently had a water spigot installed (Aquor Water Systems V2) in my backyard by All Family Plumbing, and I couldn't be more pleased with the service! From start to finish, the experience was exceptional. They were prompt, professional, and incredibly knowledgeable.

The installation itself was seamless, they worked efficiently, and they left no mess behind. The new spigot functions perfectly, and the quality of the work is evident. It’s clear that All Family Plumbing takes pride in their craft and strives for customer satisfaction.

I highly recommend All Family Plumbing for any plumbing needs. Their skill, reliability, and outstanding service truly deserve five stars. Thank you for a job well done!

reviews.author: N E
reviews.text: I have used All Family Plumbing for years, they always do a stellar job. One time they came to the house because I had a problem with my kitchen faucet - turns out it was a loose screw, literally. 🤦🏻‍♀️ They refused to charge me! Another time the owner, John, replaced the piping under my kitchen sink . For years I’d had problems with the pipes coming loose and leaking due to the way the original pipes were placed. John reworked the piping and told me if I ever have a problem again he’d fix it for free. That was 10 years ago. Love these guys!

reviews.author: Eric Thrasher
reviews.text: Our gratitude to John and All Family Plumbing And Remodeling cannot be overstated. When we experienced a major water line issue in our home late this evening, they responded promptly and professionally. Their expertise and dedication were second to none, and they quickly diagnosed and resolved the problem to ensure our main water supply was restored for everyone in the house. Their dedication to customer satisfaction was truly remarkable. We highly recommend  John and All Family Plumbing And Remodeling for all plumbing needs, as they provided excellent service during our major water line issue.

By 7:30 no one had shown up.  Called to find out where plumber was.  Got a call back claiming there was confusion on the appt time with the plumber.  Not sure where confusion came in when I had written confirmation.  Plumber wanted to come later or another day.  My schedule was packed and I would not trust their work after this instance.  Cancelled work with them

We contacted them many times and many text messages were sent. Everyday promises were made to deliver the box. The new faucet was leaking from the hub as it was not tightened. Follow-up with this company is impossible and not respectable at all. Very bad experience. Do NOT Recommend this vendor for any plumbing. Absolutely disappointing and work was not completed. Incompetent and rude owner and staff.

Bobbie from Affordable Plumbing Solutions calls me back in less than 5 minutes!  He and Chris arrive in about 30 minutes.  Both were knowledgeable and a pleasure to do business with.  I know we will be using them in the future and will recommend them to our friends as well. Bobbie and Chris your were awesome!

reviews.text:

I especially like their responsiveness and that they communicate well with pictures and emails. I also liked they didn't charge me a rush fee even though they came over within the hour. Lastly, they were very professional, especially with Covid.

I think these guys are trustworthy, they do great quality work for the least expensive price, and they do it fast. What else could you want? I tried two others near me over the years, but I like Robert and his pal a lot. Can't go wrong.
