reviews.text:
We contacted A&T Plumbing due to a leaking expansion tank on our water heater.
Logan Mayer came out within the hour and promptly replaced it. The service was excellent and the price extremely fair. Highly recommend.

reviews.author: David Migliore
reviews.text: I just wanted to take a minute to detail the high end professionalism and excellent craftsmanship this particular company has displayed throughout my almost 20 year business dealings with them.  First off this is a second generation establishment and credit due to the original OG Mr. Lee Pearson. He has taken his time transitioning this company to his son Leth as I understand it.  Leth has been equally as professional and qualified. AT&T Plumbing is fair, detailed and straight forward. Leth has taken the qualities his father instilled in him and expanded upon them. His team is 1st rate. Shoes off at the door, I’ve personally seen them carry multiple water heaters up and down stairs while making sure first and foremost they do not damage my home. The installation was quick and precise. I’ve used them to install heaters in my personal garage which turned out perfect for Chicago winters. They have worked for my company when other plumbers were perplexed and confused what the issue was to backing up toilets. They came back 4 times finally breaking up concrete and finding an old antiquated piece of pipe that was leaking underground from the 70 year old building They fixed the pipe, hauled out all the insane amount of broken concrete from jackhammering. I have to take a second to compliment AT&T’s associates Logan and Scott. They hauled bucket after bucket of broken concrete for 8 hours up 2 flights of stairs then brought back pre mix concrete bags and finished with a concrete slab that looked perfect when finished.  I would recommend this company to anyone who is sick of dealing with plumbers who don’t show up, don’t accurately quote jobs and can just generally not be counted on. The owner will always answer the phone once a quote is established and they are always willing to go the extra mile. Merry Christmas guys and thanks again for being a company Northwest IL Suburbanites can count on when your professionalism is needed.

plumbers.address: 860 Commerce Dr, South Elgin, IL 60177, USA

reviews.author: Gina Gambrell
reviews.text: Lucky me had my checking account scammed again and the teller said this name was where the card was used at. Im in a pickle again after the scam artist jacked me up once again. Im still unsure as to wether this is the place it was used but the first one with the same name popped up on Google  search. You all be safe while clicking on anything online because there are low life's that dont care about nobody but themselves!

reviews.author: Mindy Kaplan
reviews.text: HD Plumbing & Heating was superb!  The call center was responsive, management was accurate with their general estimates, and the plumber who came to do the work was knowledgeable, friendly, and efficient.  Their prices were also much more reasonable than almost all of their competitors who I spoke with for estimates. I would definitely use this company again for any of my plumbing needs!

reviews.author: Gary Medley
reviews.text:
I called HD because we recently had a leak start in our current water heater. Not only was the company out within 24hrs to assess the situation but also in no way pressured us to replace our current unit, rather, they made us feel comfortable by letting us know we had “some time” to decide what we wanted to do.

I actually received a call from one of the owners the following day to go over all our options. He was very honest in what direction to go with all the different options. My wife and I cannot speak highly enough about our experience with them or their installers who were also amazing, polite and beyond professional not to mention how clean they installed the new water heater.

reviews.author: Nichole Brunson
reviews.text:
We recently had an issue in the basement and water was coming up from who knows where (well we didn't).  HD Plumbing and Heating had someone over so quickly, removed the old ejector pump, installed a new one, cleaned up the water and explained it all to me!  In the past HD has installed a RO system, which has been a great addition and nice to work with them in a non-emergency service appointment as well :)
The team is so friendly and reliable.  We felt good knowing the plumbing work was done correctly!  It's good to be able to trust a company like we do HD Plumbing and Heating!

reviews.author: Debbie Bryant
reviews.text: This company was recommended by my boss who had used HD for all the plumbing work in his new home.  So when we decided to install a RO system, I gave them a call. They arrived on time, finished quickly, left the work area spotless and made a follow-up call to verify satisfaction with the product and service.  Very pleased with both!!  Will definitely use them again.

I plan to use this company again!

reviews.author: corey lersch

reviews.author: Donna Chapman

Honestly you do get your moneys worth with this company!

The technician was very friendly and professional.

reviews.author: Anthony Murphy
reviews.text: I noticed a small leak under the bathroom sink and the surrounding area was getting damp. The damaged pipe section was replaced, all connections were secured and the area was dried thoroughly. The leak is completely gone and I feel confident it won’t come back.

reviews.author: Jordan Johnson
reviews.text: A faucet handle had become stiff and difficult to operate. Aurora Plumbing serviced the internal mechanism and restored smooth movement. The technician ensured no leaks remained. The faucet now functions properly.

Wonderful and will definitely be giving Allegiance my business for plumbing needs!

I wish I could assign more than a five star rating. Do not pass them up.

plumbers.name: Norman Mechanical Inc
plumbers.address: 1201 Gateway Dr, Elgin, IL 60124, USA

reviews.author: Domel D
reviews.text: Absolutely terrible service.  2nd time in 3 years my HOA had these guys work in our building and they caused major damage.  First time during a water shut off, my unit was damaged and they were not held accountable.  Now fast forward 2 years and they were performing some sort of pipe cleaning on a higher level garage which somehow ended up flooding my entire storage unit down below due to negligence and incompetence.  When i spoke to Bill he told me tough luck and he was rude and said he dosnt work for me so tough luck.  I will be filing an attorney general complaint against norman mechanical, as well as a better business complaint, as well as have retained counsel.  They will most definitely be held accountable and pay for the damages they caused.  Bill if you read this, feel free to call me with a better attitude and a good solution on how you will fix this situation.

reviews.author: Scott Stroope
reviews.text: We had a pipe break in the basement on Sunday, we called and Joe came out, he arrived quickly was courteous, knowledgeable and focused on getting our issue addressed quickly.  He completed the repair efficiently and made sure everything was corrected also offering suggestions for better water pressure in this 100+ year old house!  Highly recommended!

reviews.author: Susan
reviews.text: Joe was fantastic! He installed all new kitchen faucets+ about three months ago. He worked quickly, but diligently. He just did his job without chit chatting, complaining - very respectable... Our instant hot tank had a small issue with a short tube connection, but he came up with a creative solution. Said nothing about difficulty to park (another plumber showed up and left without doing the install due to parking). I would highly recommend Joe and will hire him again!

reviews.author: gretchen collins
reviews.text: No hot water.  I called Norman Mechanical, spoke with Billy and within 2 hours plumber was at my house.  Joe inspected and found 4 gas leaks.  Very lucky my house didn’t blow up!  Joe replaced gas lines, double checked everything and hot water is back on.  Thank you Norman Mechanical!

reviews.author: Nick Schmitt
reviews.text: I had a fantastic experience working with Billy and Norman Mechanical. They did an excellent job resolving my sewer drain issue and they explained everything thoroughly and clearly. I was impressed by the communication we received from Billy and the plumber who came over. They were very professional and I highly recommend this company.

plumbers.name: Community Plumbing Company
plumbers.address: 326 E Judd St, Woodstock, IL 60098, USA

reviews.author: Valerie Williams
reviews.text: From calling to installing a new water heater was less than 3 hours. Efficiency and reliability! Thank you for making my day!!

reviews.author: Donna Tuman
reviews.text: I believe in supporting local. Had what I believed to be a water leak. They came out diagnosed the need for a replacement was really going to try and come back out the same day but not likely when the leak worsened overnight they were out early on Friday and did a wonderful job. If you need plumbing work I highly recommend. They were recommend by Woodstock Heating another local I support.

reviews.author: Tonya Mondelli
reviews.text: Quick to call you back when you need work done. However once they get their money they ignore you. They came out and installed a new water heater. Ours was under warranty and they said we would have to pay up front and they would reimburse us when they got the refund from the water heater. That was over three months ago. No refund and they won’t return our phone calls. We have called THREE times. First time spoke with a woman and said she would get back to us and never heard back. The last two times we have left messages and silence. Still waiting for my reimbursement.... Not people you can trust. Stole $700 from us.

reviews.author: Larry Watt
reviews.text: The service I got was perfect I went and told him I had a bad water heater they came over checked out the part that was bad I suggested I get a new one then they were over the next day to install the new one with no delay the gentleman was kind add explained everything to me I needed to know about the future of this water heater and proper preventive maintenance thank you for your service and I would suggest Community Plumbing to anybody in this community and Beyond.

reviews.author: Heather Trom
reviews.text: I have had them out to my house twice.  The first time was for an emergency issue I was having, and they were responsive and the rate they charged was very reasonable.  Second time was to fix my ejector pit.  They showed up on time, and again, were pleasant to work with.  The job took a little longer than originally thought, but they stuck to the quoted price and didn't try to up charge me.  I will certainly use they again in the future.

plumbers.name: Reiche Plumbing
plumbers.address: 1115 Pontiac Ave, McHenry, IL 60051, USA

reviews.author: Michele Taylor (Micky)
reviews.text: Had an emergency situation with a leaking water heater, showed up early, removed, repaired damaged flooring, replaced WH and added a shut off valve!  Professional job, highly recommend!

reviews.author: Bennett A
reviews.text: On the recommendation of my neighbor, I called Reiche Plumbing and couldn't be happier. They tackled a number of issues I had, including some pipe work a previous plumber had messed up. They did it quickly, professionally and at a very reasonable price. Will definitely be using them for all my future plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Bob
reviews.text: Ryan is fantastic!  Quick, though and knowledgeable. Always able to handle every issue. Can’t say enough good about this company…..top rate!

reviews.author: Gene Silvers
reviews.text: Best plumbing company in area always friendly and professional fair prices and impeccable work ethic. They stand by all their work and explain everything before doing anything. Ty

reviews.author: Jim Sanaxay
reviews.text:
I needed to get my clean out pipe rodded as I didn't get it done in a few years and I hit up Reiche Plumbing based on a recommendation from my neighbor.  So I gave them a call and made an appointment.  They gave me a few times as to when they could come do my service but I told them that I will not be home unfortunately.  This was NOT a problem for them as I didn't need to be home to perform the service.  I spoke with Ryan and he said they could perform the service and put the invoice in my mailbox and I could send in a check afterwards.  SWEET!

I'd like to say that their pricing was the best out of all the plumbers I've used in the area.

The day of the service came and they came right on time and performed the service and on the invoice wrote exactly what they performed and detailed their findings as they in fact found roots in my pipe!

Overall I was extremely pleased with Reiche Plumbing and I will continue to use them in the future for my future plumbing needs.  A+

plumbers.name: Anchor Plumbing Inc
plumbers.address: 1470 Abbott Dr, Elgin, IL 60123, USA

reviews.author: Sophia
reviews.text: I’ve been working with Jeff in the past few years. He is courteous and professional. He’s very responsible and always comes in on time. He also explains to me about the work when I have questions and makes sure everything is as clean as possible. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: James Levin
reviews.text: Great family business that takes really good care of their customers. I take no credit for finding them - we were fortunate to come across Anchor because they had installed the plumbing for the prior owners of our home. We've now had them help us with a few things, including swapping our water heaters with tankless. Great service, great communication. Highly recommend.

reviews.author: Tami Zielke
reviews.text: Best Plumbing experience I have ever had! Right from the first phone call I was treated with friendliness and professionalism. Once my appointment was made, Jeff was right on time, he identified the problem and even took the time to explain what work was needed and why. He did quality work and his price was very reasonable. If you want a Plumber who is honest and stands by his work, I highly recommend Jeff and Anchor Plumbing.

reviews.author: Gloria Helin
reviews.text: Jeff and his son have been my plumbers for four years now. I highly recommend them. They always respond when I call. They are efficient and always know what is wrong. I have called other plumbers that you have to wait to call you back or they never respond. Others have left a mess for me to clean up. Their prices are comparable to other plumbers and what they charge. -Debbie Helin-Wetzel

reviews.author: Pam
reviews.text: Had a problem with big problem with a drain backing up and overflowing gallons of water. Called Anchor. They came, unplugged our drain and were gone all within about 90 minutes. They also gave us some very helpful information on ways to better maintain our drains and septic system. Will call them again for any plumbing issues!

plumbers.name: Yetti Plumbing
plumbers.address: 740 Pickwick Ct, Algonquin, IL 60102, USA

reviews.author: Pavel Adamek
reviews.text: Kyle is very reliable, knows his stuff very well and works extremely fast! He redid most of our pipes during our extensive remodeling and everything worked like a charm. A year later when I had and issue and thought that he did something wrong (it was actually just user error, and not Kyle's fault) he was willing to come over and fix the problem right away. I highly recommend Yetti Plumbing!

reviews.author: Brett Adkinson
reviews.text: I was referred to Yeti plumbing by a friend and when I called I got Kyle the owner, I explained that I thought I may have a two fold issue in that it appeared I may have had the water heater go and that there appeared to be a clogged floor drain also. Kyle agreed to come out after hours to look at the issue, it turned out that I had a sewer back up which he routed on the spot and also informed us that the water heater did not need to be replaced. There are really no words to express the relief of not only having the issue fixed in a timely manner but the honestly and helpfulness we experienced. It's rare to find people not looking to take advantage of a bad situation but I can say that is exactly what we got from Kyle and Yeti plumbing, I won't use anyone else going forward and would recommend trying this company for any of your plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Isaac Melton
reviews.text: Have Yeti is our go-to plumber for both commercial and our plumbing needs at home. Very responsive and always does great work. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Kathy F
reviews.text: Kyle is professional, knowledgeable, and courteous. He is able to assess the problem quickly and repair it efficiently. Kyle has kept me posted on availability and arrival times. Because of the confidence I have in Kyle and Yetti Plumbing I will continue to reach out to them.

reviews.author: joseph conrad III
reviews.text: 9/21/2024 I called and talked to kyle on a Saturday to replace a water heater.  Kyle jump on it right away asked me some simple questions to figure out what was needed.! When he showed up he didn't disappoint on what he said he was going to do and brought a hell of a set up with him. He had an absolute work shop with him and had everything known to man in his trailer to do any job.!  Kyle was polite, knowledgeable, and understanding of our situation. 10/10 will use again.!

plumbers.name: Elgin Plumbing & Drain Services
plumbers.address: 2150 Point Blvd #101, Elgin, IL 60123, USA

reviews.author: TOO MERCY JEPKEMEI (121R01864)
reviews.text: Early one morning I discovered my toilet was overflowing and it felt like a small crisis. Their plumber arrived very quickly, located the issue, and cleared the blockage completely. They even cleaned the area afterward, leaving everything spotless. I was really relieved and impressed.

reviews.author: Sterling AlvaradoAmador
reviews.text: These drain cleaning experts carried out hydro jetting on our main line. The technician was thorough and even showed us the before and after results. The drains are flowing perfectly again—an excellent and effective job.

reviews.author: Victoria Price
reviews.text: We had a small pipe leak behind the wall. The plumber found it without damaging much. Repairs were done neatly. Very satisfied with the outcome

reviews.author: Emily Janiya
reviews.text: The kitchen drain started making gurgling sounds. I called their technicians to check the issue. They inspected the vent and drain pipe and found partial blockage. After clearing it, the noise stopped. Very pleased with their work.

reviews.author: Richard Morgan
reviews.text: Water pressure dropped suddenly across fixtures. Their plumber located a partially closed valve and corrected it. Pressure returned instantly.

plumbers.name: Complete Plumbing Services, Inc.
plumbers.address: 220 E 1st St, Genoa, IL 60135, USA

reviews.author: Shalini R.K.
reviews.text: We had Complete Plumbing compete with 2 other companies for work we had done at our business. They were not only the most reasonable in terms of quote, but they were the most professional, organized, and the guys who came out to complete the work were very nice and explained what was going on. They worked quickly, and most importantly cleaned up after they were done. Tina followed up with emails and called to make sure the work was done satisfactorily. I would definitely use them again!

reviews.author: Elvina Jones
reviews.text: Best customer service I've ever received. I called Complete Plumbing needing an evaluation and possible repair of two whirlpool tubs at my house and time was of the essence. Tina, one of the owners who answered the phone listened to my problem, looked at pictures I sent and agreed to help me. We exchanged at least 5 text messages and had that many phone conversations within a half hour. Tina, without my even asking, researched and contacted a whirlpool repair specialist who was better suited for the job - and they are hard to find! Tina sent me their contact information, spoke with them on my behalf, and agreed to be my backup until I was able to make arrangements for the specialist to come to my home. In less than an hour, Tina solved a problem I had been struggling with and stressing over for weeks! So intelligent, committed and responsive! Amazing…. thank you Tina!

reviews.author: Jim Montagnino
reviews.text:
The estimates and scheduling were done with Tina (President of Complete Plumbing Services) who was professional, personable and offer numerous options. All work was clearly spelled out and deliver in written format that was easy to understand. The install was done by Nick, who did a great job. He was very professional, polite, neat and quick in his work.
Very satisfied, actually quite pleased in that they came in under the estimated hours reducing my cost of service.

reviews.author: Andy Martin
reviews.text: We had Complete Plumbing replace our water heater yesterday. This is the fifth or sixth time we've worked with them. Every time they've helped us we feel that the work is done extremely well, very professional, for a fair price and have had no problems. We definitely recommend them!

reviews.author: Eliska Pieper
reviews.text: I have used Complete Plumbing for years. For repairs on my central air, to replacing pipes, cleaning my furnace and then replacing my central air unit. Tina and her staff are always helpful. They are timely, honest and do an amazing job!! I will not use anyone else.

plumbers.name: Schambach Plumbing & Heating
plumbers.address: 10N125 Nesler Rd, Elgin, IL 60124, USA

reviews.author: Lisa K Brewer
reviews.text: Nothing short of exemplary! Spoke with Karen, was not an emergency so someone came out next day. Clean, efficient, communicative. Fixed my toilet issue in a matter of moments. Highly recommend Schaumback plumbing. Reasonable, FAMILY OWNED LOCAL small business. So important to keep these guys alive. The gentleman that came to fix my issue has been with Schaumback for 22 years and his son is working with them as well. Once again, highly recommend.

reviews.author: Mary Savarese
reviews.text: Wyatt was here today to install a faucet drain in our powder room. He arrived within 30 mins of his call to alert us that he was coming. He was courteous, worked quickly and did a good job. We’ve been using Schambach Plumbing and Heating for over 20 years and have always been happy with their fees and quality of service.

reviews.author: Denise Setchell
reviews.text: Highly recommend Schambach Plumbing & Heating.   Travis and Wyatt alleviated an issue we were having with the boiler at our home.  We were unable to sleep in our master bedroom due to (what we learned from Travis was the expansion of the copper pipes knocking against the floor joists).  The noise was so loud and constant that my husband and I could not sleep in our master bedroom.  Travis knew at his first inspection what the issue was and came up with a plan.  His plan is working perfectly, there is no noise and we have been able to sleep.  They were responsive, efficient and courteous and my husband and I could not be happier with the work that was performed.  Thanks guys.

reviews.author: Edgar
reviews.text: Travis is amazing at his craft. We had to call for a follow up, to no fault of their own, but he was knowledgeable and confident in what needed to be done to rectify the shituation. Thank you, Travis! Thank you, Schambach Plumbing.

reviews.author: Sharad Gadhiya
reviews.text: They work hard and are very accommodating! HIGHLY recommended by me, they are amazing to work with! My tankless water heaters from Navien are working flawlessly! Brian, Travis, and Wyatt were very professional!  They laid down drip cloth in the work area, and protected the carpet! They are local and family ran.  My tank failed the day before, they were out the next day and installed the tankless water heaters.  THANK YOU!

plumbers.name: M J Plumbing
plumbers.address: 1206 Rail Dr, Woodstock, IL 60098, USA

reviews.author: Gradient Descent
reviews.text:
We recently had a broken sewer line in our front yard and called MJ Plumbing. Matt and his team were professional, knowledgeable, and efficient. He diagnosed the issue quickly, clearly explained the necessary repairs (even educated me on the process which I personally appreciate), and completed the sewer line replacement promptly with high-quality work. Matt and MJ Plumbing made the process super smooth and resolved our issue completely.

I highly recommend their services and will be using them for plumbing issues in the future!

reviews.author: John Great
reviews.text: Hands down the only plumbing service I'll ever call going forward they were very responsive to my call and questions. The water heater they installed is so much better then the one we had before and instalation was fast and easy. They were personable and thoughtful.

reviews.author: Endless Chapters
reviews.text:
After 2 visits and getting the run around a bit from another plumbing company in Woodstock, I sought recommendations from our town FB page on good and fair plumbers to repair a broken sewer line. The responses were overwhelmingly in favor MJ Plumbing. And I am so grateful they were. Matt was at our house the next day to properly diagnose the issue and explore repair options. Unlike the other company, he took the time to map the issue and do the necessary leg work to find the best repair solution. Whereas the other company handed us an estimate for $5,200 and said they "thought" they knew what the issue was. My husband who is inherently interested in knowing the interworkings of everything, was involved in the entire diagnostic process. Everything was communicated clearly to us. Matt even communicated with us while out of state visiting family, as he knew we were at limited capacity to use water sources in our house for fear of water backing up into our basement. Him and his crew repaired the broken sewer line in just a few hours. During the repair they identified another issue that definitely needed rectifying and only cost us $200 now, but would have cost us thousands later (B Box, which offers access to the water shut off valves, was improperly buried under a foot of dirt, packed with soil, and had no cap. So they raised it, cleared it out, and will be fitting it with a cap to allow appropriate access in the event of an emergency.)

Very grateful to have found MJ Plumbing. Matt and his entire crew were kind and extremely efficient. I feel at ease knowing this issue was handled by competent workers, and won't be an issue 6 months or 6 years down the road. Will be using them going forward for any Plumbing needs!

reviews.author: Doug Kulie
reviews.text: I hired Matthew Haulotte owner of MJ Plumbing to replace a leaking hose bib. While doing so he admittedly cut through electrical wires. I now have multiple outlets that are not working and he is refusing to repair the damages he caused. As a reasonable solution I requested half of the payment I sent him back so that I could hire an electrician to repair the damages he caused and he refused. If you are looking for a reliable plumber that takes responsibility for their actions look elsewhere!

reviews.author: Jon Phelps
reviews.text: These are the guys you want to call for your plumbing needs!  They replaced my water service line in my front yard after another plumber's worked failed.  Matt went to bat for me with the city of Woodstock and got them to pick up the bill.  They took extra time to make sure rocks and debris were not laying on top of the repaired area.  I'm very satisfied with the quality and professionalism!

plumbers.name: Superior Rooter Plumbing Elgin
plumbers.address: 139 Brentwood Trail, Elgin, IL 60120, USA

reviews.author: Angelico Tomacruz
reviews.text: I am a general contractor. I had a bit of a plumbing emergency. I looked these guys up and had them come out same day to help me out. Very nice and polite and great pricing in comparison to other plumbing companies that I called out and had ridiculous fees for a water heater. I will definitely use these guys again and I will recommend them to all my friends and family.

reviews.author: James Daniels
reviews.text: Called on thanksgiving spoke with Akash and he got his tech Jimmy out and fixed a broken valve on thanksgiving they were great will definitely call again! Great pricing too!

reviews.author: Jose Manuel Navar
reviews.text: Akash and his team are the best! We had a clogged shower and they come right away. Best plumbers in town and we would not trust anyone else with our plumbing issues!

reviews.author: Carlos Macias
reviews.text: Great service had a plumbing emergency and they came to fix the issue the same day I called. Joey was our technician and he did a great job. He gave a detailed inspection and a detailed plan on how to fix the issue. I would 100% recommend superior rooter and plumbing.

reviews.author: R Weinstein
reviews.text:
Jimmy and the rest of the team were great! I interacted with 3 members of the team and all were kind, courteous and professional.

My experience with them started off as a non-emergency consultation. Enrique came out right on schedule, we walked thru the issues, and I got a text with the official estimate. He was very clear about what needed to be done and how. He didn't try to scare me into a remodel (yes someone else tried that). I also got estimates from 2 others,  but SR was the best. Their estimate wa comfortably within my budget. NOTHING WAS LEAKING AT THAT TIME so I planned to schedule work early January.

Then I came home to leaking ceiling.  Since they're available 24/7, i called their office. Maria was able to schedule Jimmy to come out within a couple hours. He made sure the pipes were OK, then found the bad seal on my tub. Four hours after coming home my ceiling was no longer leaking, my tub was sealed, and we had plans to fix the rest before the end of the week.

Finally,  the day of the planned project arrived. Jimmy came out early because I had an afternoon commitment. Everything went exactly as he said it would. Time and cost matched my estimate/ consultation EXACTLY. (Luckily no surprises midway thru the project). He wrapped up,  checked his work, and cleaned up.

Will 100% be saving this business to my favorites.

plumbers.name: JB Plumbing
plumbers.address: 1257 Cobblestone Way Unit B, Woodstock, IL 60098, USA

reviews.author: David Kvistad
reviews.text: While we’ve been having our basement finished our Carpenter found that our Utility area was flooding and contacted Jimmy who was there within 45 minutes and was prepared right then and there to drain, clean the area and fix the problem immediately all while we were at work. we couldn’t be more thankful extremely timely and professional- none the less the work done looks fantastic and we came home to a fixed pump and check and gate valve. Will use him for all future needs and refer our family and friends to him! Thanks again JB plumbing !!

reviews.author: M S
reviews.text: I used JB Plumbing to take care of a leaking valve that I had by my washing machine.  I spoke to Jim on the phone and had told him what the problem was and sent him photos.  Jim knew right away what had to be done.  When he came over the next day, he fixed the problem and explained the different valves to me.   He also cleaned up the pipes in that area.   He told me that since the job was easier than he expected, he would give me a discount on the quoted price.  Jim is polite, honest and a great plumber.  I would highly recommend Jim and JB plumbing. I will use  these guys for all my plumbing needs and have told my family and friends of my great experience with Jim.

reviews.author: Tanya B
reviews.text: When my drain pipe from the kitchen sink decided to rust out, I scrambled and called a plumber who never showed. A second plumber was hired, only to place a coupling on the pipe, charge me an insane amount of money and called it a day. Two days later, water was pouring out of the 20 foot pipe in numerous places leading to the main drain. After a frantic search, I came across James’ business page and took a chance. He came the very next day, assessed and completed the job correctly! What a relief to finally find a professional, dependable and affordable plumber. Since then, James has fixed the botched water heater install I had previously completed, so as to be up to code and replaced the toilet and vanity in my half bath. You can tell that James takes pride in his work and has your best interests at heart when explaining the right way to go about fixing things. He will be the only plumber I ever hire again! Thanks a million James!

reviews.author: Wende Dau
reviews.text: Our home is over a hundred years old and JB Plumbing was able to help us relocate a sink and toilet while working in a tight space with limited access to the main sewer stack. They are competitive with their pricing, creative with their solutions, on-time, polite and professional. We will definitely use them again.

reviews.author: Nicole Mullany
reviews.text: Jim was very professional and was on time.  When I called to get a quote he responded back to my inquiry with in a few hours.   Was great service at a very economical price.   Would highly recommend him and plan on using again for many future projects I have.

plumbers.name: Zenks Plumbing LLC
plumbers.address: 711 Ridge Dr, Marengo, IL 60152, USA

reviews.author: Greg Paciga
reviews.text:
I contacted Matt to do a simple job at a friends house who is destitude and 70 years old. The poor woman is 70 and hasn't had a dishwasher in nearly 30 years. And at her age tends to two adult children in their mid 30's that have mental health issues.
So I bought her a new fridge because hers was only maintaining temps in the low 40's. And I bought and installed a used dish washer for her. I just needed a drain line and hot water connection installed under the sink.
I asked Matt if he could just give me a ball park figure for the job. I sent him pictures of the existing plumbing and he quoted me between $400 and $600. I thought it was a little high. But I was willing to pay it just to get her a washer.
I did however, text Matt and asked if there was anyway he could keep as close to $400 as possible. He texted back and said "if your under some budget restraints, maybe you should call another plumber". Well, at the time I couldn't find another plumber to do work in union.
So i told him it wasnt a matter of money. I has plenty of funds. It was just a request to do whatever he could to maybe cut a corner here or there to maybe save a couple of buck.
So what does he do yesterday when he was SCHEDULED to do the work? Doesnt show! Doesnt call! Doesnt return my texts or my calls asking if he got hung up some where and when he might show up. Thats just B.S. and if I wher anyone reading this review id steer clear of this clown.
P.S.  I did find another local plumber that was out today and quoted $300 for the same work.

reviews.author: Scott
reviews.text:
I've used Zenk's Plumbing for many years and I've always been satisfied with Matt's work.

Over the years, Matt replaced my water heater, installed a new water softener, replaced the main water shut off valve, relocated a bathroom vanity drain and replaced a garden hose spigot.

Matt's my go to guy for all my plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Michelle Meyers
reviews.text: Woke up to no hot water this morning. Called Matt and he walked me through restarting the pilot light. He’s got my business for life. Thank you so much, Matt!

reviews.author: Mike Kirnbauer
reviews.text: Called Matt about an issue I was having with my basement drain over flowing. He immediately knew what the issue was without coming to look. He explained to me how to fix it and was very responsive. Thank you again Matt!

reviews.author: Char Kampfranz
reviews.text: If your looking for an honest,hard working plumber this is your man. He came out and tried to fix what we thought was the problem and when it wasn't he didn't leave until we had water and gave recommendations for the problem. No charge for the call until he can come back and complete the repair.

plumbers.name: Toppel Plumbing Inc
plumbers.address: 17010 Harmony Rd, Marengo, IL 60152, USA

reviews.author: Cyndi Norman
reviews.text: They put in a new water heater. How refreshing! Couldn't say enough great things about Toppel Plumbing. Effecient and knowledgeable. The topper, such friendly people. So nice to have people working on your home that you can tell truly enjoy their work. Thank you Mark and Derrick!

reviews.author: Buck Weiss
reviews.text: I highly recommend Toppel Plumbing. They did work at my house. Outstanding work. Price is spot on. There guys did a fantastic job for my project. The Owners are Top Notch. There workers were professional polite and work hard! Thank you Toppel Plumbing!

reviews.author: Ali Da Vanon
reviews.text: Toppel squeezed us into their schedule as an emergency water heater replacement with very short notice. They were quick, efficient and very polite. They have very reasonable prices and give honest advice. Thanks for doing an amazing job guys!!! 5 easy stars.

reviews.author: Lex Shook
reviews.text: My company has used Toppel Plumbing for years, but I used them for the first time in my home this week. I can't say enough wonderful things about them. I had a pipe spewing water into my bathroom Monday night, they helped me turn everything off over the phone, then they were in first thing Tuesday morning to make the repair. There was minimal damage to my bathroom and they had it done in no time. I cannot recommend them enough!

reviews.author: Mike Di Piazza
reviews.text: Derrick was amazing, Hot water heater stopped working and he diagnosed the problem in about 5 minutes and had me back up and running within 25 minutes. Extremely fair with rate, Highly recommend!!

plumbers.name: Trusted Aurora Plumbers
plumbers.address: 237 W Galena Blvd, Aurora, IL 60506, USA

reviews.author: Gina Brian
reviews.text: Our water heater stopped working suddenly and they came out the next day. The evaluation was thorough and they discussed repair versus installation options. Ended up replacing it and the process was handled professionally. Hot water has been consistent since.

reviews.author: Arund Brewster
reviews.text: I reached out for drain cleaning after dealing with recurring clogs in the kitchen sink. They used professional equipment and took the time to inspect the line thoroughly. The service was efficient but not rushed. It’s been a few weeks now and the drainage has noticeably improved.

reviews.author: Collin Emelia
reviews.text: I contacted them for a tap repair that had been dripping for months. The service was quick, and the plumber checked all the connections to ensure there were no hidden leaks. The attention to detail gave me confidence in their work.

reviews.author: Ray Jase
reviews.text: Our water heater stopped producing hot water, so we booked a consultation with Precision Plumbing. They tested the unit and confirmed replacement was the best option. Installation was handled the same day and done cleanly. Hot water’s been consistent since, with no odd noises.

reviews.author: Braeden Yareli
reviews.text: After scheduling a toilet repair, I was impressed with how quickly they responded. The plumber walked me through the issue, explained why it was happening, and fixed it efficiently. No unnecessary replacements, just honest, reliable work.

plumbers.name: D & D Plumbing Company
plumbers.address: 1372 Mulberry Ln, Crystal Lake, IL 60014, USA

reviews.author: William Blackney
reviews.text: Had a cartridge break off in the valve in our shower unexpectedly. After calling Dave from D&D plumbing he assured me he could take care of my problem and FAST. Dave showed up asap and took care of a bad situation. These guys came highly recommend and I would agree if you have any plumbing needs these are your guys. Thanks again Dave!

reviews.author: Kelly Olsen
reviews.text: D and D plumbing was absolutely amazing!!! We had a leak in our basement and had a few different plumbers come out to give us a quote. After a bad experience from another plumber in walked Brian. He was very nice and polite. I showed him right to the problem and he said he knew how to fix it and it would not cost over $1000 like the last quote.  After a fewer complications because of a older home we scheduled him to come back. When he found out that my son was at my sisters house he arranged his schedule so he could meet the city to turn off the water and fix the leak. My family and I can't thank him and his wife enough!!!! Thank you!!!

reviews.author: kuldeep singh
reviews.text: Very quick service for a sprinkler winterisation after a snowfall. These guys responded quickly, removed  the backflow prevention device and saved a system from further damage. Really appreciate. Not only this, they have upfront prices that they can tell you over phone. Very transparent. I highly recommend them for plumbing services in northbrook area.

reviews.author: Pattie Cox
reviews.text: Plumber Dan came and saved the day! I am extremely pleased and will certainly call him again. I needed a new Water Heater, Sump Pump and Battery Back-up Sump Pump System. Great service, fair up front prices  and no surprises. Cleaned up the work area, better than it was before they came!

reviews.author: Shirley “Alovea - Shirley Miller” Miller
reviews.text: They are the best. My hot water heater had exploded overnight that the next morning called them. They said they could not get to me today but they would be able to get to me 1st thing tomorrow morning. Couple hours later they called me and says Hey are schedules change we can get out to you today I am more than pleased with their service their professionalism and the quality of their work

plumbers.name: artisan water group
plumbers.address: 1116 Pine St, Lake in the Hills, IL 60156, USA

reviews.author: Anita Stayner
reviews.text: Matt did a great job of rebuilding our existing pond in the waterfall area, creating a stream 3 steps high.  The pond, about 8' x 18' has never looked more beautiful.  He took the existing falls area and curved it to flow down a new mound which he created and added some additional boulders and slabs to enhance the look.  We absolutely love it.  Beautiful and peaceful.  Matt was very professional and his training from Aquascape was very evident along with his plumbing background.  His price was fair and his work was well done.  We also had Matt clean the pond first and he did an excellent job of that as well.  He rearranged the rocks after washing them and cleaning debris from the pond.  The fish were kept in a large portable pool using the water from the pond (to prevent fish from being overly shocked )while he and another guy did the cleanout. He also treated the pond with healthy bacteria.    Matt was prompt and got the job done in one day. ( Pond cleanout was done prior to the restructuring and was done in one day. ) We would recommend him for sure.

reviews.author: D Clem
reviews.text: Matt is always great to work with.  He's an expert in the field of plumbing, and we've never been disappointed in the work we've hired him to do.  Matt is also very creative when it comes to water landscape design.  He's easy to work with in meeting your budget and design needs.

reviews.author: Sharon Mrowiec
reviews.text: We had Matt come out and clean our pond. He made it look amazing. He was professional and determined to make a mucky dirty pond look crystal clear. We will definitely request his services again. Thanks Matt!!!!’

reviews.author: Amy S
reviews.text: We couldn’t be more pleased with the waterfall stream Matt designed and built! We get compliments from everyone who visits. 10/10 would recommend!

reviews.author: Mike Mowrer
reviews.text: I have used them on a few projects. Always a great job and a fair price. Would definitely recommend

reviews.author: Laura Olsberg
reviews.text: I cannot say enough good things about this company!  I received a call back early this morning in less than 20 minutes and someone came to the house immediately. Matt was professional, fair, NEAT, and an amazingly friendly guy with sparkling conversational skills!  We received great work at a fair price!  It was a FANTASTIC experience. This is my go-to guy from now on!

reviews.author: Amy Neff
reviews.text:
Extremely trustworthy and dependable service from start to finish! We have used On Point Plumbing for numerous repairs from minor faucet leaks to major sewer and plumbing repairs. Each time we have experienced an issue with our 100+ year old pipes, they have reassured us that they would handle the job quickly and as affordably as possible. They have more than delivered on that promise time and time again!

On Point Plumbing can be relied upon to accurately diagnose the issue, complete the job in a timely manner, and deliver quality (and friendly) service at a very reasonable cost. I cannot say enough how grateful we are to have found a company we can trust and count on for many years to come! Highly, highly recommended!

reviews.author: David Newman
reviews.text: Matt and Paul do excellent work. They always respond quickly to messages left. They installed a new garbage disposal, have replaced our ejector pit pump, installed new hose bibbs and certified our backflow device. Reasonable prices, too.

reviews.author: Ryan Peterson
reviews.text: It's important to find a plumber and electrician in your area, one that you are confident that you can trust. I am happy that I found that plumber today. Matt Alcala from On Point Pluming came to my home and fixed a drain that had been giving me problems. Matt was thorough, knowledgeable, fair, and friendly. I will happily recommend him to anyone who needs plumbing services. Thank you again, Matt!!

reviews.author: Connie Commean
reviews.text: Am extremely pleased with their service.  Very personable and professional team.  I would highly recommend them and plan to use them again in the future if needed.  Our furbaby, Gracie, loved them and she is a pretty good judge of character.

reviews.author: Rick O'Connor Group
reviews.text: As a long time client both personally and professionally, we can say with certainty that Todd is the best in the business. He has a heart of gold and goes above and beyond when it comes to his customers. His response times are second to none! Schmid Plumbing always puts the client first and it shows. We will continue to use Todd for years to come!

reviews.author: Sarah Munts
reviews.text: My boyfriend and I were so thankful that Todd made it out on one of the coldest days of the year! Our main water pipe froze in our garage and we didn’t catch it until it had started to split. My friend referred me to Todd, I called him, and he was out way sooner than I expected. He worked quickly and we were able to have the city turn the water back on before the workers were done for the day. The best part is that he didn’t try to talk us in to things we didn’t need like other plumbers have in the past. Honest guy and great work - what more can you ask for? Thank you Todd!!

reviews.author: Jessica Baber-Zell
reviews.text: It can be very tough to find a knowledgeable and skilled Tradesmen these days. Todd is all of the above! He went above and beyond for my business to make sure everything was done early, correctly, and was super responsive to any needs we may have had! I highly recommend for commercial and residential use!

reviews.author: Brian Giangrego
reviews.text: I would HIGHLY recommend Todd & Schmid Plumbing for all plumbing work.  I have used him on multiple occasions & always find him to be very knowledgeable, quick to respond & most importantly honest.  100% trustworthy!!

reviews.author: Dan Hasselbring
reviews.text: Todd was very professional and friendly. Took care of the issue and provided some further information to avoid having it occur again in the future. Highly recommended.

reviews.author: Jonathan Baron
reviews.text: Dave helped with the outdoor installation of a gas line to my grill. He was able to install a hard-pipe hook up to my natural gas line. He did a great job of installing it around my deck to my grill. I will no longer need to purchase propane. He was courteous, fast and affordable. Will be using him for future projects!

reviews.author: Phil Shivley
reviews.text: From the moment Dave and Elite Plumbing and Piping showed up, a real sense of professionalism showed up at my door. Took Dave to the (3) bathrooms that needed whole new setups. Plus (2) faucet installations and outdoor piping on my subpump. Each issue was explained to me at length with a price quote for each project, so I could address what I could afford. Reasonable and thorough all projects were completed meticulously and accurately in one day. Needless to say,  Elite will always be my first call for any plumbing need...

reviews.author: Shannon Graves
reviews.text: Dave from Elite Plumbing and Piping Inc. came out to replace an outside spigot and install a new kitchen sink/faucet for me. He did a fantastic job! Would definitely call him in the future for other plumbing jobs.
